name: cinde (personal)
subject: our final chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Cinde Warmington
body:
| Hi, I know it’s pretty late, so I’ll be quick.

I just got off a call with Tristan from my finance team and we still need to raise a little bit more to reach our critical April fundraising goal.

I'm counting on folks like you. If you’re able, could you chip in to support my campaign before our midnight deadline?

Here’s the secure link:

**[https://go.cindewarmington.com/a/april-deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84071792/470382772/840086002?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_CW_20240430_FR_0_6MO_2-6_cindepersonal _na_na_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzIwMWRhYi00ZDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lb9y3qcEBfNPyB1CadTDeQ4LnAUYQYSO4lV6sAQbnv0=)**

Kelly Ayotte is trying to hide the truth about her anti-abortion record. While she was in Congress, she helped usher in the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ and supported extremist measures like a national abortion ban.

We need to defeat her, and I need you with me to do it.

**[https://go.cindewarmington.com/a/april-deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84071793/470382773/840086002?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_CW_20240430_FR_0_6MO_2-6_cindepersonal _na_na_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzIwMWRhYi00ZDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lb9y3qcEBfNPyB1CadTDeQ4LnAUYQYSO4lV6sAQbnv0=)**

Thank you,

Cinde

name: Barbara Grassley
subject: I don’t want my husband to worry.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=fbd11841d10d4796b740363d7bb0c013&_e=jPoTkX_Pbv0kGQSKujWptoKHqqmYWT7JGZTk0gcc9GPYD49X9EJVZpUXly0YcPRyKODKYuDW6zSNnbxtyylTQw9Y0skZCOW9FLOgcRTLXfjCCJzUaocdo1z9wyuG7PQg9LBWQKLf-AyDVDRGQg0Zxrvmgl3YGvmRIfYGPtlbAYeoySjAefs8wWXwlBV9UiyZObmOoSd98x6NvB19bq36Oj2dl6Npe2Js38uTb50efhQoSqLj5hZn1BkPYPuVWOjDI2OoMLjh9v-vKyhFVQdz_MNCSjrEafvvL_shzNG6YTQ%3D)
---
Dear Friend,

My husband, Chuck, has served Iowa in the U.S. Senate for several decades. We are so grateful to have had the privilege of connecting with so many families over the years.

Chuck is a lifelong farmer. He's experienced the ups and downs, triumphs, and hardships that come with the job to keep our fourth-generation family farm going.

I love Chuck's ability to weather the storms, solve problems, big and small, keep moving, and hold our government accountable.

I am so proud to be by his side. Through all the campaigns, elections, and late nights on the Senate floor, Chuck keeps fighting for our conservative values.

This year feels different. There is so much at stake with high inflation and the open border policies of the Biden administration.

I will say this: at this time in an election year, the stress of campaign finances starts to creep in. My husband cares so deeply about the future of our country, and I would hate for him to begin to worry.

The fundraising numbers haven't been looking the greatest almost midway through the year. Is there any way you could make a small contribution to help elect a Republican Senate Majority this November? If each one of Chuck's loyal supporters could do this, it would surely help grow our momentum to victory.

You can donate using this link **[HERE](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=fbd11841d10d4796b740363d7bb0c013&_e=jPoTkX_Pbv0kGQSKujWptoKHqqmYWT7JGZTk0gcc9GPYD49X9EJVZpUXly0YcPRyKODKYuDW6zSNnbxtyylTQw9Y0skZCOW9FLOgcRTLXfjCCJzUaocdo1z9wyuG7PQgjRJpzfDYDhhqn2-oj_r2yNlhs746NymqHs2J3XL7fUAuQTZ8Z0IL48qf2htNEeh0ZUghXDB0GwqVOxotO3_89EeHI9nxbI9xAdNp477rkIoVspd4zCM91sSfQwDtkq_6s9b-iDsxD8-B6CtSzA_XqGceY96quevd-HCXkLZmpic%3D)**.

Thank you for your support,

Barbara Grassley

| Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc.

I’ll get straight to the point — time is running out. At midnight, we face a crucial deadline to hit our April goal of $150,000, and we’re not there yet. _**[Your contribution now counts more than ever as these final hours tick away. Can I count on your help to close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84072084/470384362/209297649?refcode=ea.636b7cce-4d07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.636b7cce-4d07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzZiN2NjZS00ZDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5hK-1YVzAKVAtl_4Gjh_7Z1yXLlzCuxlqsxIaTavFzU=)**_ Marsha Blackburn has amassed $8 million from corporate PACs, special interest groups, and powerful political allies. She will outspend us. If we plan to compete with her massive war chest, we have to out-hustle and out-strategize her at every turn. But for us to outmaneuver Marsha, every piece must fall into place perfectly. We can't afford to scale back on any of our campaign strategies or miss a single fundraising target. This is why hitting our $150,000 goal tonight is critical to maintain our momentum and secure the resources we need to fight effectively. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: We can't afford to miss tonight's critical deadline. | I’ll get straight to the point — time is running out. At midnight, we face a crucial deadline to hit our April goal of $150,000, and we’re not there yet. = Marsha Blackburn has amassed $8 million from corporate PACs, special interest groups, and powerful political allies. She will outspend us. If we plan to compete with her massive war chest, we have to out-hustle and out-strategize her at every turn. But for us to outmaneuver Marsha, every piece must fall into place perfectly. We can't afford to scale back on any of our campaign strategies or miss a single fundraising target. This is why hitting our $150,000 goal tonight is critical to maintain our momentum and secure the resources we need to fight effectively. I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with us. Gloria = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

subject: Why your support is critical
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84072336/470385387/-731719488?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGViZDcxOC00ZTA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5TkMjnvXEWh9FoLPWIJ2ACtr4Np0dYS6NodXdscTnLc=)
Peter, I promise this is the last time I’ll reach out before tonight’s deadline.

I’m sure you’re receiving a lot of messages from campaigns like mine, so please let me explain why your support is so critical in the battle for CA-27:
* **We’ve already faced attacks from Garcia, the NRCC, and Fox News – the attacks will only increase the closer we get to Election Day.** Garcia has the full might of the national GOP behind him because they know if they lose this seat, Democrats could clinch the majority and do away with their far-right extremism.

* **This community deserves a real, ethical leader who will represent them in Congress – not a party puppet.** I’m committed to CA-27, having spent years here creating hundreds of jobs, and raising my family here.

* **We simply cannot let the GOP gain control for another two years.** With everything from abortion rights to our democracy on the line, we need to prepare for a tough battle to win this seat.

**[Are you with me? I’m counting on 250 more donations before our deadline expires at midnight to give us the tools to talk to the voters we need to flip this seat. name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: One final hour
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
With just a few hours left until our April fundraising deadline, we’re still a bit behind our goal.
#

We’re down to the wire now.
With just a few hours left until our April fundraising deadline, we’re still a bit behind our goal.
When we started out this morning we didn’t think we had a shot, but we’re within reach if we make one final push.
What’s going to get us there is a ton of people chipping in, so we’re going to try something different here.

$1 because thousands have already added their donation, and they’re counting on you to join them and help Ruben hit his goals and win.

name: Patty Murray (personal)
subject: FWD: did you miss this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Our democracy won't withstand another stint of GOP Senate control.
| | |
---
Hi, Peter – just making sure you saw my team's email from last night. I'm bumping it to the top of your inbox in case it got buried.
After all their obstruction and backward policies, it's safe to say my Republican colleagues have not done enough to earn back America's trust.

**So I'm fighting tooth and nail to make sure they don't take back the Senate majority this fall. **
Can I count on you to pitch in $5, $25 or _anything at all_ before tonight's end-of-month deadline? If so, here's a customized link just for you:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-email-2024-q2-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84073205/470390982/-1845622715?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk272-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjUwZTUzNS00ZjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3GWrCgj0nxHv6JyboCXDQYKRe3bY0frsKAMDGBxTaFU=)**
I can't do this without you, Peter. Thank you.

– Patty

Sent from Patty's iPhone

Date: Mon, Apr 29, 2024
Subject: Important Message (Please Read)
| |
---
| | **PLEASE READ THIS IMPORTANT MESSAGE
VIA TEAM MURRAY **
---
**Peter, we'll get straight to the point:**
---
**The _only_ way our razor-thin Senate majority will survive 2024 and keep making progress for working families is if Patty can count on grassroots supporters like you ahead of her critical $50,000 end-of-month goal.**
---
**[Will you pitch in $5, $25, or _anything_ you can spare right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84073206/470390983/-1845622715?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk272-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjUwZTUzNS00ZjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3GWrCgj0nxHv6JyboCXDQYKRe3bY0frsKAMDGBxTaFU=)**

---
Right now, Senate Democrats are defending two-thirds of the seats up for reelection, a number of which are in states Trump won by a _landslide_ in 2020.
The odds are stacked against us – **and to be completely frank, Peter, we aren't sure our democracy will be able to withstand another period of GOP Senate control.**
Last time around, they approved Donald Trump's extremist slate of nominees to the Supreme Court, directly leading to the downfall of Roe v. Wade _._
They willfully obstructed commonsense legislation meant to protect democracy, like the John Lewis Freedom to Vote Act.
They failed to hold Trump accountable in the wake of his violent attempted coup on January 6.
They've had countless opportunities to prove us wrong – **so this year, we can't give the GOP another chance to roll back the progress we've made since flipping the Senate blue.**
If everyone reading this gave $5 or more toward Senator Murray's April goal, it'd build our resources to help defend, and even _expand,_ our majority this fall.
But sadly, not everyone gives. That's why we need people like you,** ** who truly understand what's at stake in this election, to step up.
**Senator Murray is working day in and day out to help Democrats keep the Senate majority and their agenda of progress intact. But it won't make a difference if we miss vital deadlines like the one on Tuesday night.**

name: Team AOC
subject: AOC’s seat can’t be bought
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Since announcing his campaign, Alexandria’s ex-Wall Street opponent in the Democratic primary has appeared on Fox News _every week_ to drum up support.
Just yesterday, in a new interview, he said Alexandria ‘always had no support from the Republican side,’ and that her ‘radicalism is doomed to fail.’ But when the journalist asked him: **“Why run to represent a district that you do not live in? Don’t you live in Westchester?”** he didn’t have an answer.
**That’s because this Republican running on the Democratic line thinks he can buy his way into Congress.**
The primary is in less than 2 months. We need to mobilize progressive voters across Alexandria’s district so that she proves — by a HUGE margin — that **The Bronx and Queens are not for sale**.
[We can’t leave anything to chance. Will you make a $5 contribution today to help us reach voters and prove that the 1% can’t simply buy AOC’s seat in Congress? Every single dollar will help support our organizers and make sure we can reach voters all across The Bronx and Queens.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240430-2.nQJGkL&refcode=em20240430-6297-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6297%2E2526796%2EevxyHf)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240430-2.nQJGkL&refcode=em20240430-6297-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=6297%2E2526796%2EevxyHf)**
Alexandria isn’t a former investment banker self-financing her own campaign to preserve the status quo — **she’s a working-class fighter working in Congress to bring real, transformative change to each and every one of us**.
But together we can send Alexandria back to Congress for another term to keep fighting for social, economic, racial, and environmental justice for all.
Pa'lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240430-2?refcode=em20240430-6297-P_FND_EOM_GFM&t=21&refcode2=6297_2526796_evxyHf&akid=6297%2E2526796%2EevxyHf)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240430-6297-P_FND_EOM_GFM&t=22&akid=6297%2E2526796%2EevxyHf)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=6297%2E2526796%2EevxyHf) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=6297%2E2526796%2EevxyHf) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=6297%2E2526796%2EevxyHf)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=6297%2E2526796%2EevxyHf)

name: Brianna Brown and Michelle Tremillo
subject: Mobilizing voters
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=2IlajlGzjIQ4CiUjL%2BLpj7zcbQiiQW3YSFEQVat3diC%2F0%2BcXJw7KLNvIakWhIc%2FHNBqqoZ%2B87cP5PktElUrPOlzCrAQ40Zbr9FQa%2FVtDi0uG8ApUJdOMCiiGFKSPFucjmwz%2FZGnZvnfrYDLNXuiccmd0hoxp9nDnUqJAuROyH0KTEZViScOfXN%2BomXaHFu3PoPfzN6ZW27oXPpViZ4kqxxxliNb4oXJimzKapAPzN%2F%2FFBFIB3R%2BEuUjg%2F%2BzHvfO4DFZw%2BIHG6K4KpfFhOUWmfxB1Gdu9A%2By5VsY1CPJ9BSA15ggPzBSJsmx%2FvsXvEuwqvbFFwiRN5FZ6aDqwbTCslW1EHhbVjEX4aZKTRW3Wc%2FKMu9nbZauIOK1Lk7b806ykIxeAePhgUKNBZLNRjlSphfTk6EdyT22Ncu27pYD4Nqo%3D]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-apr24?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-apr24?amount=]Peter,It’s TOP PAC’s co-executive directors, Brianna Brown and Michelle Tremillo. We’re so proud of the support we’ve received so far this month from grassroots donors, but our work is far from over.

We have a $15,000 fundraising goal deadline that ends at midnight — in just a few hours — and our finance team just told us we are behind. We need to ensure we have ample resources to mobilize Black and Latino voters and help progressive leaders win in Texas, so we can continue building a state that works for EVERY Texan – no matter age, race, preferred language, or income level.

Can you chip in $ before midnight to help us reach our goal? We’re ready to elect progressive leaders and mobilize thousands of Texans to the polls on May 4th and in November. We hope you can join us by contributing today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-apr24?amount=]

Thank you,

Brianna Brown and Michelle Tremillo
Texas Organizing Project PAC

We’re so proud of the support we’ve received so far this month from grassroots donors, but our work is far from over. We have a $15,000 fundraising goal deadline that ends at midnight — in just a few hours — and our finance team just told us we are behind. We need to ensure we have ample resources to mobilize Black and Latino voters and help progressive leaders win in Texas, so we can continue building a state that works for EVERY Texan – no matter age, race, preferred language, or income level. Can you chip in $ before midnight to help us reach our goal? We’re ready to elect progressive leaders and mobilize thousands of Texans to the polls on May 4th and in November. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: This isn’t just about Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
We’re fighting like hell to create a future where everyone has a shot at success. |
#
---
Team, **[I’m going to ask you to donate to Fight Like Hell PAC in a moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84073937/470395130/-983049648?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240430_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTI1M2JmZWItNGYwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sO6cDmv7yZYfKpgnHha1qO5qBBYFPFRvV4mqG9BuaHA=)** I’m hoping you’ll give me a chance to explain why. We’ve spent a lot of time talking about Donald Trump. He continues to attack us, and in fact, he’ll be back in Michigan tomorrow, where I’m _sure_ he’ll attack us yet again. We must continue to call out his lies as much as we can. But I want to make clear that this movement is not _just_ about stopping Trump. It’s about fighting to create a future where our daughters and granddaughters have the same rights their mothers and grandmothers had. A future where everyone can breathe clean air and drink clean water. A future where no one has to choose between paying their electricity bill and paying for healthcare. **And a future where _everyone_ has a shot at success regardless of location or circumstance.** That’s what our movement stands for, and that’s precisely why Donald Trump sees us as a threat. **I don’t know how many more times we’re going to be attacked by Trump between now and Election Day, but I do know this:_he will not be able to stop us if we stand together._ [Will you donate before tonight's end-of-month deadline to show Donald Trump and everyone else that we will fight like hell to push our movement forward regardless of how many attacks they throw our way?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84073938/470395131/-983049648?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240430_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTI1M2JmZWItNGYwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sO6cDmv7yZYfKpgnHha1qO5qBBYFPFRvV4mqG9BuaHA=)** Let’s keep going. Thank you for all your support. — Gretchen
Fight Like Hell PAC
PO Box 15093
Lansing, MI 48901
United States ****[FIGHTLIKEHELLPAC.ORG](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84073939/470395132/-1026118285?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240430_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTI1M2JmZWItNGYwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sO6cDmv7yZYfKpgnHha1qO5qBBYFPFRvV4mqG9BuaHA=&emci=3083bde5-4f07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=1253bfeb-4f07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=1028753) ** | [info@fightlikehellpac.org](mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org)**|**[PRIVACY POLICY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84073940/470395133/-28805512?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240430_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTI1M2JmZWItNGYwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sO6cDmv7yZYfKpgnHha1qO5qBBYFPFRvV4mqG9BuaHA=&emci=3083bde5-4f07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=1253bfeb-4f07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=1028753) ** **** | **Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**

** This is your final notification **
Peter,

Our fight to flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat is hours away from our April fundraising deadline.

This month, we shook the D.C. establishment by tying up this race. **But the fight is far from over.**

Tammy Baldwin and Chuck Schumer are funneling millions to break the tie and salvage her re-election.

We’ll only be able to flip this seat by hitting every fundraising target. [**I’m counting on your support to hit my April fundraising objective by pitching in $10, $50, $100, or more ahead of tonight’s fundraising deadline.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c02b2aa117e7409bb566e5d889040034&_e=9dfgd7PaSdx0m90Q3HAhnPVdDUjBK_ifqjd2hNyvxUGeBpyDDSRumM9qbbw_DN3xC92H2lR2ksvy-en8ofCsu83nBmYG7DXb_b5iXu6FXivlOogaWEVJDtaAz2_eWf-lFKPEfuNrpvWHlXKaxePoQrDqcSJHiuhIsxgQUHnQlh-ao11jODyjIJ2jZ3XQGxzDqP6HF2zMgoA3nIStYdHTC9VLOA4RfgTMLPbrh-EX9NDcl4NlgirW3m30Yo0mNT3q5ylCzR519t0vhwhNHvC78n4q569WMM0UTfH7WeH0YAZr5kQcTkArtqX19SanH2mHU5kSqkpQM-Pcfg6aj_NjAOsn7iB3UfHzzor7S6tAtehIdZs9p3aWUJZWjonOKPTPMTt0QPFypKXoKztbh65l9pFUFcSLjIwwxR4FAJdVMOo%3D)

| **MEET ERIC**

Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others.

When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children.

clean_body: Our fight to flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat is hours away from our April fundraising deadline. | This is your final notification Peter, Our fight to flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat is hours away from our April fundraising deadline. This month, we shook the D.C. establishment by tying up this race. But the fight is far from over. Tammy Baldwin and Chuck Schumer are funneling millions to break the tie and salvage her re-election. We’ll only be able to flip this seat by hitting every fundraising target. Sincerely, Eric Hovde Republican for U.S. Senate | | MEET ERIC Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others. When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin

| | Peter, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=799183bfc15c4a9b82fbc2b327c1d60c&_e=6mwM3-D_YsEqj8OOSqmMI9QgfX3xnnc8QZT_xXh6HZ-s5iSEu9D-6UvkKTVCJPpYJNS9d2No13Jf-56CiZQjCStuqO_FGFTHlctTHfLbs4rN-a9CwtuDXAwPBeyPBqOzl9Y7_UrGTEkhnWRfAa06nZi1oMyxsFSS5wmo5hcVng19a35NqktAgFXGiR2OUUukDRK77Z3juTWIT-58JAVqMtZg9gr6WeGPpsl48LigvSjUD9rP2IoVMx9c7Ye0LHLpTBjlEOEVe48YBxDsh7pBf2GRoi9ILlgCbWJQbf3KqW7vHKQ2Ux5E6XPSAAcDwJiSM0E-GlS3PKNE7c7pOmm3ux8qZ1eQCOFo0HIx2ZcNbzLas89IGmxtXuZeq2CpL_C__4IeOQh6b0E7KtS5b5DHeRC2GtY-N2xk3J4uYI8yBNHjYQ7k3gBZyzCaunAiFXanFW4JQJnARTySq7eqzTbwfS1FK6fmCJePd5Lt_e6ScF9E2s87GReVC2iVEhi0loPk)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they’d rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=799183bfc15c4a9b82fbc2b327c1d60c&_e=6mwM3-D_YsEqj8OOSqmMI9QgfX3xnnc8QZT_xXh6HZ-s5iSEu9D-6UvkKTVCJPpYJNS9d2No13Jf-56CiZQjCStuqO_FGFTHlctTHfLbs4rN-a9CwtuDXAwPBeyPBqOzl9Y7_UrGTEkhnWRfAa06nZi1oMyxsFSS5wmo5hcVng19a35NqktAgFXGiR2OUUukDRK77Z3juTWIT-58JAVqMtZg9gr6WeGPpsl48LigvSjUD9rP2IoVMx9c7Ye0LHLpTBjlEOEVe48YBxDsh7pBf2GRoi9ILlgCbWJQbf3KqW7vHKQ2Ux5E6XPSAAcDwJiSM0E-GlS3PKNE7c7pOmm3u7rNH_8MLa7a-ObVnQlYfMNfHNAi27Swkd2WZeMBYK8JFFw76uv6MlGja3ps07imgDYOaaX3_rR2EegBPrIUbsvov_AhVV1vv1F3IJixCv5OUlFKjaO8tC1AAr__qzqzXq6IBgyFFwGG5ioIewNOw9YQz8-8f1oNsgf6vqU5RSGi) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There’s no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!

name: Ron Wyden
subject: The last line of defense?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
|
---
| | I wanted to make sure you saw my update from a few days ago. **Donald Trump is putting forth truly dangerous arguments about Presidential power. And the Supreme Court might let him get away with it.** The last line of defense for our democracy could well be Congress. That's why I'm fully committed to expanding our narrow Democratic Senate majority and making sure that candidates who will stand strong against authoritarian rhetoric prevail. [**Our efforts are in full swing, but we need to close this month strong so we can sustain our outreach for the weeks ahead. So can I count on you to donate $3 before our April deadline tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84074456/470403007/-2044921950?refcode=2024-04-30-eom&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=369067fd-5107-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjkwNjdmZC01MTA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mx7P25w6xJPDZv-9HF3z_gGTiDcYGkuNSaOkHAd2_Fg=) We're in this together, _Ron_ Forwarded Message | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84074457/470403008/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjkwNjdmZC01MTA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mx7P25w6xJPDZv-9HF3z_gGTiDcYGkuNSaOkHAd2_Fg=&emci=ff90589e-4407-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=369067fd-5107-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=9818364)
---
Yesterday, Donald Trump's legal team argued before the U.S. Supreme Court that he should have absolute immunity for blatantly illegal actions taken while he was President.
Just how far did they go? **They suggested that if Trump as President had ordered a military coup or ordered the assassination of a political rival, he could not be prosecuted**(because, by their logic, those would be "official" presidential acts)**.**
We knew Donald Trump thought he was above the law, but to hear his lawyers argue the case in such horrific and no uncertain terms really puts things into perspective. **With just over six months to go before Election Day, Trump is very much in a position to potentially return to the White House – and he would do so more empowered than ever to test the bounds of presidential authority.**
Trump's grip on the GOP has never been tighter, and it's downright alarming to realize that so many of my colleagues in Congress are fine with (or too afraid to speak out against) a leader who believes in zero accountability for the executive branch of government.
And whether he wins or loses in November, Trump's ideology isn't leaving our political discourse any time soon. A core pillar of the MAGA agenda is to chip away at the separation of powers within our democratic system. **And as a champion of civil liberties, individual freedoms, and transparency throughout my whole career, I will fight against the MAGA agenda every step of the way.**
[**If you're with me, please make a grassroots donation of $3 to help me organize and rally supporters to ensure that we prevail this year – and beyond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84074458/470403009/-2044921950?refcode=2024-04-30-eom&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=369067fd-5107-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjkwNjdmZC01MTA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mx7P25w6xJPDZv-9HF3z_gGTiDcYGkuNSaOkHAd2_Fg=)
[Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84074459/470403010/-2044921950?refcode=2024-04-30-eom&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=369067fd-5107-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjkwNjdmZC01MTA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mx7P25w6xJPDZv-9HF3z_gGTiDcYGkuNSaOkHAd2_Fg=)
By the skin of our teeth, we managed to contain the worst of Trump's authoritarian desires during his first presidency. But serious damage was done — and the door has been opened for the next Republican president to take us even further to the edge.
We need champions for democracy to win big this year. We need to be able to call out MAGA Republicans clearly and repeatedly, and we need to keep our grassroots movement engaged to push back on this radical extremism.
All the work we are doing today matters. So I'm asking you to stand with me.
[**Please chip in $3 — or whatever you can — now to join us in the fight for our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84074460/470403011/-2044921950?refcode=2024-04-30-eom&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=369067fd-5107-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjkwNjdmZC01MTA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mx7P25w6xJPDZv-9HF3z_gGTiDcYGkuNSaOkHAd2_Fg=)
More soon,
_Ron_

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The Sun's re-emergence is a gift...
body:
The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.
For a limited time, join for just 1¢.

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

Derek, I’ll be direct with you: We are a few hours away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re counting on 11 more supporters from Manassas to step up and help us reach our goal before midnight. I know you get a lot of emails asking for your support, but there’s really never been a more important time to join us in the fight, Derek. Democrats are defending 23 Senate seats this year. Control of the House could very well come down to a few key races. And as you read this, Trump and his MAGA allies are bombarding President Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot with negative ads. _We are counting on you to help fight back._ **So I’m asking: Will you make your first contribution to the DNC? clean_body: There’s really never been a more important time to join us in this fight. | | Derek, I’ll be direct with you: We are a few hours away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re counting on 11 more supporters from Manassas to step up and help us reach our goal before midnight. I know you get a lot of emails asking for your support, but there’s really never been a more important time to join us in the fight, Derek. Democrats are defending 23 Senate seats this year. Control of the House could very well come down to a few key races. And as you read this, Trump and his MAGA allies are bombarding President Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot with negative ads. We are counting on you to help fight back. So I’m asking: Will you make your first contribution to the DNC? We are tracking donations at this link: Thanks to this grassroots team, Democrats across the country have won tough races in red, blue, and purple states alike. Over the last year, we’ve had big wins in Alabama, Florida, New York, Ohio, Pennsylvania, Virginia, Kentucky, and more. Our momentum is not an accident -- it’s the result of this team showing up day in and day out, investing in state parties, voter protection, digital and TV advertising, and more. I firmly believe we are strong and getting stronger. But we can’t slow down now. With your help, I know we won’t. Thanks for everything, Sam Sam Cornale Executive Director Democratic National Committee Text JOIN to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . subject: is there anything I can say to convince you?

| _Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District.**_I hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Fight for Reform._**_
---
Hey y'all, it's Harry Dunn.

Is there anything I can say that would convince you to chip in $10 to my campaign?

**What if I told you** that I'm being outspent on TV ads by a MAGA-backed super PAC?

**What if I told you** that our democracy is literally on the line right now?

**What if I told you** that I'm running in a super competitive primary, and we're only **14** days away from the election?

**What if I told you** that I have my very last end-of-month deadline at midnight and I need to raise $425,000?
[**I really wouldn't ask unless it was important: Please, will you rush $10 to me and Fight for Reform to help me crush my goal before the end of the month and help Fight for Reform elect state and local Democrats?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42735?t=7&akid=21347%2E4449941%2ELOFrRn)

name: Kari Lake
subject: FWD: How Much!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
In just THREE MONTHS.

| Hey, Friend!

This will only take a few minutes so please, KEEP READING!

body:
this isn’t an easy thing to say...

|
---
Friend, we are closing the curtains...

...On our April fundraising deadline. If we do not hit our goal, we could have to make some serious changes that would limit the likelihood of us winning in November.
[**> > That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support. <<**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=85c1bcb1f0bb424b9f0a0d169d0939cf&_e=Pr4hW4MFdFh-YOtXovwqRQ1ngDBERCHMl6O2XEzLv8zHzS_7HX48wasE6EZ4M9QwAg8Ygfzqpth2PK7sC8gBLrtS_anG1oqBSNwRPdFHOERHg9EHQvlYEn03kjDbZJoKk_Di39MJNh8nLGYOt73d7SDQpfMTzwk7M4TOBBoYiWYAzS_WZHEzlxv7IdyGKize2ij-7iBE2HPK8C4wIeGPYiJyJecoPl7W6nraa2c5N3-1a0YCe7k3z-5wC8YwOfYfmVQjw5PjosEPtsNNh2E627Y2j5MoZCw8N48KwDH33ApYQfpvCIpY_ixNzfuMfMvCdAGJxXPacGHp4EYzssDylQ%3D%3D)
The truth is...this could be the last email you ever get from me. I want to be honest with you because far too many leaders in our country have lost the ability to do so.

Please keep reading until the end.

**The odds are stacked against us right now, but your support could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

[](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=85c1bcb1f0bb424b9f0a0d169d0939cf&_e=Pr4hW4MFdFh-YOtXovwqRQ1ngDBERCHMl6O2XEzLv8zHzS_7HX48wasE6EZ4M9QwAg8Ygfzqpth2PK7sC8gBLrtS_anG1oqBSNwRPdFHOERHg9EHQvlYEn03kjDbZJoKk_Di39MJNh8nLGYOt73d7SDQpfMTzwk7M4TOBBoYiWaSexYKdHB25zjAfDvUd5OwkNkq0J4WvxfrHB5SCwiDoiOMGOwWLOhuJE3JHfdqma7mqxFrhzpbd6WaogQvmFrk26u04HWprwbewzW2PNs2zo55TmnXAuc-pAmvImWve-BZ3u1Tv8GqUyMUs9hL7e8kgPdp8LO7tR0pnayTyG5HAg%3D%3D)
I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**We will bring a MAGA Majority to the US Senate so President Trump has the support and reinforcements necessary to put America FIRST.**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=85c1bcb1f0bb424b9f0a0d169d0939cf&_e=Pr4hW4MFdFh-YOtXovwqRQ1ngDBERCHMl6O2XEzLv8zHzS_7HX48wasE6EZ4M9QwAg8Ygfzqpth2PK7sC8gBLrtS_anG1oqBSNwRPdFHOERHg9EHQvlYEn03kjDbZJoKk_Di39MJNh8nLGYOt73d7SDQpfMTzwk7M4TOBBoYiWZxn_vB5QXj7wAut7vprJf-9XOiO9IuZWAnrW0eR0qLyJmty_uYOfyUlkiQq6M37HaxBnOwQwC-qjPX9yzKwNsmdEu-VOteKEYHFiIUbki8v3B1x--4HP9EAT33L4H8mJ_GohqQv6TRRlLG2tuCCPfn-1ox4h8JVZ7muKPrBoq90g%3D%3D)

With limited time remaining before our deadline, I had to reach out with a special request. I am not usually one to ask for help from anyone, but there is just no way we can reach our goal without you.

[**So, Patriot, will you chip in $15 or any amount to help me out this one time??**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=85c1bcb1f0bb424b9f0a0d169d0939cf&_e=Pr4hW4MFdFh-YOtXovwqRQ1ngDBERCHMl6O2XEzLv8zHzS_7HX48wasE6EZ4M9QwAg8Ygfzqpth2PK7sC8gBLrtS_anG1oqBSNwRPdFHOERHg9EHQvlYEn03kjDbZJoKjapDKf-5dHSznmT19yDPNtKjhUq-0bKEY2DKwE1ahiVx5xlFmkPyf4BBBDg6Pkvhzhjdy38fbXIVKcnoDQUAwRAV8Jg5SnwOu5sUZ6xzV9cODV4idbTDVvveWWfm0XoQJ-5rc3EyNQJDMbfGSi_8uXSS_hFoyoo23hfPulUXfd1Z9qdFKeE13vTLfO_z75-lQXmJaQOALwiv_BNWmE4dcA%3D%3D)

clean_body: this isn’t an easy thing to say... | Friend, we are closing the curtains... ...On our April fundraising deadline. If we do not hit our goal, we could have to make some serious changes that would limit the likelihood of us winning in November. The truth is...this could be the last email you ever get from me. I want to be honest with you because far too many leaders in our country have lost the ability to do so. Please keep reading until the end. The odds are stacked against us right now, but your support could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. With limited time remaining before our deadline, I had to reach out with a special request. I am not usually one to ask for help from anyone, but there is just no way we can reach our goal without you. | I won’t make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise to make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. Jim - Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
We still need to raise $3,374 ahead of our midnight deadline if we want to protect Pramila in Congress.

Peter, we don’t want to alarm you.
Today is the final day of April — but we still need to raise $2,374 ahead of our midnight deadline if we want to protect Pramila at full capacity as we move closer to Election Day.
Our team has not seen a fundraising slowdown like this since last yea, Peter. Which is all the more frightening knowing that GOP megadonors at AIPAC have put Pramila on their target list – which could mean millions spent on nasty attack ads against our campaign.
We can’t afford to fall short of this goal. **We need your help.**
**With less than 12 hours left in the month — and until we close the books on our April fundraising —**[**can we count on you to chip in $5, $10, $25, $50 or whatever you're able to give to support, protect, and amplify Pramila’s leadership in Congress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240430-2.buqDr0&refcode=em20240430-3822&t=2&akid=3822%2E420207%2ESZ6wH5)

name: Laura (personal)
subject: a note from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| Hi friend,

Running for Congress has been one of the most rewarding experiences of my life. I love talking to voters, learning what they care about, and finding ways to improve the quality of life for them and all the residents of our district.

But the reality is, fundraising matters. If we want to fight for progressive values in Congress, we need resources to do it. And since this is a grassroots campaign run for the people, by the people, we need supporters like you to help us keep moving forward.

Our April fundraising deadline closes tonight. Anything you contribute right now helps us expand our reach and strengthen this campaign. Can you use the personalized link below to chip in $3 before midnight? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q2-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84075943/470419189/1636625507?refcode=em-4.30.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGNjOWNlNTQtNTYwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6_-CZDw9nXLXIVzdMr-cCHswFaFpaXSuNlgulclyIRs=)**

As you know, our campaign doesn’t accept corporate PAC money, because we are dedicated to representing the people of this district. And it may be hard to believe, but a lot of our funds come from emails like this one. That’s why your support today is so valuable. If you can, please consider sending in a donation before midnight to help us reach even more voters next month.

Here’s the link again to chip in: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q2-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84075944/470419190/1636625507?refcode=em-4.30.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGNjOWNlNTQtNTYwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6_-CZDw9nXLXIVzdMr-cCHswFaFpaXSuNlgulclyIRs=)**

Thank you,

clean_body: | Hi friend, Running for Congress has been one of the most rewarding experiences of my life. I love talking to voters, learning what they care about, and finding ways to improve the quality of life for them and all the residents of our district. But the reality is, fundraising matters. If we want to fight for progressive values in Congress, we need resources to do it. And since this is a grassroots campaign run for the people, by the people, we need supporters like you to help us keep moving forward. Our April fundraising deadline closes tonight. Anything you contribute right now helps us expand our reach and strengthen this campaign. Can you use the personalized link below to chip in $3 before midnight? = As you know, our campaign doesn’t accept corporate PAC money, because we are dedicated to representing the people of this district. And it may be hard to believe, but a lot of our funds come from emails like this one. That’s why your support today is so valuable. If you can, please consider sending in a donation before midnight to help us reach even more voters next month. Here’s the link again to chip in: = Thank you, Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

subject: Sorry for the late message

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
Derek, yesterday I officially kicked off my campaign with a rally in Richmond! It marked the start of the first leg of my Standing Up for Virginia tour — a week-long campaign swing across Virginia where I'm rallying voters and talking with folks about the stakes of this year’s elections.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
Richmond is home. It’s where Anne and I live, where we raised our three kids, and where I first began serving our great Commonwealth.
I’m running for re-election to continue advocating for Virginia in the Senate on issues ranging from the economy to women’s reproductive freedom to the future of our democracy.
If you’re ready to join me, please consider donating $20 or more to help me kick off the Standing Up for Virginia tour and put me on track for success this November — for our Commonwealth and our country. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
DONATE NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
Thank you,
Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2024]

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[] DONATE NOW >> [] Thank you, Tim Kaine [] CONTRIBUTE [] Paid for by Kaine for Virginia 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272 Williamsburg, VA 23185 Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. And as Lauren mentions below, your support helps Fair Fight reach voters in critical moments. [**Your contribution today helps protect the freedom to vote for future generations. You power this movement, and we need to let anti-voter extremists know that we’re still in this fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84076235/470422618/-423364722?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240430_f_eom5_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjY3YWQyZC01NzA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtU7G8lrlO_53tLwJqOmN9yFvKJvpkfkacdw6v5FvR4=) In solidarity, Fair Fight \- - - - Original Message - - - - Anti-voter extremists, in response to record turnout in 2020, are preparing for the 2024 elections and they’re pulling out all the stops. Between launching mass voter challenges, enacting legislation to suppress the freedom to vote, and targeting Black and brown voters, they’re showing no sign of stopping their attacks on our democracy. The message we need to send to these extremists is clear: Fair Fight is still here and we’re still in this fight. [**Can you chip in with a gift of $20 or any amount today to strengthen our movement to protect access to the ballot box?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84076236/470422619/-423364722?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240430_f_eom5_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjY3YWQyZC01NzA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtU7G8lrlO_53tLwJqOmN9yFvKJvpkfkacdw6v5FvR4=) It’s thanks to activists like you that Fair Fight is able to reach voters, share election information, and create voter protection programs. Your support powers our work every day, and we refuse to let our progress stop now. This is our final fundraising push for April, and we’re so close to hitting our goal — [**a gift from you can help reach it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84076237/470422620/-423364722?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240430_f_eom5_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjY3YWQyZC01NzA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtU7G8lrlO_53tLwJqOmN9yFvKJvpkfkacdw6v5FvR4=) | [GIVE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84076238/470422621/-92411516?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240430_f_eom5_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjY3YWQyZC01NzA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtU7G8lrlO_53tLwJqOmN9yFvKJvpkfkacdw6v5FvR4=)

As the late Georgia Congressman John Lewis said, “Democracy is not a state. It is an act.” And protecting it requires all of us doing our part. I know you’re still in this fight with us. [**Make a gift today before midnight to defend our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84076239/470422622/-423364722?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240430_f_eom5_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjY3YWQyZC01NzA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtU7G8lrlO_53tLwJqOmN9yFvKJvpkfkacdw6v5FvR4=)

clean_body: Help us hit our fundraising goal | | | = Like Stacey Abrams said in her previous email, America has a lot on the line as we get closer to November, and we need to ensure anyone who can vote is not denied their fundamental right. And as Lauren mentions below, your support helps Fair Fight reach voters in critical moments. = In solidarity, Fair Fight \- - - - Original Message - - - - Anti-voter extremists, in response to record turnout in 2020, are preparing for the 2024 elections and they’re pulling out all the stops. Between launching mass voter challenges, enacting legislation to suppress the freedom to vote, and targeting Black and brown voters, they’re showing no sign of stopping their attacks on our democracy. The message we need to send to these extremists is clear: Fair Fight is still here and we’re still in this fight. = It’s thanks to activists like you that Fair Fight is able to reach voters, share election information, and create voter protection programs. Your support powers our work every day, and we refuse to let our progress stop now. This is our final fundraising push for April, and we’re so close to hitting our goal — = | = As the late Georgia Congressman John Lewis said, “Democracy is not a state. It is an act.” And protecting it requires all of us doing our part. I know you’re still in this fight with us. = I’m so grateful for your commitment. Lauren Groh-Wargo Fair Fight CEO = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. If you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please click . If you would like to no longer receive emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT

| Earlier, I reached out to share some exciting news about our campaign, and I was deeply inspired by the incredible response. Hundreds of you—from every corner of our community—came together to support our new office opening. Friends, family, colleagues, and staunch allies in our cause, each of you stood tall when it mattered. [To everyone who has already contributed, thank you. Your support is not just a contribution; it's a testament to the strength and unity of our movement.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmMZbe7lNLlNxwrE1B3PQH0Ai6IZR9n36Xprn4iwOhh9j2A-PDo8a8At940YFrApcCfaUfnxtrnrGjWUv1iH1iJesvVFx0qfS6UVoz0T9b8J4ofSr_Vpn4IXibh2W5tBy79MU1I8HsSu04_UUgBCgYHDELNfu8kiSYlSwsvT2iSAfaq7HX1WHB5WcszzOL6hlIzFWn_taGUcetFt61_pW3GbCC7G7pwyb55T2_zSuBbPytRFEwtKmNsbCsy5lNvaA5SnCTRw2wBvzDwPRkfGJlVNO9hPQm-SgsymROyG-5oHM7FK4c-XPnJjDOiOGbhwwhyH02MDLuEvsQRJs20bw9yK0RvlAPise97fU6FLrs2t2vhXKRXD8zFLnYqNVIFf3Sk_eJ) Yet, our work is far from over. Tonight, we face another critical milestone, and I'm reaching out to ask for your support once more. If you haven't had a chance to contribute yet, your support now would be more timely than ever. We're gearing up to deploy groundbreaking relational organizing strategies that are essential to turning Tennessee blue. Your contribution can make this possible. [We're up against formidable conservative opposition—groups determined to silence our voices and hinder our progress. But I have every faith in our collective power. Together, we have overcome countless obstacles, and together, we will claim victory.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmMZbexnUFx0BuhKGHg5hz1q8hLgCF4oDS3NVSCfCbqvU9NrCu8KWFh7wbep3VYmW0jHpLsu9obutBTxPRiK4mtpRRPWzmYVf1VEScPJZMIkb9nhXgrZ0uy0F4cTfy6uV0F4Go28DLBHLx65eYkdJ2zkLWRN5N787Ly9E0hgtYG8WwS21EXOmkpnKKewUnncaISYcrkSR-JwOPmo5kz8rqXYEvDjOgHJBMis1LWQwBLuAe9PdymEsVqexRmQi75pwzaDAMMqT-AqIVd5wcQmxVkQPIP3pvibYTRIn5N9p9yPHvGjVFr1_ve_l6_P9kDbLc9Ezl7IJ3pEHRfxf2H1oY1Jh-uMIJ51i6pac1GL27gMWC0mX7KQA1q7a2LQYGlk5TbKFS) With each victory, rest assured that I will continue to fight fiercely for our shared values. For 25 years, I've been on the front lines advocating for justice, equity, and progress, and I'm not stopping now.
---
| |

| | [Donate](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmMZbe9VJij1BYcyLo7WVCZEIz1hZb7T4fzfUadoX1CewwB7Qkr1hpI27wdSmEPezVwTXZps6yMb94KK-gBLXFSsyfzALxuHNq7jnUwwcNFAnAlk-gMeWB1zimZ-8R9zE934Nn_3JmPYz8FDCiJD9x8LcldPvigPQOrpngSqMKKWxND_B04bKvlr0czQiBo2Tco_Fj0VbgydivziowMyj34NJmyoKs0VXXiDIDeGNx9fZlqO9fuJweX-lukjOJ6n0IxMk47LzqPU56S5vUu2pjpbKCvTYtbK4uEQiSes3Reuw6L-PxQS52cS83FC6fEruAC1ZSo25eE-989y1ZmbZaeHREjtokFxpxYzCxSbHkDSVw-2kXVshG_cN4DmQ080vMe6wo)

| Together, we aim to achieve monumental goals: a Green New Deal, Medicare For All, economic and social justice, and the robust funding of our public schools. These are not just campaign promises; they are commitments to you and to our future. Tonight, as we approach our new April 30 deadline, we find ourselves $10,590 short of our goal. This moment is pivotal. Your support now can create a surge that pushes us over the top. [Please consider making a donation—whether it's $27, $50, $100, or whatever you can spare. Every contribution brings us closer to our goals and strengthens our grassroots movement here in Tennessee and across the nation.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmMZbeaQ6-yjKaUgtgbGt2WUKWnbgnMXiXA-rAIvVtqmBRLMjP83ZhHxQN0znete-VifdGaCcOmu4xc9tpZns9Nm5JlVf1cTsOe1ARHGFQbyYLPZO3Wuk90wnMRGra6G9uCvuFOCFkElsrbEH5PD5VU-KmF-bzNTxoBJvLQ26r4eV_83ycmbJAFRoqBK-OVjsrjZzoEx3TdAkvDj91_51hlUCG4I7slsv87OVygKIkGlkK-9KXhs-WHmaDmifgbj-2ejvbklRzWyjMsmnehAbzBXYAUIyiwwAiK1gHOp42V9ssGJrtJoY3RdioNRZNU_UlCbsIzYWIIexDw3plrrcZEY72OCUWNuEkU3CUTmAq2RqlGgXKMAK79mKum9XmWGRDi8ks) Thank you for being a part of this journey. We can't do this without you. clean_body: Earlier, I reached out to share some exciting news about our campaign, and I was deeply... | | | | | | Stand Together for Progress and Justice in Tennessee= | Peter | Earlier, I reached out to share some exciting news about our campaign, and I was deeply inspired by the incredible response. Hundreds of you—from every corner of our community—came together to support our new office opening. Friends, family, colleagues, and staunch allies in our cause, each of you stood tall when it mattered. Yet, our work is far from over. Tonight, we face another critical milestone, and I'm reaching out to ask for your support once more. If you haven't had a chance to contribute yet, your support now would be more timely than ever. We're gearing up to deploy groundbreaking relational organizing strategies that are essential to turning Tennessee blue. Your contribution can make this possible. With each victory, rest assured that I will continue to fight fiercely for our shared values. For 25 years, I've been on the front lines advocating for justice, equity, and progress, and I'm not stopping now. | | | | | | | Together, we aim to achieve monumental goals: a Green New Deal, Medicare For All, economic and social justice, and the robust funding of our public schools. These are not just campaign promises; they are commitments to you and to our future. Tonight, as we approach our new April 30 deadline, we find ourselves $10,590 short of our goal. This moment is pivotal. Your support now can create a surge that pushes us over the top. Thank you for being a part of this journey. We can't do this without you. = Warmest regards, | | Marquita BradshawCandidate for United States Senate | | | | == | == | == | = | == | == | == | Paid for by Marquita Bradshaw for US Senate.Marquita Bradshaw for U S Senate | | 1498 Union #901 Memphis, TN 38104 , United States | | You can or all you want, but you'll always be in our heart.

name: Lucas
subject: my last note re: our $500,000 online goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Our deadline is just hours away. Can you please help?
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas and I’ll keep this quick.
**Our April end-of-month fundraising deadline is just hours away and we’re still running just short of our $500,000 online goal.[Can you rush a donation of any amount before midnight to help us hit it?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49438?refcode=em20240430-5407&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5407%2E614464%2EcI1uo7)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49439?refcode=em20240430-5407&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=5407%2E614464%2EcI1uo7) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49439?refcode=em20240430-5407&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=5407%2E614464%2EcI1uo7) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49439?refcode=em20240430-5407&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=5407%2E614464%2EcI1uo7) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49439?refcode=em20240430-5407&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=5407%2E614464%2EcI1uo7) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49439?refcode=em20240430-5407&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=5407%2E614464%2EcI1uo7) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49439?refcode=em20240430-5407&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=5407%2E614464%2EcI1uo7) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49438?refcode=em20240430-5407&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=5407%2E614464%2EcI1uo7)
---
When we stay on track with these monthly goals, our campaign has the ability to plan ahead for critical things like scaling up our campaign operation, opening field offices, putting ads on TV, and so much more.
**That’s why I’m counting on your support right now, Peter.** Whether you donate $10, $100, or even just $1 — your contribution is helping us build a winning grassroots campaign here in Missouri.
**[So please, can you help hit our goal of raising $500,000 online by rushing a donation of any amount before our midnight deadline? I don’t take a penny from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your support is the only way we’ll be able to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49438?refcode=em20240430-5407&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=5407%2E614464%2EcI1uo7)**

Lucas Kunce

subject: Still falling short.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We still need more support from fair maps champions
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84076490/470424760/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlZDgxMjIzLTU4MDctZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Ns9FDZEXhp0Z6el90RC9n2zCS7nDs_99JqRSqL-NjQ=&emci=20035da9-3207-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=4ed81223-5807-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=8431045)

We’ve been reaching out a lot regarding our April fundraising goal. That’s because hitting it is key to proving that we’re a strong, grassroots movement for fair maps. [**But the clock is ticking toward midnight — and we’re still falling short of our target. Check out our urgent request below and please rush a donation to the NDRC right away.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84076491/470424761/-803236760?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_aprfun_email_20240430-NDRC-Red-EOMLastChance_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240430-NDRC-Red-EOMLastChance_&utm_campaign=aprfun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlZDgxMjIzLTU4MDctZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Ns9FDZEXhp0Z6el90RC9n2zCS7nDs_99JqRSqL-NjQ=) We can’t let this be the first fundraising goal we miss in 2024! Thank you,
— The NDRC
* * *
Is there anything we can say to persuade you [**to donate $30 or any amount before our end-of-April fundraising deadline?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84076492/470424762/-803236760?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_aprfun_email_20240430-NDRC-Red-EOMLastChance_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240430-NDRC-Red-EOMLastChance_&utm_campaign=aprfun&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlZDgxMjIzLTU4MDctZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4Ns9FDZEXhp0Z6el90RC9n2zCS7nDs_99JqRSqL-NjQ=) We’ve been making our case as to why your investment in the NDRC is a worthwhile one — here’s a recap of what we’ve been saying this month:
* We’ve launched a comprehensive 10 Year Plan to win the fight for fair maps — and it’s already started with things like developing new mapping infrastructure and pushing reform efforts.
* We announced our Electoral Priority States for the 2024 election — laser-focused on important state legislatures, state supreme courts, and ballot initiatives that will have a major impact on redistricting.
* We’ve explained that our work is unique as the only national Democratic organization focused solely on fair maps — and that we need to continue making major plays that oftentimes go overlooked.
* We’ve been giving important updates on key states that have been involved in fair maps fights for elections happening _this year_ — like in Wisconsin, Louisiana, Alabama, Michigan, and other states.
* _And that’s just the start!!_

What if we also said your donation is a critical step towards building a truly representative democracy? What if we also said that everything is on the line this November, including the right to vote, the right to an abortion, and the basic principle of free and fair elections? What if we also said that we still need a push from this grassroots team to hit our fundraising goal for April and be on track to make urgent investments this year? **We don’t have anything else to say at this moment, other than we need you to be with us in this fight.** [**Our mission is critical. Our strategy is working. But our movement’s success depends on people like you. clean_body: We still need more support from fair maps champions | We’ve been reaching out a lot regarding our April fundraising goal. That’s because hitting it is key to proving that we’re a strong, grassroots movement for fair maps. = We can’t let this be the first fundraising goal we miss in 2024! Thank you, — The NDRC Is there anything we can say to persuade you = We’ve been making our case as to why your investment in the NDRC is a worthwhile one — here’s a recap of what we’ve been saying this month: We’ve launched a comprehensive 10 Year Plan to win the fight for fair maps — and it’s already started with things like developing new mapping infrastructure and pushing reform efforts. We announced our Electoral Priority States for the 2024 election — laser-focused on important state legislatures, state supreme courts, and ballot initiatives that will have a major impact on redistricting. We’ve explained that our work is unique as the only national Democratic organization focused solely on fair maps — and that we need to continue making major plays that oftentimes go overlooked. We’ve been giving important updates on key states that have been involved in fair maps fights for elections happening this year — like in Wisconsin, Louisiana, Alabama, Michigan, and other states. And that’s just the start!! What if we also said your donation is a critical step towards building a truly representative democracy? What if we also said that everything is on the line this November, including the right to vote, the right to an abortion, and the basic principle of free and fair elections? What if we also said that we still need a push from this grassroots team to hit our fundraising goal for April and be on track to make urgent investments this year? We don’t have anything else to say at this moment, other than we need you to be with us in this fight. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, — The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. I know it's late and your inbox is probably being flooded with emails, but this one is extra important, friend. ⬇️
I’m officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. And with political experts predicting that Nevada will likely decide Senate control again this November, I'm also the GOP’s top target for defeat.
**That's why dark money groups like the Koch network started pouring MILLIONS into this battleground seat to flip it red. Now, the _Cook Political Report_ has downgraded this race from "Lean Democrat" to a “Toss Up."**
**I cannot emphasize this enough:** Defeating the GOP in Nevada and protecting our Democratic Senate majority hinges on reaching important goals like tonight's $50,000 end-of-month goal.

But with our deadline just hours away, I'm still $1,705 short – and we can't close this gap without your help:
[**Please, friend, rush $5 or more before tonight's end-of-month deadline to help me keep both Nevada and the Senate blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84077032/470428253/2034486384?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3764-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDY2OWRkMi01OTA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CWji4z6rtLnaIru9ongRp0Byb365WA4ULk2um2GtpKA=)

body:
They’re saying the quiet part out loud, Peter,: In the Washington GOP’s own words, “We...oppose legislation which makes our nation more democratic in nature.”

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84077225/470429159/-743132135?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-04-30_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjQxNTNjODUtNWEwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XF9IRHsqpddWjMrdKkbgRV45bX5WrC-gN7MucJx1g0E=)
---
| Peter,

We all know I’m not one to pick partisan battles to divide people. Having been raised by a Republican Grandfather and a Democratic Father, I truly believe we have more in common than our differences. I understand that, above all else, public service is about the people, not the politics.

But, when our democracy is under threat by extremists right here in Washington, and even in the race for Washington’s 6th Congressional District, I can’t stay quiet.

In the last week, extremism took over when the Washington Republican state convention put forward a platform that is not reflective of my Grandfather’s Republican party or the democracy we all believe in and want. Take a look at their extreme platform–that they crafted–for yourself. Washington Republicans called to:
* **End early and mail-in voting** in favor of one-day-only, in-person paper ballots.
* **End the direct election of senators.** Instead, they want to wind the clock back to 1913, when senators were appointed by state legislatures.
* **End the use of the word democracy** for the word republic! YES–you read that right.

They’re saying the quiet part out loud, Peter,: **In the Washington GOP’s own words,**_“We...oppose legislation which makes our nation more democratic in nature.”_

We know this rhetoric does not represent all Republican voters. But this kind of extremism is tearing our communities apart, tearing our democracy down. It has to be opposed.

For the last eight years, I’ve worked across the state and the 6th district, meeting with and bringing people together, putting our differences aside, and getting real results on the ground for everyone. It is how I have always worked and how I will work in Congress.

I am running for Congress to bring our communities together and strengthen our democracy, address our climate crisis, restore prosperity, ensure housing, solve the fentanyl crisis and leave our children and grandchildren a better future than we inherited.

As we say in firefighting, “All Lands, All Hands, All together, we can solve any challenge.”

_[**Join me in fighting back extremism and working to bring people together for a better future for all. Help empower bridge builders over bridge burners. With so much on the line in November, we can’t take this race for granted. body:
We're on track to fall short...
| | |
---
Hi there, it's Emily, Kirsten's digital director. I'll get straight to the point here: **Kirsten is pacing dangerously behind her $100,000 end-of-month goal.**

**[_This is the final time I'll ask: Please, before midnight tonight, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare to help Kirsten hit this critical goal and defend her must-win seat?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84077171/470428859/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5005-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTJlY2M2MS01YTA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mWxtWn-K96n3MsR_zZsjD3JD8BhIJLCcktvcK-OdVFs=) **
Kirsten has been working around the clock to deliver results for families:
* She secured critical legislation to crack down on **gun trafficking** — and this bill is already getting dangerous weapons off our streets.

* She's fighting to finally certify the **Equal Rights Amendment** and pass guaranteed nationwide **paid family leave.**

* She's continuing to lead the fight to increase government transparency, ban members of Congress from trading stocks and **end corruption.**

* She's released a**Strategic Plan on Aging** to protect Social Security and Medicare while ensuring that seniors can retire with dignity and comfort.

* She celebrated historic wins in military justice reform while continuing her tireless advocacy for service members and veterans.

* And she's continuing to work night and day to **create more good-paying jobs, increase access to education and lower the cost of health care.**

With so many critical fights ahead of us, we need Kirsten's bold, relentless voice in the Senate. But the GOP is directly targeting her seat for defeat! We must show a strong base of grassroots support to make it clear to the GOP that it isn't up for grabs. _And right now, we're on track to fall short of Kirsten's end-of-month goal!_
