clean_body: We're on track to fall short... | | | Hi there, it's Emily, Kirsten's digital director. I'll get straight to the point here: Kirsten is pacing dangerously behind her $100,000 end-of-month goal. = Kirsten has been working around the clock to deliver results for families: She secured critical legislation to crack down on gun trafficking — and this bill is already getting dangerous weapons off our streets. She's fighting to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment and pass guaranteed nationwide paid family leave. She's continuing to lead the fight to increase government transparency, ban members of Congress from trading stocks and end corruption. She's released aStrategic Plan on Aging to protect Social Security and Medicare while ensuring that seniors can retire with dignity and comfort. She celebrated historic wins in military justice reform while continuing her tireless advocacy for service members and veterans. And she's continuing to work night and day to create more good-paying jobs, increase access to education and lower the cost of health care. With so many critical fights ahead of us, we need Kirsten's bold, relentless voice in the Senate. But the GOP is directly targeting her seat for defeat! We must show a strong base of grassroots support to make it clear to the GOP that it isn't up for grabs. And right now, we're on track to fall short of Kirsten's end-of-month goal! = | | = Thank you so much, Emily | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: Thank Hakeem Jeffries! >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
4 hours to secure your signature spot
| We’re coming to you urgently — because your signature spot on our Thank Hakeem Jeffries Card is about to _expire!_

You were one of 500 Democrats personally chosen to show your support, **so please don’t sit back when Jeffries needs to hear from you the most!**

[**Don’t miss your chance: Chip in $3 and sign the card by midnight tonight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66446?t=6&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66446?t=7&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd)
---
Thank you. We’ve attached the letter below for your reference!

_VPP Outreach Team_
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
**Leader Hakeem Jeffries Puts Unified Democrats in Strongest Position to Retake Majority**
Listen, Rep. Hakeem Jeffries has been an INCREDIBLE leader for Democrats while the MAGA mob has spent the entire year ripping itself to pieces.

**So we’re giving 500 top Democrats the opportunity to show Rep. Jeffries our appreciation for all his hard work!** [**We’re hand-delivering this card to his office at 8 AM tomorrow – so we need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66446?t=8&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66446?t=9&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd)
[**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66446?t=10&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

MAGA Republicans have done nothing but tear themselves apart since they seized control of Congress. **Even potentially ousting ANOTHER Speaker!**

While they’re busy waging a civil war, you’ve stood strong for the American people, our democracy, and President Biden’s amazing agenda.

**Your continued strength puts Democrats in the best position possible to take back the House in 2024 and end the MAGA circus for good.**

**We’re so grateful to have you leading the way!** [**That’s why today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help Democrats flip the 4 seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66446?t=11&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66446?t=12&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66446?t=13&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13995%2E878179%2Ehboihd)
---

We are quickly coming up against the month-end reporting deadline and still are a ways from where we need to be to stay on track. ## **Our Anti-Slacktivism Campaign**
---
As we find ourselves navigating through the twists and turns of another election cycle, it's easy to get lost in the sea of opinions and theories about what could possibly go wrong.
From voting machines to absentee ballots, from lawfare to NGOs, it’s hard to know where to place focus. But here's the truth: this is a 1,000 front war. Every cog in the machinery of our election process has a purpose, and every loophole or flaw can potentially impact the accuracy of the outcome.
So, what do we do about it? At True the Vote, we're advocating for what we like to call the "anti-slacktivism" approach. Sure, posting on social media can raise awareness, but when it comes to ensuring election integrity in 2024, that alone won't cut it.
Between now and Election Day, what can you realistically do to make a difference? Lots. There are concrete actions you can take now and for the next few months that will absolutely have a positive impact.
First, we have to start by rolling up our sleeves and getting involved in the process. Whether it's checking voter rolls using [Scan.Check.Protect.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6VDKmqL7dnq-Z_xN8QkhdZKgsxsq4umEAocVLBID6l-zNtT8Cdg3GPakOs5Hew5FuYwKbxgNdhoBvt_chMlwvSKCxEaOX0ckgpTb-r1rCfsZ5eOTo2j02Qxe371bqhzfqFJahYvN2fxebHQQxRu8d5Z0Ufcjj7kp3Bb1chpwFh508E4xwqutqA3cbvWKX7WSlVqS1VSrTJRq6FjG86yLl8c/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h2/h001.6kTLO1nxo7D0t3HkxDgCw89kpEBdLg_atPNzs82z1Os) or [IV3](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4tWjl3gtmveg-G43c4k1GuQQXTjKX2Y7oSRGpqrm2Woz1__OuVX-QKXN2i6bEku3E1CSeZkI8EDRjtiz0vS4RS1q07wlis4n3-1r7S9TnbsPi1dhXDkxlrCj1svcrTusyWChuHEjfTkthTVqhCBvbrMWp72tsM6dmcMsF4Riog7f/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h3/h001.2V_vzoDO0qwkQWqcV-bGP4jq8nBtlDzvs-sSTDJp7Rs), building your own[ local election integrity team](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6Uv_zI6ORG-2dl91JLqNhJNRmno19XjJNGTkt5hzpvq4DSjzJwQ6Jd47lFsIPOVXHrp2yaoK6vVPm1j_d9H9pBzRSwBHqzRtphZNyBLYx3CH0G2_DFChAoeqjJIrnS8RTMlTpV-2IZZYAgUFd_Vf-PjtrUvRGko_cSlw95dSM9oST8IqNs_0FFh3wgFXoTKRrDlMkhChb7ljeTo-z9VM8sd2IPn_jkfL7zQOR5M0Q1JJJgbC1KWGk1QOfKtrFtj8hw/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h4/h001.beizaPvhbMRBltdvK-AijM6daeoUguIsWBqGPC3e3SQ), [training](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6Uv_zI6ORG-2dl91JLqNhJNRmno19XjJNGTkt5hzpvq4xHseLPJ0JzsRNodohNpFi0VC_EoWm8CyYqlWBLyEz6CalXVVyK1ES8i-gfHfS7Pui4iPCVJ2B4jTMgWbOFee-B0tmVVQiBnoT5gYjMyfA_5ZcFfc5_OB6iPLgS2sgiQfxn6x1fLxJueVbxBQ5D7dvMfehSJyHEteKUmtawh0iyedD8B_HjXTl4suTpn-K7abxh3zWEb8McablruClJvmIA/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h5/h001.kBMwNvf3_zbqMJGRpL9RZShpr7VTsagdK6K4OOCwrtg) to be an election worker, [or developing resources](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6Uv_zI6ORG-2dl91JLqNhJNRmno19XjJNGTkt5hzpvq4kN99SSgkBhVKyJTIYRW5VvHlKR7COxayezAHBm2U1LuDJIUdmRfuRBR_DXy8UVIXvYd9xaLrURY8EJ59WsJ7Cs_k_d0-i4bz8qVQDoXnMrAyRkWsmMCL_SoyHlRx5iElEVwl5iDbLlSg_ui3o9cFzARTqnHO_eiX65vZ-WhPK4OAuLEO6_AFEFXMXCdYNqYNbHSpSOOa39iCE3ut7ak_yw9Saeper3L6g3yddUlngF7U18rPbPdC4HMT4y4xpN9P/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h6/h001.TncDmUaHwOaLEeveVRKqDd4dYUlPd6eVt0RrNXhiuVs) for those involved in various election roles, there's no shortage of ways to contribute.
You can volunteer for tasks like absentee ballot review boards, work at polling places, or participating in logic and accuracy testing. Every role, no matter how big or small, contributes to the smooth functioning of your local elections.
Additionally, we can [educate ourselves and others ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6S2lxyt4uyVTRPLjnamp8o5zaX-lfqh_peMpn14nJo9mfWsHSHBmkJznhBsaXVKETZDe0FSTzcbt4TbAZtuZPejjDKFqrIH02KgwApvUBSBJhNrlg1brrIPlWRfbUOfLdnl2G3_1xfM3bpsG9lsIwv3-C6j76AzGumPC2tujMXJX6WmirZ4W8Z2W2-mMp2rZCQ/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h7/h001.cCaFgFHaFGNM___JhEAxcTc8inwtWDmskmgZFlwNpOU)about the election process. Understanding how elections work and the potential vulnerabilities they face empowers us to advocate for meaningful change.
It's also essential to [engage with policymakers](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6Uv_zI6ORG-2dl91JLqNhJNRmno19XjJNGTkt5hzpvq4PXgUa-mVX3io3Ui-XmocDpl8jt6JlMF-zsLIA5SHywQC5ZmGDB9tUzrEVrz0TLBaPJ7-B5MX9CysFNMmfcdtIA-iJ9fircLW7eNX2R7af80Mah_a9OPKmndbg1bhcJccnwjPdOzKcnyBhiWpnxp47Dgg-54W92QVp0N3G_MK44o8iF5Uz8qz4g5zFFLTD4tilOZAb0af2_i9uWO_JPh7MigrM_uVBxhc93ZsPZvpVm8/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h8/h001.XeKGwMXB0KrdG01pprblg3Ha2ZzRcCaCztAa6DMe90U) and advocate for reforms that strengthen election integrity. Whether it's supporting legislation for more secure voting systems, or[ pushing for increased transparency in citizenship verification](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6XnSdcrSmzbZQfStcjy751i-Ux7pGZZnGS3_QkKO6_ELjC5yHL05Cxwb3cle8YQ6yKtVkcypgOA0jUcNT7veafcBt32r4VXADhckHug6UWEKhYIR7sg19nlnmZvzM5_hca6nyvw2qrZCR8lbCFmjN7SkqNHTtGdnrFaGqeXBRy4cwHoZOy3TNjSXxP2rdt1SNSY_A2E-BlxV-bo921jKhoU/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h9/h001.TzqHdEnorUoR2G01GPSQkKhF3uv6d_gycC_rBiObRWg), our voices matter. By actively participating in the legislative process, we can shape the future of our elections for the better.
So, as we navigate the remaining weeks of this election cycle, let's commit to more than just talk. Let's roll up our sleeves, get involved, and make our voices heard!

## **Join Us for** _**Lunch and Learns!**_
We're thrilled to announce an exciting new addition to our True the Vote lineup: a "Lunch and Learn" series with TTV President, Catherine Engelbrecht! 🎉
Starting this week, Catherine will be hosting live discussions every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday at 12:00 p.m. central time on our Onward Locals platform. These sessions will dive deep into "all things election integrity" and provide a fantastic opportunity for us to come together, learn, and engage on crucial topics that impact our nation.
**Here 's what you need to know:**
📅 **Schedule** : Each Monday, Wednesday, and Friday
🕛 **Time** : 12:00 p.m. Central Time
📍 **Where** : Catherine’s Onward platform on Locals
🗣️ **Host** : Catherine Engelbrecht
This is a chance for you to have your voice heard, ask all your most pressing questions, and gain valuable insights. Whether you're passionate about safeguarding our elections or simply curious to learn more, these sessions are for YOU!
Remember, while participation in the "Lunch and Learn" series is exclusive to our [Onward Locals platform members](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.flIQTCCIxNEqWg_ApxSzTossZ5Xb3HKShiqufGpW6Vb7SkiluvKaLCwFhbgMikr7C-Fa1_lWz4LvjaxeHaM1Q-n8QEWzU7CXOxhjxYcYUfSwdAS-ERZCxf7ZU2jwVN8MZVTHwAlFIs_rvu5IVhYCVSWsEnvaM-YeSHwBayeQhdwmtg7Kq6_IXRfmNyCP9GzXMemJKrhNkQF-z_mMvvRl1g/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h10/h001.yBnlPdcVo2Ii7FCwIrETpfw5pqUHoNcef85f5IGURXQ), signing up is easy and free! Once you're in, you'll have access to _Lunch and Learns_ , Catherine’s Monday night podcasts, as well as plenty of other exciting content!
So mark your calendars, set your alarms, and prepare to join us for an enriching discussion each week!
See you there!

## **The Federalist: Leftist Group Screams ‘Voter Suppression!’ After Colliding With Arkansas Election Law**
****_In an all-too-common refrain in the war on election integrity, a Democrat activist and former Arkansas state senator is screaming “voter suppression!” after her leftist group ran up against state election law._
_Now_[ Joyce Elliott](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6fWnRWOmg2n-8L160do_QuwxGTFmOT07coqRfEO4xXyeC1h33zXIn5yZMasS9giA2zxiOl7xl7v1ls7TMae3h5FY-WZj92YxWilXx0CSpWok3OGG2Ae-Onp1LoWnzC_MyfyTmhUOBny8gSiSrWMEcMceR4h9Arc9BD-N-bWhpErBaAqjy8LAnDyUff6xckpaTb7DXn2WcYBjpsCBKstfFgc/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h12/h001.JvqiFyUS2nbDp-c8h0Ssu6UZnCgPgMz1WrFiTn_z6fs) _has created a GoFundMe_[ page](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.UJcOIEsxQ3qr5lEWJDDC4gplC7Ht_WI1vbSOze09sw2y5oCWTGBE1p0OIg5kDejmygSWgtck8HSul_ISDbOT6v_gDIcQpwB3jhS-Ch1UPEf-F42wNtdR8KruWlDNaFMdmoZoShSJ8Rm1UQBdVoWPrhDnlO79Ja3_Qw0fzdcrtxd3YVFQX8xxGg0aqCo-KYczeE_TfpkdWiX5cub0kbQfp3rrF-AqOIgU-6mnErH_sDk/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h13/h001.r22kVAK5medOv-chdx9GodAlPmWPLD9jRTRNQ2dGDNY) _seeking $50,000 to “[take] a stand against restrictive voter registration rules that could disenfranchise thousands of Arkansans...”_
_... Ironically, the same leftist organization accusing the state of voter suppression could ultimately disenfranchise voters through its electronic registration application form._
_“A voter who is registered by an application that included an electronic signature that was created or duplicated through the use of a computer process and was delivered by the voter, mailed by the voter, or delivered on behalf of the voter by a third-party registration organization is not valid at the time of the original submission,” the order states. “An invalid registration cannot be cured by subsequently moving, unless the applicant completes a new voter registration application that includes a wet signature or wet mark or is submitted on behalf of the voter by an identified Registration Agency listed in Amendment 51.”_
_SBEC Director Chris Madison told The Federalist there was initially some confusion about the law by the secretary of state’s office, which reached out to Arkansas Attorney General Tim Griffin for clarification..._ [Read the full report here.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6dGsieRKj9joHpTZ2bgyqu3bG75ZrlxMi3lZ8b7M155Zq6h_fDnCTxLn5HfEU8nBGKUSIgCf5yFWgcBWUm1LbeJSu1fIXDv4kyyRc9-iQ36OUbKGyKxHpnjzThO4ok_63MHx7Z1QTofPd9Y2ZyhhLrdY8t4MFNThNRvUFoe8t2yb0VHP9SBgb_iHAUnVoR7G7S9PAYcFgwYfDdQngrLpCqFrwh72szcucBU_ev9yAVHEskn6WGfvwZMCwRlerKhTAmFuzaK7nBs-i93oy3e0uuXegBG2VfdpvwXtYu_udKzT0mjopwDpg62Z5Th6E2SyxQ/45z/PTwMzqJBTlCzCz1fdYVLiA/h14/h001.WzR40Rthy8hwDz1d0xPiifksUyTpv8RICU1XncRWGSg)
You can’t make this stuff up ....

clean_body: We’re all in this together! Stay strong! | | | April 30, 2024 | | | Our Anti-Slacktivism Campaign As we find ourselves navigating through the twists and turns of another election cycle, it's easy to get lost in the sea of opinions and theories about what could possibly go wrong. From voting machines to absentee ballots, from lawfare to NGOs, it’s hard to know where to place focus. But here's the truth: this is a 1,000 front war. Every cog in the machinery of our election process has a purpose, and every loophole or flaw can potentially impact the accuracy of the outcome. So, what do we do about it? At True the Vote, we're advocating for what we like to call the "anti-slacktivism" approach. Sure, posting on social media can raise awareness, but when it comes to ensuring election integrity in 2024, that alone won't cut it. Between now and Election Day, what can you realistically do to make a difference? Lots. There are concrete actions you can take now and for the next few months that will absolutely have a positive impact. First, we have to start by rolling up our sleeves and getting involved in the process. Whether it's checking voter rolls using or , building your own, to be an election worker, for those involved in various election roles, there's no shortage of ways to contribute. You can volunteer for tasks like absentee ballot review boards, work at polling places, or participating in logic and accuracy testing. Every role, no matter how big or small, contributes to the smooth functioning of your local elections. Additionally, we can the election process. Understanding how elections work and the potential vulnerabilities they face empowers us to advocate for meaningful change. It's also essential to and advocate for reforms that strengthen election integrity. Whether it's supporting legislation for more secure voting systems, or, our voices matter. By actively participating in the legislative process, we can shape the future of our elections for the better. So, as we navigate the remaining weeks of this election cycle, let's commit to more than just talk. Let's roll up our sleeves, get involved, and make our voices heard! | Join Us for Lunch and Learns! We're thrilled to announce an exciting new addition to our True the Vote lineup: a "Lunch and Learn" series with TTV President, Catherine Engelbrecht! 🎉 Starting this week, Catherine will be hosting live discussions every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday at 12:00 p.m. central time on our Onward Locals platform. These sessions will dive deep into "all things election integrity" and provide a fantastic opportunity for us to come together, learn, and engage on crucial topics that impact our nation. Here 's what you need to know: 📅 Schedule : Each Monday, Wednesday, and Friday 🕛 Time : 12:00 p.m. Central Time 📍 Where : Catherine’s Onward platform on Locals 🗣️ Host : Catherine Engelbrecht This is a chance for you to have your voice heard, ask all your most pressing questions, and gain valuable insights. Whether you're passionate about safeguarding our elections or simply curious to learn more, these sessions are for YOU! Remember, while participation in the "Lunch and Learn" series is exclusive to our , signing up is easy and free! Once you're in, you'll have access to Lunch and Learns , Catherine’s Monday night podcasts, as well as plenty of other exciting content! So mark your calendars, set your alarms, and prepare to join us for an enriching discussion each week! See you there! | | The Federalist: Leftist Group Screams ‘Voter Suppression!’ After Colliding With Arkansas Election Law **In an all-too-common refrain in the war on election integrity, a Democrat activist and former Arkansas state senator is screaming “voter suppression!” after her leftist group ran up against state election law. Now has created a GoFundMe seeking $50,000 to “[take] a stand against restrictive voter registration rules that could disenfranchise thousands of Arkansans...” ... Ironically, the same leftist organization accusing the state of voter suppression could ultimately disenfranchise voters through its electronic registration application form. “A voter who is registered by an application that included an electronic signature that was created or duplicated through the use of a computer process and was delivered by the voter, mailed by the voter, or delivered on behalf of the voter by a third-party registration organization is not valid at the time of the original submission,” the order states. “An invalid registration cannot be cured by subsequently moving, unless the applicant completes a new voter registration application that includes a wet signature or wet mark or is submitted on behalf of the voter by an identified Registration Agency listed in Amendment 51.” SBEC Director Chris Madison told The Federalist there was initially some confusion about the law by the secretary of state’s office, which reached out to Arkansas Attorney General Tim Griffin for clarification... You can’t make this stuff up .... | | Show your support!** | We’ll be back next week with more news and updates. Until then.... Ever onward- The True the Vote Team | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2024 True the Vote PO Box 3109 #19128 Houston, Texas 77253-3109, United States of America

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: interview request for Pro-Life Friend
body:
We’re conducting digital interviews with pro-lifers...
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

I need your opinion.

I know I’ve emailed you over the past few days about our **$200,000 Matching Challenge,** but it’s important that our supporters have a voice.

We’re conducting digital interviews with our most important supporters to get your thoughts and opinions on abortion in America as we finalize our election year plans!

Right now, _Students for Life Action_ is BUSY AS EVER, but we’re looking to step up our game even more.

**[So, will you please click HERE to access your digital interview right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gltlitk-duchtdja-y/)?**

It’s important I hear from 100% of _Students for Life Action’s_ supporters.

Pro-Life Friend, our student activists are pumped up and ready to fight.

They’re all-in whether that means knocking on doors until their knuckles bruise, calling and texting hundreds of pro-lifers encouraging them to vote, and even taking to social media where they will reach and convert thousands of pro-abortion youth.

**[Once you’re finished filling out your survey, will you take advantage of this $200,000 Matching Challenge by making a generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ to help fund our critical election programs](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gltlitk-duchtdja-j/)?**

Thank you for everything you continue to do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

| **_Students for Life Action_
DIGITAL INTERVIEW****

Status: **Incomplete**
Deadline: 05/02/24 **@11:59PM**
**Prepared for: Pro-Life Friend

[**Begin Digital Interview >>**](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gltlitk-duchtdja-i/)
---

name: CADEM HQ
subject: as of 10 minutes ago, we are short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Hi there. It might sound cliche, but tonight we are facing a major test.
It’s our *FIRST* End of Month fundraising deadline since public Federal Election Commission (FEC) filings revealed that Speaker Mike Johnson is funneling gobs of mega donor money to California swing seats.
Speaker Mike Johnson is writing big checks because he knows control of the U.S. House will come down to California .
Now, if pundits and election forecasters don’t see us raising the needed grassroots funds to counter Mike Johnson’s sacks of cash by tonight's midnight deadline, they are going to assume we don’t have the gas needed to flip critical tossup seats and take back the U.S. House .
Will you pitch in a donation now to ensure we take back our U.S. House Majority in November? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april24?&refcode=&amount=]Aren’t sure whether it makes sense to donate right now?
We get it.
But take a look at what Politico just wrote about competitive U.S. House races in California:
“Ultimately, money may be the biggest determining factor on whether California will deliver the House to the Democrats. The scrambled political landscape means it will be harder than the state’s unabashedly liberal tilt would suggest — but the opportunities are there, strategists say, if the party puts in the work.” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april24?&refcode=&amount=]
We wish we could snap our fingers and be able to win elections without funding. But we can’t.
And now, national media outlets like Politico are reporting that grassroots donations will determine whether we can flip swing seats in California and take back the U.S. House.
But as of ten minutes ago, we are short of what we need.
So, what do you say? Will you rush a donation before midnight tonight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-april24?&refcode=&amount=]Thank you,
- CADEM

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.
If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zWMh-KAhmUiJYxMzOxKADQ2]
We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, let us know here to sign up for fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/60txJAHUg0OznGGaWVwO_A2]

clean_body: I know I reached out to you not too long about this, but things have taken a turn for the worse. | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this | | It’s official, Peter: The Biden Administration is the “America LAST” Administration. We have an immigration crisis unfolding here at home, and instead of addressing the problem, Joe Biden is worrying about another country’s border. Instead of working to secure America’s southern border, Joe Biden signed a foreign aid bill that sends $60 BILLION to secure UKRAINE’S BORDER! The Ukraine foreign aid bill was a policy priority for the Democratic Party. It received more than TWICE the amount of support from House Democrats than it did from House Republicans. But, Peter, there were 101 Republicans who joined with all of the Democrats and did the unthinkable: they surrendered leverage without obtaining any border security provisions in return. And this was something they said was their position for MONTHS! We can’t continue down this path. We need Congress to step up and make H.R. 2 - the most robust border security package ever assembled that already passed the House - the law of the land. We’re counting on you, Peter. Thanks,Ryan | | | | | | | | Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. Donations are not tax deductible. name: Moms for Arizona
subject: Urgent: We Need Your Help to Restore Abortion Access in Arizona 🕛
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
As the final hours of our April FEC fundraising deadline approach at midnight tonight, I’m reaching out with an urgent update and a heartfelt plea for support.
Earlier this month, the Arizona Supreme Court upheld a near-total abortion ban from 1864 —a draconian law written in an era when women couldn’t vote and Arizona wasn’t even a state. The implications of this decision are severe, but together, we can fight back.
This week, we’ve been tirelessly working with pro-choice women and moms running for office across Arizona. These courageous leaders are determined to win their races and defend our rights, but they cannot do it without robust support.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4roevwade] Here’s where you come in:
Arizona’s legislature is just two seats away from flipping blue in both the House and the Senate, which would secure a pro-choice majority.
Every dollar we raise before midnight will be pivotal in reaching voters and ensuring that pro-choice candidates are victorious. We need today to be our biggest fundraising day yet. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4roevwade] Will you stand with us and donate to help restore abortion access in Arizona? Simona Grace

body:
Democrat Law Fare Tactics Used

https://kimgeorgeforarizona.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4eacbfaedc14c0ff5cb109fc9&id=54190c864e&e=98be86514c

** The Fight Isn’t Over
------------------------------------------------------------

** Backie Appeals Lower Court’s Ruling To The Arizona
------------------------------------------------------------

** Supreme Court
------------------------------------------------------------

April 29, 2024

Scottsdale, AZ

Last week my Republican opponent, Robert Backie, sued to kick me off the ballot. I WON. Now, he’s appealing to the Arizona Supreme Court.

This so-called Republican appears to have even teamed up with Democrat hatchet man Marc Elias, to kick me off the ballot.

I will not back down to bullies who want to take away the People’s choice of who represents them.

I need your help to stop this out of control leftist law fare.

Go to KimGeorgeForArizona.com to support my campaign and help me fight back!

Let’s get back to work for Congressional District 1 and for Arizona!

God Bless - Ditat Deus

Kim

Please forward this news release to all your friends and acquaintances.

** Campaign Signs Will Be
------------------------------------------------------------

** Purchased Soon
------------------------------------------------------------

We’re planning ahead for a win in court. Let us know if you want a campaign sign to display in your yard.

Email info@kimgeorgeforarizona.com

** Primary Vote—Tuesday, July 30th
------------------------------------------------------------

Mark your calendar now to vote in person! This race is too important to miss! If you’re going to be out-of-town, use the Secretary of State’s online portal to request a ballot-by-mail for the Primary and/or General Election.

** About Kim George
------------------------------------------------------------

Kim George is a retired FBI Special Agent with over two decades of experience in law enforcement and investigations. Now she is running to represent Arizona's First Congressional District to fight to protect our national security and ensure our law enforcement has what they need to enforce the law.

Voters can learn more about Kim’s campaign by clicking the button below.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: The Connection Between Faith and Freedom
body:
I want to remind you of some things we’ve seen (and lived through) in recent years—which we never thought we’d see in our country...

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9aknt3rlaet3sslvic9k8lfn2cagr4qq4spg8c0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31climeor6clh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2va7jd2clef9qo7i6p7p0jrlcfp1s6v81jfa5bg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31climeor6clh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zktcm99alrd67vpkl3bvdek32shun0nff583ohjg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31climeor6clh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
These questions are at the core of what it means to be human – both in our relationship with each other and with God.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs2b79cci0l24q1hdtm0j0qjct4v944ii0qdf1jo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31clim1pb1cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I’m reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like “ _Does God exist? Can we know God?_ ” with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human – both in our relationship with each other and with God.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv718o22v852360031lmur8528ocsvi3i6knmip8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31clim1pb1cph2bs) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, “Western Heritage – From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,”**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze2tosimriviqnec82srhsqj23f9kego18eh42u8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31clim1pb1cph2bs) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

By learning about our Western roots, we add meaning and purpose to our lives and enhance our relationships with others.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zftvcc2lq8eb16oje4o4qqo0ff3hpmqhmao4ofd0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31clim1pb1cph2bs)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

subject: Consider...
body:
I want to remind you of some things we’ve seen (and lived through) in recent years—which we never thought we’d see in our country...

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpm7cni467os5n6j2jbua9eoblopr4nfavm0baq8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31clim9ob6c3h2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk3puaesj4eoptgqmp0chk51f5i19gh5oo53f63o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31clim9ob6c3h2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7lghkamblf8noa483djdfof5kcj4kor7acegja8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31clim9ob6c3h2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

---
Friend,
---
This letter I’ve written to you comes entirely from the heart...
---
I knew full well the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history.
---
_But the fight for justice is always worth it.__
---
Now, I find myself in a battle for my own freedom and justice as Crooked Joe Biden’s accomplices seek to destroy me...
---
**Wall Street Journal: “Trump Advisers, Including Giuliani and Meadows, Indicted in Arizona”**
---
It wasn’t enough for the Biden Regime to have its FBI raid my home, wrongfully arrest me, take my mugshot, or push me to the point of bankruptcy... _**They have now indicted me before a Grand Jury**_
---
But despite all of these vicious attacks, despite the Fake News calling me “a dead man walking,” I’m still standing strong – _thanks to unbelievably kind souls like YOU who have given me the resources and support I need to stay free, and ensure that justice prevails for ALL Americans._
---
_Times are tough in Crooked Joe’s America, so if you can’t afford it, please take care of yourself. But, if you can, any contribution you can make will be greatly appreciated to fight this INDICTMENT._

name: Goldco
subject: Sean Hannity: How I Protect My Savings
disclaimer_text: paid for by your retirement savings
body:
Are you prepared for higher inflation, higher costs, and less money for yourself...

| | | “In times of uncertainty, we need to be vigilant about protecting what’s ours.
**That’s why I urge you ****to read this important message...** ” _—_ Sean Hannity
---
“In times of uncertainty, we need to be vigilant about protecting what’s ours.
**That’s why I urge you ****to read this important message...** ” _—_ Sean Hannity
---
|
---
| | Biden’s a predictable disaster. **Ask him to lead the country in a time of crisis...** Not a word. **Ask him about the 40 year high inflation...** Not a word. **Ask him why you’re paying more for gasoline... ** Why it cost a fortune to heat and cool your home...
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgnch8sa4phq0um03oi62p0na6q57r66pea71fgo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31clim9ob1clh2bs)
---
| | And why everything you buy at the store is more expensive... **NOT A WORD.** Instead, he’ll stand in front of a teleprompter and sell you on a repackaged “Build Back Broke” deal, **paid for by your retirement savings.** But wait! Biden says, **“under my plan, nobody earning less than $400,000 a year will pay an additional penny in new taxes.”** Yeah, is that right Joe? No new taxes? **Don’t believe it.** **He voted for a new 50% tax on Social Security** benefits in 1983... **He voted for 85% taxes on Social Security** benefits in 1994... **He voted for Estate Taxes** in 2000... **Now, he wants to raise over $3.3 TRILLION in NEW taxes. ** Who do you think will pay for that? **Are you prepared for higher inflation, higher costs, and less money for yourself...** Or do you want to PROTECT YOUR HARD EARNED MONEY before it’s too late? If you have $50,000 or more in retirement savings... name: The Babylon Bee
subject: A Special Message from Babylon Bee CEO Seth Dillon
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWl-Qp0iN-

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWl-Qp0iN-

Friends,

Not long
ago, Elon Musk bought Twitter, changed his bio to Chief Twit, and
sent me a DM that said: "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored?
There will be no censorship of humor."

We've
been trying to think of a joke worth $44 billion ever since.

But as
resourceful and committed to free speech as he is, Musk is still
just one man, and X is just one platform. Censorship remains the
law of the land on virtually every other social media site run by
Big Tech. X is a welcome but rare exception. Just a couple of
months ago, I was notified that the conservative David Horowitz
Freedom Center was permanently suspended by Vimeo for posting a
talk I'd given about censorship. Just think about the irony of
that for a second. As if they wanted to make my point for me more
emphatically than I ever could, they censored my talk about
censorship.

It's
clear to us that what the censors want is submission. They want
unquestioning conformity. They want us to give up and start
fighting. Stop telling jokes. Stop telling the truth. They want
to raise the cost of speaking freely so high that we'd rather
just keep our mouths shut to avoid all the hassle and penalties.
They're asking us if we're willing to silence ourselves just to
make things easier.

Our
answer to that is NO. The truth is worth it. Free speech is worth
more than whatever they can take from us.

Of
course, that's easier said than done. Standing against the
censorious Left takes resources. I can tell you right now, The
Babylon Bee would not have been able to take the stand that we
did against Twitter if it hadn't been for the support of our
subscribers.

That's
our safety net. That's what gives us the confidence to fight back
against big tech without being afraid of them putting us out of
business. They can hurt us. Sure, they can reduce our reach and
smear us in the media, but they can't shut us down. We have our
supporters to thank for that. I hope you'll consider joining the
fight by becoming a paid subscriber to the Babylon Bee.

But don't
just support us. Support defenders of freedom wherever you find
them. Subscribe to X Premium to support Elon. Ditch Disney and
subscribe to the Daily Wire. Back anyone bold enough to say
what's true, even if it comes at a cost. Especially if it comes
at a cost. They'll be that much more fearless and that much
harder to stop if they have a whole army of freedom-loving
subscribers at their backs.

YES,
I'LL STAND WITH THE BEE

Thanks
for standing with us. We will continue to stand with you.

Sincerely,
Seth
Dillon
CEO, The
Babylon Bee

Copyright
© 2024 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved.
Our
mailing address is:
The
Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box
546
Jupiter,
FL 33468

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Reaching out to you personally about reproductive freedom in Florida
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a9e3159-f39f-42b3-88b6-1fbcc0707482/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | Peter, This is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, and I’m the Democrat running to defeat Rick Scott, serve Floridians as our next U.S. Senator, and defend our Democratic majority. **I’m reaching out to update you on the fight for abortion rights here in Florida — because, perhaps more than anywhere else in the country, the stakes here for reproductive freedom couldn’t be higher.** As I write to you, Ron DeSantis’ six-week abortion ban is going into effect. This ban will create life or death situations for millions of Floridians. Because politicians like DeSantis and my opponent, Rick Scott, are so intent on stripping Floridians of their freedoms, families right now could be subject to untold pain. **But there is hope, Peter**. The Florida Supreme Court has ruled _in favor_ of a ballot initiative to let the people — and not extremist politicians like DeSantis and Scott — decide the future of reproductive rights in Florida this November. If this ballot initiative succeeds, abortion rights will be enshrined into our state constitution, making DeSantis’ abortion ban null and void. Here’s the truth, Peter. Despite what the political pundits would have you believe, Florida is NOT a red state. Polling currently shows me NECK AND NECK with Rick Scott and analysts at _The New York Times_ have called him one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country. But Scott spent $64 million of his own fortune to buy Florida’s Senate seat last time around, only winning by 0.12%. [**I know we can defeat him, but it will take your grassroots support, which is why I’m asking: Will you split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action to help me protect abortion rights, defeat Rick Scott, and save our Senate majority?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9b64f20-8c88-4143-b064-7b52e478c98c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Debbie

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52f99676-2994-4fb5-aa89-63b76a5ddfbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

I’m reaching out to update you on the fight for abortion rights here in Florida — because, perhaps more than anywhere else in the country, the stakes here for reproductive freedom couldn’t be higher. As I write to you, Ron DeSantis’ six-week abortion ban is going into effect. This ban will create life or death situations for millions of Floridians. Because politicians like DeSantis and my opponent, Rick Scott, are so intent on stripping Floridians of their freedoms, families right now could be subject to untold pain. But there is hope, Peter. The Florida Supreme Court has ruled in favor of a ballot initiative to let the people — and not extremist politicians like DeSantis and Scott — decide the future of reproductive rights in Florida this November. If this ballot initiative succeeds, abortion rights will be enshrined into our state constitution, making DeSantis’ abortion ban null and void. Here’s the truth, Peter. Despite what the political pundits would have you believe, Florida is NOT a red state. Polling currently shows me NECK AND NECK with Rick Scott and analysts at The New York Times have called him one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country. But Scott spent $64 million of his own fortune to buy Florida’s Senate seat last time around, only winning by 0.12%. name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Urgent: Help Protect Our Social Security
body:
Peter, As we face critical decisions in Congress, protecting Social Security remains one of my top priorities.

This program is more than just a benefit; it's a promise to you, ensuring financial security for our seniors after a lifetime of hard work.

Help me fight. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Urgent+Help+Protect+Our+Social+Security]

DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Urgent+Help+Protect+Our+Social+Security] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=Urgent+Help+Protect+Our+Social+Security]

I understand the importance of safeguarding the well-being of every citizen, especially our seniors who rely on these essential benefits.

We cannot allow short-sighted policies to undermine Social Security.

As the end of the month approaches, we urgently need your support to meet our campaign funding goals.

Chip in $10, $25, $50, or ANY AMOUNT to support our efforts to advocate for robust policies that preserve and protect Social Security from those who wish to dismantle it. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Urgent+Help+Protect+Our+Social+Security]

Your immediate support is crucial. Together, we can ensure that Social Security remains robust and reliable for current and future generations. Let's stand united in protecting this vital program.

I appreciate your dedication to this vital cause.

Thanks,

Anthony

subject: How important is religious liberty to you?
body:
I want to remind you of some things we’ve seen (and lived through) in recent years—which we never thought we’d see in our country...

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/bGILKxcycMtrP1VKnw97Jw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoFJt-P0SxaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwNTAxVwNzcGNCCmYnhAEyZunqC7xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/bGILKxcycMtrP1VKnw97Jw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoFJt-P0SxaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwNTAxVwNzcGNCCmYnhAEyZunqC7xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/bGILKxcycMtrP1VKnw97Jw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoFJt-P0SxaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwNTAxVwNzcGNCCmYnhAEyZunqC7xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Restore Our Nation

name: The Flyover
subject: Anti-Israel Protests Heat Up, Economic Confidence Cools, and a Rare Lego Washes Up
body:
Anti-Israel protests continued on university campuses across the country Tuesday, leading to a building takeover, numerous arrests, class cancellations, and threats of expulsions.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1PwzAQQH-NszXynT87eEBC2crKaLn2OT3kxFVqFfHvEbAyPr3h6b1f4iVx4319SxuFUXtMefCTojnBCXXUUwmVCElNFMCBNtY6p6ZbKAZ99cnCNVPSyclqMeVzzVklIF8mDihRSyNBemNBzkVeC2jj0tkAoEKhJRUe_Zg_Ou_jRrV99Scdc-7b1MJtjPtDqBeBi8BlpTHznvu688xd4JJqjVmopddKR-Qi1CuAAYH2x_yx9wjTEcr9k1vjh3VCy3VL3H4T47_f7wAAAP__y1JUYA) | |
# WEDNESDAY, MAY 1, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this date in 1840, Britain issued the first postage stamp in history, the "Penny Black." It bore the image of Queen Victoria and was an immediate hit, with 70 million letters sent over the next year. ([See Stamp](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuOrDAQBb_GZEZ-wjhwcBOyuemGqIE2eGUwsnsGzd-v2HjDo1NBqb6e4xNiisf6H3b0FPIIM8U3jpZLrsxomsUHRIW6QS97aWzX9b1uNv_ow6TcFJx5LHoCYUHPEp11AjQ4xCZ6JZQRVkjxsJ0U7SKmRRrbg7NSKq2YEbhEyqX9zvGgDUP65DeWds57k_xGdFam_zE1MDVc19XWPdJW8xHh2GG9MaYGKFT5_Er0KsjUQBvySrl8eA78HiGWSvzMlWC9L9hPLo3T0nWSqaEpfjmvmFKsXc-MWHeI6deA_srxEwAA__-je2GJ)) It's finally May. A lot of good things happen in May: Mother's Day, the Indianapolis 500, and the Kentucky Derby. But did you know [May](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAQQL_G3kD22cZh8NCFLV07ogPO4SobR-AEpV9fNXPXp6cnva_reEVOvN0-MVOosYw4V37S6BrdgB2tXEIkAjKSgvbauq7z3sg1QDdDnGMPFzWRcwbReKMc9CbqiXorOYACq5zS6uI6rdpFTYu2zmPvtAYDwipauJa9_S681ZViepUn7e1cskxhrfV-CPMhYBAwnOfZYsYf3m4R53qsJdOfKGCIj615swan8qhNxpeAQe5huZ-cEh-dF1bdMnJ6p-t_n78BAAD__yX1U7Q) is considered the luckiest month for weddings? Nearly twenty years after his own May wedding, one member of _The Flyover_ team still thinks it's true. ## Anti-Israel Protests Intensify
Anti-Israel [protests continued on university campuses](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuxCAQBb8Gd1iAwfgKijTuLm1Ka88s542wsVh0Vv4-utTpnvSamfm6L3egTMfzE3YMLZUF1kYvXJzU0tjFdjEkRINDh0F7bd04ej90W4Co1nE1k3tEm5wDMw3-ZiF6NUWdrO8oGGWsckqryY1a9VE9orbOw81pbQYjrMJIrdT-u9DRNkz5p7yw9mvZuxy21k4Ww4cwszDzdV39-uADL37_wszvKcx81iJPyMiNDoJDnrU05MaSz4oQ5V4qyg2hYZS8bqVklhXfluVgGSklrJK4Ama5wQ4sL6jCzF0N8bwoZ-LRC6ueO1D-Q2v_dfoNAAD__wOdbFU) across the country Tuesday, leading to a building takeover, numerous arrests, class cancellations, and threats of expulsions. Police began arresting protestors in Chapel Hill yesterday at [the University of North Carolina](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2unDAQhZ_GdINsYzBbUKShu2lTosEewImxkT276Obpo42S7nbnR6c434-P5QNDDGn_jidNvOUFHYcXLT0o0GYxjZ82Ik1dQ5OyyvTDYG3XHNNqyK5krfajVR09BmvX1Q-4DXq046NvwqSlNrKXSo79oGTr5eqV6S0-eqV0p4WR5APn0v7MIfFBW_zMLyqty2cTp4P5qqL7JvQs9Hzfd-vWquy7FXpOdFeh55gdRvhncsG0E7j8TPz5P7xKZqqcSwXcMaTKEGpBirDjb4QbC2ApVJk8PFN4Uanhvc6FD3BYcgwJ4crxF1wRHb1lcAQuEhbITwZKDs_rpMRCz02Z_HWHGEMdrDByPzHEv4_4K7x_AgAA__9Ls4Bv). Altercations were reported as several protestors were placed in handcuffs and at least one carried out by their arms and legs. Protestors at Columbia took over a university building and barricaded it. Several windows were broken, and banners with pro-Palestinian messages were displayed. University officials announced they would begin to expel protesting students. [The Biden administration](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL9u8zAQw59G3mSc_lmfBw3foi1dOxrX6JKoUCxDusRIn75w5i7k8gNJ8PO0nDCXvF4_8E6BL3XBM-cnLU4qqe1ihxQuRJrMQEF5Zd00eW-GW0iTm_1kDBo6mzl5Q4bAAYJFZZW1Qw4atAUHCv65ScGY4Csp6zzOTilttLBAKXNt43fNK9_oUl71SW081_tQwo1568L8FzoKHfd9Hx8duSZ8HYDQsXNtL6HjSns_DDnXVeh41Aod4RADb_CRaGW5tcrUucvcG1KRV_xBuWOTJT9JPraETEeSNw5m5w2AFzoOLaRtz6XkPnlh4XrHXN4b-a_DfgMAAP__FtRpHA) said they were monitoring the spreading unrest. "That is not an example of peaceful protests," a spokesman said.
## Polls: Confidence in Economy Falling
New polls conducted by Gallup and the Conference Board indicate that Americans are losing confidence in the economy. Gallup's latest Economic Confidence Index showed consumer faith in the economy fell by nine points between March and April, the first decline in seven months. [See Gallup results and charts here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu7CAQQNGvwR0WYAbsguI17va1KS0WxuuJxsYyZDf5-yipU9_iSuftttwiMR2P_3HH0NayxNToiQtILY1dbJfDimhw6DBory045_3QbQHHmH2ChMpOYO_T5EB5UCPA6LLzqqNglLEKlFYjOK36rO5ZW_BxAq3NYIRVmKmVq38vdLQNV_4qT7z6VPaOw9baWcXwT5hZmPnAV-0fkfnj_OnCzGdhFmZ21oKfhJkxlaPslGQqx0oZj4RyjcxVrnTVJhvtKEtq5Y5XH-v52V0hny9ipuq8sOqxR-LfeftL4jsAAP__ZdRezA) Similar research by the [Conference Board](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L-O8yAQBPCnsTtH_FnAKSi-Jl2-9koLL0uyJwwW5hLl7U9Jfd1vNM1ovq7LNXDmcvsfNvI91SVg5wctZpKTggXG6BORIj2Sl06CsdY5Pd59mENSqC2gPqeYDBlEOmtNQmFycxrZK6FAGCHFbKwUpyjWKMG4cDZSKq0GEBS513b6rlz6nVJ-1Qe1E9ZtzP7e-34M-t-gLoO6hL3Q83hX79A6Y6ZBXbCW42ejNmEtiSMVpA-pfbjW0OJEWEvdXtOxU4lcbpMFRGnBBFgFCZfWBGCTdRrdGhTOY_Nxf3LOfFg3gLhtgfNnVv_ro98AAAD__zTUaJc) found that expectations for income, business, and the job market fell to their lowest levels since July 2022, partly due to concerns about high prices for food and gas.
## DEA to Reclassify Cannabis
The federal government plans to [reclassify marijuana as a less dangerous drug](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGTgyAQRn8NdjiwIsbC4hq7XHuls-KSbAbBAS5O_v1NUl_1Fd8r3ryf63JFDhxv37jTVH1a0FV-0tJLLcEsptkmTwTUNTTpQZve2mHomvtk1Wj96pRT4N1l9VaZ0Q9rZxHUcBmh4QkUGNUrrS691ard1Lpp0w849lpDB8Io2rim3D4Sx3onH17pSbl1aW_CdK_1KKL7EjALmM_zbOPqIp3l_QuYjxS4sisC5kciufJGUcD8WYnbzpFLzVg5RXkEjEVmcgFLYf-SO2Z-_GJESVg43mSmUjO7N11kRJldRG1GA6bJ03acHAIXOwijbjty-DjW_4L9BQAA__-CXG7d) for the first time since the Controlled Substances Act was passed more than 50 years ago. Sources say the Drug Enforcement Administration is expected to approve shifting cannabis from the most strict Schedule 1, which includes drugs such as heroin, and instead move it to Schedule III, which would recognize medical uses for marijuana. The shift would allow researchers to study marijuana's effects with far fewer restrictions. Schedule III drugs are still regulated, and the move [wouldn't legalize marijuana](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8Gb7YAY3AGhi7e0rWj9QyP-EUYIiBx-_dVOne9W073dV2vQJHS7RMOtC3kFVyjF65TL3qpVtV5GxAljh1aYYSatDZm7Ha7odbqAhsGFM5zmF0QM2ghZjmq2ZiOrORS8YkLPk9a8MHzzQs1GbhMQshRMsXRU8tluGdKbccQf_ILy-Dy0UW7t_aobPxgcmFyOc9zcFtNeNa3Z3Jp-A2VyeWNmFwOKHR_QoK-oItQKwVC3_vyvPWYQi4OD0ytB39QotoKNMqprzuFxuTSFesfJ8VIVRum-O0Ain8l7b8tvwEAAP__-X1mGg) for recreational use.

clean_body: Anti-Israel protests continued on university campuses across the country Tuesday, leading to a building takeover, numerous arrests, class cancellations, and threats of expulsions. | | | | | | WEDNESDAY, MAY 1, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1840, Britain issued the first postage stamp in history, the "Penny Black." It bore the image of Queen Victoria and was an immediate hit, with 70 million letters sent over the next year. () It's finally May. A lot of good things happen in May: Mother's Day, the Indianapolis 500, and the Kentucky Derby. But did you know is considered the luckiest month for weddings? Nearly twenty years after his own May wedding, one member of The Flyover team still thinks it's true. If you haven't subscribed to The Flyover yet, you can do that here . Today's edition is brought to you by , the best in personal information protection. Check them out below. | Anti-Israel Protests Intensify Anti-Israel across the country Tuesday, leading to a building takeover, numerous arrests, class cancellations, and threats of expulsions. Police began arresting protestors in Chapel Hill yesterday at . Altercations were reported as several protestors were placed in handcuffs and at least one carried out by their arms and legs. Protestors at Columbia took over a university building and barricaded it. Several windows were broken, and banners with pro-Palestinian messages were displayed. University officials announced they would begin to expel protesting students. said they were monitoring the spreading unrest. "That is not an example of peaceful protests," a spokesman said. Polls: Confidence in Economy Falling New polls conducted by Gallup and the Conference Board indicate that Americans are losing confidence in the economy. Gallup's latest Economic Confidence Index showed consumer faith in the economy fell by nine points between March and April, the first decline in seven months. Similar research by the found that expectations for income, business, and the job market fell to their lowest levels since July 2022, partly due to concerns about high prices for food and gas. DEA to Reclassify Cannabis The federal government plans to for the first time since the Controlled Substances Act was passed more than 50 years ago. Sources say the Drug Enforcement Administration is expected to approve shifting cannabis from the most strict Schedule 1, which includes drugs such as heroin, and instead move it to Schedule III, which would recognize medical uses for marijuana. The shift would allow researchers to study marijuana's effects with far fewer restrictions. Schedule III drugs are still regulated, and the move for recreational use. body:
We’re almost there!
_ALERT: DEADLINE TONIGHT_ Friend,I want to express my gratitude to you -- for standing strong with our campaign. _It 's because of your unwavering support that we're leading the charge,_ poised to tackle the challenges facing our beloved state and steer it back on track.Your support has been crucial, yet, _with the clock ticking towards midnight,**we're teetering on the edge of missing our April End of the Month Deadline...**_ I understand it's a huge request, but [**could you help us reach our target before midnight tonight?**](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlrudll-dihkkhuuli-r/) We're almost there![**Just $25 from each of my friends -- yes, including you**](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlrudll-dihkkhuuli-y/) --will push us across the finish line this month, ensuring we have the resources necessary to amplify our message._Oregonians deserve change -- **for leaders unafraid to fight for that change**_ -- and I'm ready to step up to that challenge.Victory is within our grasp as we approach next month's Primary Election, [**so I hope you 'll stand with me in this time of urgency. **](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlrudll-dihkkhuuli-j/)Gratefully,Christine Drazan
-Sent from iPhone [](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlrudll-dihkkhuuli-t/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlrudll-dihkkhuuli-i/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-mlrudll-dihkkhuuli-k/) Paid for by Friends of Christine Drazan. PAC ID 19050

Friend,
---
This letter I've written to you comes entirely from the heart...
---
I knew full well the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history.
---
_But the fight for justice is always worth it._
---
Now, I find myself in a battle for my own freedom and justice as Crooked Joe Biden's accomplices seek to destroy me...
---
**Wall Street Journal: "Trump Advisers, Including Giuliani and Meadows, Indicted in Arizona"**
---
It wasn't enough for the Biden Regime to have its FBI raid my home, wrongfully arrest me, take my mugshot, or push me to the point of bankruptcy... _**They have now indicted me before a Grand Jury**_
---
But despite all of these vicious attacks, despite the Fake News calling me "a dead man walking," I'm still standing strong - _thanks to unbelievably kind souls like YOU who have given me the resources and support I need to stay free, and ensure that justice prevails for ALL Americans._
---
_Times are tough in Crooked Joe 's America, so if you can't afford it, please take care of yourself. But, if you can, any contribution you can make will be greatly appreciated to fight this INDICTMENT._
---
