subject: Religious Liberty is Under Serious Threat
body:
I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ac4bd9d31f140d7954aaf2f5a10e15d&_e=JNTPFp_2VXopOGfgDvch0lNoKdu1jEj5B_dCKJg7ek6pdt0ECn9wldjHvy4EyKp7JKfNK28OEXGfUmmwjaPmlLrrcNloVsT41tcwqONrgq3EvPEpyunwBkUSyAAjDgnqKoi63ihb89yBTt80mMh1BRdHU6gf-Eb-efEGDABrKIPa02nJRFgy3eR2sJrLjV6FzxsO9bKb_9egcoumyx_p_Oaa991rzfB4AAiWWGo6haNHUBFnEokdfrYw2IN6sCSU2337WHaKcYXZnTv15vtSR3jCOK473hzK3BJqz2TjoKtRws1UxytBvtRuo7DnSmKrf6FlcSE5wI32-KW-BjpVNHdVOs46BEdWBDJRw06n13LkIxhVNdw9iwcg1zAv4qk9zy8ie09TWGaCtm_uwid40g%3D%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ac4bd9d31f140d7954aaf2f5a10e15d&_e=JNTPFp_2VXopOGfgDvch0lNoKdu1jEj5B_dCKJg7ek6pdt0ECn9wldjHvy4EyKp7JKfNK28OEXGfUmmwjaPmlLrrcNloVsT41tcwqONrgq3EvPEpyunwBkUSyAAjDgnqKoi63ihb89yBTt80mMh1BRdHU6gf-Eb-efEGDABrKIPa02nJRFgy3eR2sJrLjV6FzxsO9bKb_9egcoumyx_p_Oaa991rzfB4AAiWWGo6haNHUBFnEokdfrYw2IN6sCSUda0dWl3YigXRkFGT70rwCwQnwQCgNRGSpKkaptLvsErMu_BhFdYU_iA7cg5fZ1gSBaxZaUxongxkfdihArmfpQnr_7g9YYzeuY_RKlW3Yud0HttVQolicjhKzVTP8S0_rBfynEyt9iF3XK69S754xw%3D%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include: **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ac4bd9d31f140d7954aaf2f5a10e15d&_e=JNTPFp_2VXopOGfgDvch0lNoKdu1jEj5B_dCKJg7ek6pdt0ECn9wldjHvy4EyKp7JKfNK28OEXGfUmmwjaPmlLrrcNloVsT41tcwqONrgq3EvPEpyunwBkUSyAAjDgnqKoi63ihb89yBTt80mMh1BRdHU6gf-Eb-efEGDABrKIPa02nJRFgy3eR2sJrLjV6FzxsO9bKb_9egcoumyx_p_Oaa991rzfB4AAiWWGo6haNHUBFnEokdfrYw2IN6sCSUFqaC5Cj00QC3MJ6DBFkKqFBqsSYM-F1PUL7V5sRCBTiCmdsg35aXmaeEU0eieWzrhawHmYf7UkWHXimpzZifPSbgbuCtIN-WTDd7EkgAHnXjRnHELOeINNsBBMSj8C-bKryzNNZL6AXktd3PxxYOtA%3D%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Defend the Constitution

So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| Peter,
Our campaign has just received a crucial endorsement from former Brentwood State Representative Allen Cook.
His words speak volumes:
"He [Russell] is honest and hardworking and will give his whole heart to serving the constituents of New Hampshire on the Federal Level."
But here's the hard truth: No matter how impressive our endorsement list gets, it won't mean anything if we keep dropping the ball on our end-of-month deadlines.
And right now, we just missed our April goal by $2,330.
That's why we're extending the deadline by just 1 HOUR.
[We need your help and every dollar counts. name: Max Engling
subject: Max for Indiana Volunteers: Voter Calls and Polling Locations
body:
Thank you for your willingness to support/volunteer with my campaign for
Congress in the 5th district! *We are** in the last week and I need your
help leading up to May 7!*

*If you are willing to help with either of the following volunteer
opportunities, I would greatly appreciate it! *

1. *Make calls to voters to support Max *
- You can do this from any location and at any time during this last
week - calls are made using the "Numinar" app (download from the
app store)
- Reply-all with your email and we will add you to the call-list
(script, survey, and call info is all included)
2. *Hand out Max's information at polling locations*
- Either on election day or any day this week at the early voting
centers
- Reply-all and we will get you information for helping at a polling
location

*Please forward this email to anyone you think may be interested.*

Thank you to everyone for all the support so far - I appreciate you all
very much!

Sincerely,

Max Engling

Candidate, IN-05

*https://maxforindiana.com <https://maxforindiana.com/>*

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 5/1/2024
body:
Your daily rundown of REAL news for REAL Coloradans.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi there,
Happy May Day! Our fun fact below is about today's holiday, make sure you don't miss it. This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, May 1, 2024.
- Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
---
**[Bill declaring Women Veterans Appreciation Day on June 12 headed to Gov. Polis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) ** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
A bill led by Eastern Colorado legislators will declare a [Women Veterans Appreciation Day](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), if signed into law by Gov. Jared Polis.
[House Bill 1236](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) cleared the Senate State, Veterans and Military Affairs Committee without objection last week and Monday earned unanimous support of the Colorado Senate.

"There's a lot of reasons why we need to celebrate women veterans," said Sen. Byron Pelton, a [co-prime sponsor of the legislation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in the Colorado Senate. "Being a veteran myself, I know the difference of treatment of myself and those I served with that happen to be female."

The bill establishes June 12 as Women Veterans Appreciation Day in Colorado. The other prime sponsors of the bill were Rep. Richard Holtorf and Sen. Barbara Kirkmeyer.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Gov. Polis signs Democrats' $40.6 billion state budget containing $2 billion more in spending](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Gov. Jared Polis signs the [$40.6 billion state budget](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for the next fiscal year, indicating a [$2 billion increase in spending](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

* The budget prioritizes investments in education, affordable housing, and safer communities, [according to Polis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). The budget reflects a significant commitment to K-12 education, with increased per-pupil funding and the elimination of the state's debt to K-12 education.

* Other [notable allocations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) include investments in higher education, healthcare, workforce development, and senior services, alongside adjustments for inflation and increased caseloads.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[The poison Ivy League: How taxpayers subsidize wealthy universities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **** [HERITAGE FOUNDATION](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)Ivy League universities received [$1.8 billion for overhead on government-funded research grants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in FY 2022, comprising 84% of their total government subsidy. For every dollar received for research, Ivy League universities charge the government an additional 64 cents for overhead, which is l[argely unaccountable and fungible](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
* Despite having [$192 billion in endowment funds collectively](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Ivy League universities continue to receive substantial taxpayer subsidies for research infrastructure.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
[Ex-U.S. Rep. Ken Buck lets loose in 'exit interview,' spilling secrets on Congress](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) **** [WASHINGTON EXAMINER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Former Colorado Republican Rep. Ken Buck shares frustrations and insights about Congress in an [exit interview](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Buck cites party infighting and lobbying influence, particularly by Big Tech, as hindering legislative progress.
* He criticizes the fundraising demands placed on lawmakers to secure committee positions, describing it as ["buying" influence](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

* Buck discusses the challenges of maintaining [two residences on a $174,000 salary](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), compared to constituents with much lower incomes.
* Concerned about fiscal responsibility, Buck suggests changing incentives in Congress, such as [tying salaries to budget balancing and spending reduction](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Gallup poll: Immigration again tops list of most important problems in US ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE HILL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* [Immigration remains the top concern](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for Americans for the third consecutive month, with 27% citing it as the most important problem. This marks the [longest period in Gallup polling history](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) that immigration has been a top issue in the U.S.
* Republicans are significantly more likely than Democrats to consider immigration a top issue, with [48% of Republicans mentioning it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) compared to 8% of Democrats.

* Other important problems listed include government (18%), economy (17%), and inflation (13%). The poll was conducted among 1,001 adults from April 1-22, with a margin of error of 4 percentage points.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Sloan: Weighing the immunity question facing the Supreme Court](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY KELLY SLOAN | COMMENTARY | APRIL 30** _A fortnight ago, on CBS 's Sunday morning show "Meet the Press", one of the guests interviewed was Doris Kearns Goodwin, Presidential historian, author of "Team of Rivals" and former staffer for President Lyndon Johnson.___
**[House Republican minority boasts passage of two bills into law, advancing five others they led](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE | APRIL 29** _A pair of bills carried by Republican members of the Colorado House have been signed into law, along with a few other victories as the countdown to closure of the state legislature draws near.___
['Citizens are not safe coming to the state capitol', Rep. Holtorf says on Stinchfield](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)******BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE | APRIL 29** _Anyone choosing to visit the state 's capitol is doing so at their own peril in Colorado, Minority House Whip Rep. Richard Holtorf told Grant Stinchfield during a recent appearance on Real America's Voice._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**💐 DID YOU KNOW?** **May Day** is really two separate holidays: the celebration of the coming summer and fertility and the celebration of labor day.
|

|

name: =?UTF-8?Q?=F0=9F=94=B8Left_Action_Petition?=
subject: Sign: Demand Trump be put in jail if he violates his gag order again
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Thank Judge Juan Merchan for fining Trump for contempt. Next, put him in jail >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd278281-b7b6-45e3-a0ab-342c974dfc62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca14b45f-9474-4b33-9a21-e0eaf3412b04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Judge Juan Merchan, who is overseeing Trump’s hush money case, ruled Trump in contempt for nine violations of his gag order and fined him $9,000. This may not be a lot for someone with Trump’s wealth, but it’s just the first step, and it makes Trump the first president ever held in criminal contempt! [But if he does it again, he needs to be put in jail. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8841d47b-4c37-4f14-ae12-c7d5fa21df8c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump is finally being sanctioned for his disgusting behavior, attacking witnesses and others involved in the case on social media after he was banned from doing so. Judge Merchan has also said that if Trump violates his gag order again, he’ll consider putting Trump in jail. We want to thank Judge Merchan for laying down the law and holding Trump accountable. But we also know that Trump will definitely violate his gag order again (he can’t help himself!) so we need to make sure Trump gets jail time next – the $9,000 fine isn’t going to stop him. [Add your name: Thank Judge Juan Merchan for fining Trump for contempt. Next, put him in jail >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b1f04bd-36fd-445c-96c3-bf4e9146b575/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8ffb246-8de2-428c-ae89-261dbe021e33/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taabc8f1f-1752-410f-8f15-ef6cdafd68ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T076669a9-3890-4c68-b2f8-34b21ef31e34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: Can I sign a copy of my new memoir for you, friend?

body:
There's only 100 signed books left

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp3ije6jslbthmq2vd3gd6nkt70ed0nkpuioje00_rp22sh2s8i6ep31clge8p74c9h2bs)
---

Hey there Friend, Governor Kristi Noem here!

"We don't complain about things, Kristi. We fix them." These words from my father have guided me throughout my life from the ranch of my youth to the South Dakota Governor's Residence.

And in my new memoir No Going Back, I share stories about the chaos and function in DC, and the lessons I learned in South Dakota on how to fix them. Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders.

**So I 'd like to offer you an exclusive signed copy today. BUT I only have 100 left! [YOU CAN CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbvhnkrseqb00t9c54d4apdk9idlrp03bo1j04s0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31clge8p74c9h2bs "YOU CAN CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE")**

Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders. So I 'd like to offer you an exclusive signed copy today. BUT I only have 100 left! "YOU CAN CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE" | No Going Backby Kristi Noem | | | "Generic Button" This memoir is the perfect read for everyone who cares about the future of America. Because if we are going to get America back on track, we must return to the values of grit and hard work that my youth and father instilled in me. BUT DON 'T DELAY - there are only 100 signed copies left. Plus, your contribution today will fuel our efforts to take back the House and restore Conservative leadership in Washington. Thank you for your support! | Kristi Noem Governor of South Dakota | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | Fellow Conservative, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ed9494af1a5349e5926f1e3503059ac1&_e=PIo3PXMzP2y0pyLBWB0rwufwcDRRv1l59yprLpOyYujv0Vt-BEVVWNQ5X2mFxOUhRHSByA791juTM5VeLLiTqqJXqK8qPew36A7R_8VmMTpTHkQVgu50yg0Y0U1mVbJMfuLRTm67mJeAvsYvAEf9WMClfVOSwRZsy_TcMWY44Doz0muV8D1Z8dc1ulnNQcTZYXMALk_IK1TDmUZhk474mAMZ89fFi6RANK13LyD7UIAxT9DMZSY3k_ORNKm5H71p2tGaqvjoM3_OpLyPLrBhjuU_FeARnczyul02rhdxl7nOyjyT-KNSwdX0gQCAx2Nw35S1tgP9ms6xBDBQ9_FLxsrMye2JZxFK6QxNxM8TtfpLDExFK4irgUtV2TNgfR6LOlsFibGsXJNYl6zfAzMk9ZK3jJPrDsYkCOfs1tl1BDmlcPOI_5ozVCfXTUca2ZOpjUUo5-xZEoCuJ0q01gYw12vrPUgm639_z2uAnfv4VH0rvhnf2MglcX9ydSFFJDFn)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they’d rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ed9494af1a5349e5926f1e3503059ac1&_e=PIo3PXMzP2y0pyLBWB0rwufwcDRRv1l59yprLpOyYujv0Vt-BEVVWNQ5X2mFxOUhRHSByA791juTM5VeLLiTqqJXqK8qPew36A7R_8VmMTpTHkQVgu50yg0Y0U1mVbJMfuLRTm67mJeAvsYvAEf9WMClfVOSwRZsy_TcMWY44Doz0muV8D1Z8dc1ulnNQcTZYXMALk_IK1TDmUZhk474mAMZ89fFi6RANK13LyD7UIAxT9DMZSY3k_ORNKm5H71p2tGaqvjoM3_OpLyPLrBhjuU_FeARnczyul02rhdxl7nOyjyT-KNSwdX0gQCAx2Nw35S1tgP9ms6xBDBQ9_FLxlMokk9wDne0TVndZf7WfCDCnX49zodfaN7VO5nte4ioDGdyZI3m8QTRURnLwg_xdHBvak0QVjoA0cmE3FsVZF8r4XWAejD3GGBJ-h4clXEWR_IiEDT70TkFfBvSksD4cPOh97Cmas8Tl9bNkYXc2J0hMX2AjFvgPuVujcDa-dln) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There’s no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!

P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of _**$25 million**_ in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. name: Center for Reproductive Rights
subject: BREAKING: Florida's six-week abortion ban in effect
body:
A growing abortion desert in the U.S. South | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84095539/470452483/2141984067?sourceid=1149541&utm_campaign=24emfr042426aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGMwNWFkZC1iYjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgnxRe6IkuFUNSCNarz-KEqx16fDS2m_ZMw2_DyRu7U=&emci=d570a95e-5f06-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=08c05add-bb07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84095540/470452484/2141984067?sourceid=1149541&utm_campaign=24emfr042426aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGMwNWFkZC1iYjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgnxRe6IkuFUNSCNarz-KEqx16fDS2m_ZMw2_DyRu7U=&emci=d570a95e-5f06-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=08c05add-bb07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237)
---|---
| Peter,

Last month, the Florida Supreme Court overturned decades of precedent and cleared the way for a six-week abortion ban to take effect. That ban goes into effect today, leaving abortion severely restricted or totally banned in every southeastern state in the U.S. | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84095541/470452485/2141984067?sourceid=1149541&utm_campaign=24emfr042426aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGMwNWFkZC1iYjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgnxRe6IkuFUNSCNarz-KEqx16fDS2m_ZMw2_DyRu7U=&emci=d570a95e-5f06-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=08c05add-bb07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")
---
But the courts aren't our only path forward. The Center for Reproductive Rights is supporting partners on the ground to secure a right to abortion in the state's constitution through a ballot measure, Amendment 4, that will go to Florida voters this fall. Abortion has been on the ballot seven times since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned nearly two years ago, and it has won [**every. single. time.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84095542/470452486/2141984067?sourceid=1149541&utm_campaign=24emfr042426aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGMwNWFkZC1iYjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgnxRe6IkuFUNSCNarz-KEqx16fDS2m_ZMw2_DyRu7U=&emci=d570a95e-5f06-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=08c05add-bb07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237)
[**FIGHT BACK**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84095543/470452487/2141984067?sourceid=1149541&utm_campaign=24emfr042426aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGMwNWFkZC1iYjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgnxRe6IkuFUNSCNarz-KEqx16fDS2m_ZMw2_DyRu7U=&emci=d570a95e-5f06-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=08c05add-bb07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237 "FIGHT BACK")
---
You've already seen what happens when states ban abortion. Pregnant people are being forced to flee their home states to seek the care they need or forced to give birth when they lack the resources to go elsewhere for care, and health care providers are being prevented from doing their jobs by laws that put people's lives in danger.

Thanks to your support, the Center is using every tool at our disposal to fight back—from state-level litigation to advocating for federal legislation—[**and we're not slowing down any time soon.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84095544/470452489/2141984067?sourceid=1149541&utm_campaign=24emfr042426aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGMwNWFkZC1iYjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VgnxRe6IkuFUNSCNarz-KEqx16fDS2m_ZMw2_DyRu7U=&emci=d570a95e-5f06-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=08c05add-bb07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237)

Onward,

clean_body: A growing abortion desert in the U.S. South | | ---|--- | Peter, Last month, the Florida Supreme Court overturned decades of precedent and cleared the way for a six-week abortion ban to take effect. That ban goes into effect today, leaving abortion severely restricted or totally banned in every southeastern state in the U.S. | "DONATE NOW" But the courts aren't our only path forward. The Center for Reproductive Rights is supporting partners on the ground to secure a right to abortion in the state's constitution through a ballot measure, Amendment 4, that will go to Florida voters this fall. Abortion has been on the ballot seven times since Roe v. Wade was overturned nearly two years ago, and it has won "FIGHT BACK" You've already seen what happens when states ban abortion. Pregnant people are being forced to flee their home states to seek the care they need or forced to give birth when they lack the resources to go elsewhere for care, and health care providers are being prevented from doing their jobs by laws that put people's lives in danger. Thanks to your support, the Center is using every tool at our disposal to fight back—from state-level litigation to advocating for federal legislation— Onward, Center for Reproductive Rights "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: The Flyover

I'm so incredibly grateful to you, friend.
Thank you for being by my side in yet another battleground race in Nevada that will decide Senate control. Your grassroots support means the world to me.
That's why I wish I had better news to share: **Unfortunately, my finance team just told me we didn't reach our crucial $50,000 end-of-month goal.**
Now that The Cook Political Report downgraded my race to a toss up, we know that the fight ahead isn't going to be easy – especially with dark money groups like the Koch network pouring millions into Nevada to defeat me. But with folks like you on my team, I know we can get our fundraising back on track and have a real shot at keeping Nevada and the Senate blue.

clean_body: | | | = I'm so incredibly grateful to you, friend. Thank you for being by my side in yet another battleground race in Nevada that will decide Senate control. Your grassroots support means the world to me. That's why I wish I had better news to share: Unfortunately, my finance team just told me we didn't reach our crucial $50,000 end-of-month goal. Now that The Cook Political Report downgraded my race to a toss up, we know that the fight ahead isn't going to be easy – especially with dark money groups like the Koch network pouring millions into Nevada to defeat me. But with folks like you on my team, I know we can get our fundraising back on track and have a real shot at keeping Nevada and the Senate blue. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much for your essential support. – Jacky | | = A note from Sen. name: Laura
subject: What True Representation Should Look Like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Jones for Congress
body:
what does it mean to be a true representative? While embarking on this journey for Congress, I've encountered moments that define what being... | | | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=731dfd9421&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
# What True Representation Should Look Like

Peter- what does it mean to be a true representative?
While embarking on this journey for Congress, I've encountered moments that define what being a true representative truly means.
[**One such instance unfolded during the 2022 election season when I faced a challenging debate hosted by a far-right group. Watch the video below to hear my story:**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=a6a14871b7&e=a2a46ff12c)
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=9b0e841587&e=a2a46ff12c)
This experience underscored the essence of listening, a quality integral to genuine representation.
The tough questions and contrasting viewpoints presented pushed me to truly hear the concerns of all constituents.
So, what does it mean to be a true representative? It means listening, learning, and embracing the richness of our district's voices. I may not have all the solutions, but I'm here to listen to you, to learn from you, and to lead with your concerns at the forefront.
[**Let's shape a better future together—one where every voice is heard and every concern is acknowledged.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=cee551abec&e=a2a46ff12c)
[Chip in $25](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=2589f2bfec&e=a2a46ff12c)
[Chip in $100](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=ec55054d4b&e=a2a46ff12c)
[Become a Founding Donor $500](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=1942d95cd0&e=a2a46ff12c)
[Max My Gift! $2,800](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=16bb6416d4&e=a2a46ff12c)
[Choose Amount](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=a92b6ffeca&e=a2a46ff12c)
Thank you for listening.

\- Laura

| | | All eyes are on our race in Texas. CNN says Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country. FiveThirtyEight says this could be Democrats' best chance to win in Texas. And if we can win this race, we're virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. But Ted Cruz isn't going down without a fight, and he's got extremist mega donors ready to spend whatever it takes to keep him in office. His right-wing super PACs are already airing attack ads filled with lies about Colin's record and character, and there's a LOT more coming. We need the resources to fight back NOW. [That's why we're asking, Peter: Will you chip in $5, $10, or anything you can spare today to Colin and Blue Amp Action? Every dollar gets us closer to defeating Ted Cruz and holding on to our Democratic Senate majority. →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4489fe47-af15-4646-adc6-0b6db0a90b65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | | Rachel Maddow is exactly right, Peter. With two recent polls showing this race TIED, Colin Allred is the Democrat who can finally fire Ted Cruz for good. | | | | | | | | All eyes are on our race in Texas. CNN says Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country. FiveThirtyEight says this could be Democrats' best chance to win in Texas. And if we can win this race, we're virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. But Ted Cruz isn't going down without a fight, and he's got extremist mega donors ready to spend whatever it takes to keep him in office. His right-wing super PACs are already airing attack ads filled with lies about Colin's record and character, and there's a LOT more coming. We need the resources to fight back NOW. | | | | | | Thanks for being a part of our team – it's going to take all of us to send Ted Cruz packing. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. name: Doug White
subject: Voices Unheard: Empowering Change with Rural Americans United
body:
Too many voices are dismissed by election cycle politics, especially in Central Washington.
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/82OyiGS1d/c?w=no-v1QUrZneMRRb962hOJc8x1d1m47MWpn12T8yr7DU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzgyT3lpR1MxZD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
# In This Newsletter

1. Why I Am Not Running
2. Voices Unheard: Empowering Change with Rural Americans United
3. The work must be done by us
4. Celebrating Heroes: Candidates Making a Difference in Central and Eastern Washington
5. Presidential Immunity: A Supreme or Kangaroo Court? Watch the Video
6. Yakima City Council's Tomfoolery: The Story of Spencer and Leslie Hatton In the next newsletter: Optimism With Rural Voter Registration Data, Dominick Bonny and Christian Patriotism, Federal Funding Floods Central and Eastern Washington, H2a visa workers unionize and more!

---
| | |
---
| | 1\. Why I Am Not Running
---
| | In LD14, we have Chelsea Dimas and Raul Martinez running for Representative, Maria Beltran for Senate. In LD4, Miguel Valencia is running for Senate, Natasha Hill in LD3 for Representative, and Maria Keethler for Senate in LD17. Additionally, Terri Niles is running for Representative in LD17, while several candidates are running for the CD5 House and Maria Perez for the CD3 House. These races all have special circumstances, whether it's due to redistricting, open seats, or incumbent factors, making them particularly impactful. While there are many local races of importance, these State and Federal races carry significant visibility, especially for Central and Eastern Washington. It's a simple truth that Democrats need victories more than just candidates. Over the next few newsletters, I'll delve into the facts behind this statement. While it's my opinion, it's grounded in both heuristic and empirical research, which supports the efforts of Rural Americans United for change. Campaigns are centered around candidates and consume vast resources. But if there's no political infrastructure to absorb the lessons learned after the campaign — including trained resources, media connections, donor connections, and constituent information — much of the excitement and hope built up during the campaign is lost. This loss is evident in the data; Democrats often lose in Central and Eastern Washington, resulting in ever fewer votes and donations, and a rightward shift in the region. Every Democrat running for office is a hero, improving life for all of us. However, the future success of the Democratic party will be measured less by how many candidates run, and more by how many win. While Central and Eastern Washington may soon demonstrate its presence by the number of candidates it puts forward, for now, ensuring that a few candidates win is paramount.
---
| | |
---
| | 2\. Voices Unheard: Empowering Change with Rural Americans United
---
| | Rural Americans United is focusing on the unheard voices. Our pro-Democratic values messaging campaign has delivered over twenty million radio impressions since last October, but we aim to do even better. Too many voices are dismissed by election cycle politics, especially in Central Washington. This includes Latinx, Indigenous, youth, and increasingly disenfranchised white communities that make up the working class. How do we know we are overlooked? National polls may state that youth favor Biden, but our voting records show our youth voting 3:1 in favor of Trump so we know they didn’t ask us. When national polls show a strong Latinx turnout for Dems, but our Latinx population's voter turnout remains troublingly low, we know they did not ask us. When the national polls fail to reflect Indigenous persons, we know they did not ask us. We will continue our pro-Democratic values messaging, but going forward, we will employ a proven methodology that utilizes media, which provides us ways to measure responses and better target the unheard populations; many dialogs with many different approaches. Using tools such as social media and direct communication technology to understand what these disenfranchised, low voter turnout populations care about. If we truly care about our communities, we need to understand them better. Relying on opinion, supposition, hubris, or other people’s polling does not demonstrate the respect these people deserve. This is a first-of-its-kind effort in Central and Eastern Washington. Rural Americans United is reaching out to interested partners to bring together local organizations, data analysts, communication, and production specialists to create a super team. We are well underway. The information we expect to gather will be eye-opening and hopefully shine light on the many unanswered questions as to why engaging these low voter turnout populations remains a challenge. This work won’t be done by outside parties because they do not see the value in our communities as we do.
---
| | |
---
| | 3\. The work must be done by us, and it takes money. We need your support. Please invest in your, in our future
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/82OyiGS1d/c?w=dmYvb5xqKmPTM9ttybIut0SCLwv759C18ufNIEMcg9s.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL25ld3NsZXR0ZXItYXByaWwtMjAyNCIsInIiOiIyOGI5Y2M1NC1lYjE0LTRiNmYtYTZlMy1jOWFhZmJmNmY3ZDMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)

| | |

| | 5\. Presidential Immunity: A Supreme or Kangaroo Court? Watch the Video
---
| | Arguably the most important court case in our nation's history is unfolding. The Supreme Court's duty is to interpret and adapt our Constitution to the modern era. But this time, it feels different. It's as if they're standing alongside our forefathers, crafting the Constitution anew, albeit two hundred years later. Yet, the impact remains just as profound. Their decision will shape whether we continue as a government of, by, and for the people or veer towards autocracy. Watch the video of the Supreme Court hearing. Warning: what you'll hear is deeply troubling.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/82OyiGS1d/c?w=M14nDErK8I891_UrfzVcjRQx0tJyVgLfIT_Wby-HuT8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzgyT3lpR1MxZD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiI2Y2FhMjM2MS0wODY3LTQ0OTYtYWE2Yy0yNTdmYjYwYzA3ZGYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | 6\. Yakima City Council's Tomfoolery: The Story of Spencer and Leslie Hatton
---
| | A letter to the Yakima City Council regarding the council's sandbagging of the petition drive (see previous blogs). Reprinted with permission from Spencer and Leslie Hatton. "Yakima City Council moved the goalposts when it realized Yakima voters raised enough petition signatures to block ordinances eliminating or demoting 5 citizen advisory committees. In Yakima, we have the right to stop misguided city ordinances and send them to a popular vote by filing petitions with a certain number of voter signatures. After the County Auditor certified the number of voter signatures needed was 804, more than 1,200 petition signatures were filed to block City Council from eliminating the Sustainable Yakima & Community Integration Committees and degrading the Bicycle/Pedestrian Committee, Tree Board, and Historic Preservation Committees. Another option the City Council could take immediately is to repeal the ordinances, thereby restoring the committees to their previous official city status. One week after sufficient petition signatures were filed, City Council hatched a plan to retroactively raise the signature threshold from 804 to 1,258. How did they do that? The City asked the County Auditor to add the number of city residents who voted only in the Yakima School Board and the West Valley School Board races, but did not vote in the city council elections for Districts 1, 3, 5, and 7. The Auditor’s Office noted in writing to the City of Yakima that the city was only billed for conducting an election in those four districts, and not for the elections for the Yakima School Board and West Valley School Board elections. Those school boards paid separately for their own elections. Furthermore, in a phone call to the Washington Secretary of State, officials there noted that school district elections “have nothing to do with” city government elections because school districts are independent legal entities with separate taxing authority from city government, even though there may be some geographic overlap between the school district boundaries and the city boundaries. Within two days after this plan was exposed, voters collected an additional 179 signatures, as allowed under state law, to now have over 1,400 petition signatures. City Council responded by directing City Manager Zabell to publicly reject additional voter signatures and set the goalposts high enough to disenfranchise more than 1,400 Yakima voters. Please do the right thing. If not, it will likely be necessary to file a lawsuit to stop these City Hall misguided actions."

Kansas Legislature Passes Bill Banning Chinese Land Purchases Near
Military Sites After DCNF Investigation
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlocsi0f7gce19dr7m5bljp35tr4v1n0rpe4qsdg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31clge2or0cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38ctk6oon9dtjmeqjetjjkorrbdt36kq32tbiekojf8j0c9gmf835cug68pt6mgprct1memgradpkmpor8cble9qjb83k6pr7adjlk8qb3cdlk8q37ctkmerjb9hgmipradjl6mgr8cth6mg7asjm62q3ct9memhrad1iemir9cdkm5q34t7lkpqb2t9memi36cbl69qq2dhjmcqq9ctjekr72t5n6gon9dtjmuh2bs

The Kansas legislature passed a bill Tuesday that will prevent
companies from China or other adversarial countries from buying land
near military sites. The state House passed SB 172 by an 86-39 vote on
Monday before the state Senate passed the bill by a 24-14 vote on
Tuesday.

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: An important update on the state of abortion access in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Reaching out to you personally about reproductive freedom in Florida
| | |
---
Friend,

This is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, and I’m the Democrat running to defeat Rick Scott, serve Floridians as our next U.S. Senator, and defend our Democratic majority.
**I’m reaching out to update you on the fight for abortion rights here in Florida — because, perhaps more than anywhere else in the country, the stakes here for reproductive freedom couldn’t be higher.**
As I write to you, Ron DeSantis’ six-week abortion ban is going into effect. This ban will create life or death situations for millions of Floridians. Because politicians like DeSantis and my opponent, Rick Scott, are so intent on stripping Floridians of their freedoms, families right now could be subject to untold pain.
**But there is hope, friend.** The Florida Supreme Court has ruled in favor of a ballot initiative to let the people — and not extremist politicians like DeSantis and Scott — decide the future of reproductive rights in Florida this November. If this ballot initiative succeeds, abortion rights will be enshrined into our state constitution, making DeSantis’ abortion ban null and void.
Here’s the truth, friend. Despite what the political pundits would have you believe, Florida is NOT a red state. We’re ready for new leadership, and I’m determined to help win it. I’ll fight with everything I have to ensure this ballot initiative is successful and that we defeat Rick Scott to ensure Floridians have a true voice in the U.S. Senate — not someone who co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions. It would be an honor to have you on this team and count on your support.
Thank you,

Debbie
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84100795/470467352/-31196584?refcode=jtk1176-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjExZjcwYjktYzEwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gwvObbSygkZ2FuPziDW1RmWRKLT8lQSxTlEqJ2NBziE=)
---
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: Reaching out to you personally about reproductive freedom in Florida | | | Friend, This is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, and I’m the Democrat running to defeat Rick Scott, serve Floridians as our next U.S. Senator, and defend our Democratic majority. I’m reaching out to update you on the fight for abortion rights here in Florida — because, perhaps more than anywhere else in the country, the stakes here for reproductive freedom couldn’t be higher. As I write to you, Ron DeSantis’ six-week abortion ban is going into effect. This ban will create life or death situations for millions of Floridians. Because politicians like DeSantis and my opponent, Rick Scott, are so intent on stripping Floridians of their freedoms, families right now could be subject to untold pain. But there is hope, friend. The Florida Supreme Court has ruled in favor of a ballot initiative to let the people — and not extremist politicians like DeSantis and Scott — decide the future of reproductive rights in Florida this November. If this ballot initiative succeeds, abortion rights will be enshrined into our state constitution, making DeSantis’ abortion ban null and void. Here’s the truth, friend. Despite what the political pundits would have you believe, Florida is NOT a red state. We’re ready for new leadership, and I’m determined to help win it. I’ll fight with everything I have to ensure this ballot initiative is successful and that we defeat Rick Scott to ensure Floridians have a true voice in the U.S. Senate — not someone who co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions. It would be an honor to have you on this team and count on your support. Thank you, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

body:
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will officially appear on the Hawaii ballot!

| | | | [Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will officially appear on the Hawaii ballot!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hawaii_ballot_5_1_24_nd1&n=1)

|
---
Aloha Peter,
We have more great news from the campaign trail—Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will officially appear on the Hawaii ballot!
This marks a significant triumph, _as Hawaii's Democrat leaders tried to keep RFK Jr. off the ballot and silence our supporters._ Thankfully, our lawyers continue to defeat the DNC political machine at every turn.
[Team Kennedy will not be intimidated by party bosses and entrenched political powers.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hawaii_ballot_5_1_24_nd1&n=3)

---
The Democratic Party of Hawaii tried to disqualify the We The People Party from appearing on the ballot after collecting the required 862 signatures. Hearings officer Aaron Schulaner found the Democratic Party's objections "did not meet its burden of proof in this case."
Kim Haine, chair of the State Central Committee of We The People responded, "The Hawaii Office of Elections delivered a very fair and thoughtful decision [...] in favor of our grassroots. I’m so proud of how our officers and volunteers represented Hawaii in this real-life David vs. Goliath legal challenge."
We knew this historic independent presidential campaign would scare the political establishment. But RFK Jr. and Nicole refuse to back down because they know what they are fighting for ... _a chance to reclaim America!_
Kennedy and Shanahan are championing the rights of the working and middle class, whom the political establishment has overlooked. They are fed up with high inflation, endless wars, and a lack of common sense policies.
Team Kennedy's message is winning over the hearts and minds of independent voters, which is now America's largest voting block. In addition, recent polling shows Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. leading in voter favorability, ahead of President Joe Biden and Donald Trump.
Take a stand for democracy and America's future! [A gift of $100, $250, $500, or more will put RFK Jr. on the ballot and into the White House!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=hawaii_ballot_5_1_24_nd1&n=9)

name: Economy Watch (via NextGen America)
subject: It's the first of the month and rent's too damn high
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84103454/470475181/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDk0Y2NhOC1jNDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4i00CIPc-bt9FYMPbi-P8B9qL9Mn3AAq50LoqwG6Wfc=&emci=f7fff2fe-7706-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=0494cca8-c407-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=6787172)
---
Do you pay rent, team?
The person writing this email (Hey! 👋) does. So do a lot of us here at Youth Vote HQ. We’re spread out across the country, but we’re all in agreement on one thing: Rent is _entirely_ too high.
And it’s not just us! Harvard’s Joint Center for Housing Studies found that **50% of renters nationwide can’t afford housing.**
31% of Gen Z adults are living with their parents _because they just can’t afford rent._ And it’s not because we don’t have jobs; wages are too low, student loans are too high, and the price of housing just keeps going up.
[We’re in the middle of a housing crisis. And it won’t end if we don’t step up and do something about it. Will you write to your elected officials and demand they help bring down the rent?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84103458/470475183/741508347?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDk0Y2NhOC1jNDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4i00CIPc-bt9FYMPbi-P8B9qL9Mn3AAq50LoqwG6Wfc=&emci=f7fff2fe-7706-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=0494cca8-c407-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=6787172)
| [I'm in: Rent's too high →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84103459/470475187/-824575594?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDk0Y2NhOC1jNDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4i00CIPc-bt9FYMPbi-P8B9qL9Mn3AAq50LoqwG6Wfc=&emci=f7fff2fe-7706-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=0494cca8-c407-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=6787172)
---
The reality is that most of us are just one emergency away from homelessness. And if you ask us, that level of injustice shouldn’t exist in the wealthiest country on earth.
[So if you’re with us, write to your elected officials today and let them know we have to bring down the rent.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84103460/470475188/1904307761?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDk0Y2NhOC1jNDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4i00CIPc-bt9FYMPbi-P8B9qL9Mn3AAq50LoqwG6Wfc=&emci=f7fff2fe-7706-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=0494cca8-c407-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: | Do you pay rent, team? The person writing this email (Hey! 👋) does. So do a lot of us here at Youth Vote HQ. We’re spread out across the country, but we’re all in agreement on one thing: Rent is entirely too high. And it’s not just us! Harvard’s Joint Center for Housing Studies found that 50% of renters nationwide can’t afford housing. 31% of Gen Z adults are living with their parents because they just can’t afford rent. And it’s not because we don’t have jobs; wages are too low, student loans are too high, and the price of housing just keeps going up. | The reality is that most of us are just one emergency away from homelessness. And if you ask us, that level of injustice shouldn’t exist in the wealthiest country on earth. | Together, NextGen America | | = |

Hey there — Happy May Day!
Today, across the world, communities are celebrating laborers and the working class folks who have fought so hard to secure rights for workers, including the eight-hour workday and weekends.
The date was chosen to commemorate the four-day general strike in the U.S. in 1886 that culminated in the Haymarket Affair in Chicago, where people rallied for an 8-hour workday and workers ultimately lost their lives due to violence at the rally.
Before I got to Congress, I spent my entire career fighting for workers and their families. I’m *still* a dues-paying member of the United Food and Commercial Workers Union and I’m proud to continue carrying the torch for workers every day I step into the House.
As a co-sponsor, I’m committed to finally passing the _PRO Act_ and protecting every single person’s right to organize, hold employers accountable when they violate employees’ rights, and secure free, fair, and safe union elections.
**The**** _PRO Act_****has three critical components that will ensure workers are protected:**
1. The _PRO Act_ will streamline the justice process for union busting and employer retaliation — enhancing the right for workers to boycott and strike
2. It also CLOSES the loopholes in current labor laws to hold employers accountable for violating the rights of their employees and facilitate collective bargaining agreements
3. AND the _PRO Ac_ t aims to secure free and fair union elections so that union leaders are empowered to represent the workers

**[Team — unions have never been stronger or more popular than they are right now. We’ve got to get the _PRO Act_ over the finish line to continue building on the progress we’ve seen. That’s where you come in: will you add your name and support the _PRO Act_ today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84103552/470475461/-1371614718?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240501_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmYzOWVkZS1jNDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wnEXBo7xvFQ4_I_glCDNGab0PLcYeeycw_QCYe-_7C8=&emci=5ef39ede-c407-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=62f39ede-c407-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=13891387)**

clean_body: | = | | Team — We need more support from Cresco to help get the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act over the finish line. Can I personally count on your support today? | Hey there — Happy May Day! Today, across the world, communities are celebrating laborers and the working class folks who have fought so hard to secure rights for workers, including the eight-hour workday and weekends. The date was chosen to commemorate the four-day general strike in the U.S. in 1886 that culminated in the Haymarket Affair in Chicago, where people rallied for an 8-hour workday and workers ultimately lost their lives due to violence at the rally. Before I got to Congress, I spent my entire career fighting for workers and their families. I’m still a dues-paying member of the United Food and Commercial Workers Union and I’m proud to continue carrying the torch for workers every day I step into the House. As a co-sponsor, I’m committed to finally passing the PRO Act and protecting every single person’s right to organize, hold employers accountable when they violate employees’ rights, and secure free, fair, and safe union elections. The PRO Acthas three critical components that will ensure workers are protected: 1. The PRO Act will streamline the justice process for union busting and employer retaliation — enhancing the right for workers to boycott and strike 2. It also CLOSES the loopholes in current labor laws to hold employers accountable for violating the rights of their employees and facilitate collective bargaining agreements 3. AND the PRO Ac t aims to secure free and fair union elections so that union leaders are empowered to represent the workers Thanks for everything friend. — Nikki | **= Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

name: Tina Smith
subject: 💪Workers are organizing across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Folks, Today is May Day, also known as International Workers' Day. But every day is a great day to celebrate and uplift workers — especially while we have the most pro-union president in the White House. **Organized labor is having a moment.** Across the country, we’re seeing workers and organized labor mobilize and join in solidarity to fight for better wages, benefits, and working conditions. Last month, autoworkers in Chattanooga, Tennessee, overwhelmingly voted to organize their workplace — and they recently reached an agreement securing raises, cost-of-living increases, and many other incredible benefits. There’s more: a new poll shows that the majority of Americans see the decline of union membership to be bad for the country and bad for workers. **That’s why we need to support organizing workers and their fight for better rights.** Workers from coast to coast are fighting for better conditions, and I will continue to do everything I can to empower this movement. From supporting the _PRO Act_ in the Senate to calling on company leaders to level the playing field for their employees, I’m keeping up the fight to support our workers. Here’s a great reminder for us all: **When workers join together, they are often better able to secure livable wages, a safe work environment, and quality benefits for families.** In solidarity, Tina | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84106108/470481035/-956013409?refcode=AU_TSM_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20240501_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2IzZGE4OS1jNzA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eYQUbZytQs-kil2z4V6RmORAcE57B-pqybslLC4saQs=)

name: David Yoho
subject: Help Honor Our Heroes at the National Memorial Day Parade
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDg5NjkifQ/caff1kcP-efkYA-hsZheIA)
---
Fellow American, The day the war ended, I became a World War II veteran – and I was just 16 years old. I had faked my birth certificate to enlist in the U.S. Maritime Service in 1944, and I served on a tanker ship that transported refined oil to the Pacific. Four days after Victory over Japan Day in 1945, I turned 17. **Fellow American, as one of America’s youngest World War II veterans, I consider it my sacred duty to inspire the next generation to safeguard the legacy and honor the memories of the men and women who served with me.** **[**This year marks the 80th anniversary of the major battles of 1944. Will you chip in $35, $50, $75, $100, or more, today to join me to support the American Veterans Center's National Memorial Day Parade in this important year?**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDg5NjkifQ/gCK2T3dvJwsNynybvLgOtw)**
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDg5NjkifQ/29oQo6ERkfmyEsdv-YhjqQ)
---
[Support the National Memorial Day Parade](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDg5NjkifQ/KoY0kCj_cOGBUCxZV5cqSg)
---
I’ve given thousands of speeches all across the country about America’s veterans. But who I’m really talking _for_ is the more than 400,000 fallen Americans, the majority of whom were left in foreign soil or in a watery grave during World War II. **So whether I’m standing on-stage speaking to hundreds or in a personal conversation with a curious young person, I say the same thing: go look up the stories. The real stories, not just what you got from your history book.** Go back to Pont du Hoc and the invasion of Normandy – those were young men climbing straight up a cliff. Go back to the servicemembers who won the war at the Battle of the Bulge, at the cost of more than 19,000 lives lost. Learn about the war contributions that the government took nearly 50 years to acknowledge: the thousands of women who flew bombers from the assembly lines to U.S. military bases, including the 39 who died serving our country, or the real dangers that those in the Maritime Service who were faced with the mortality rate of 1 out of 26, which was the highest rate in WWII (and then came home to be excluded from the GI Bill until the late 1980s!). **Fellow American, no other organization does as much to honor America’s veterans – _and tell our stories in our own words_ – as the American Veterans Center.** That’s why I’m proud to support them, proud to take part in their excellent programs for veterans, and proud to ask you to join me and my friends at the American Veterans Center for our special mission this year. **[**Please make your most generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more, today to help support the American Veterans Center's National Memorial Day Parade in this important anniversary year.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDg5NjkifQ/Z7gE9_0GXhqKE0jT0-0WwA)**
---
[Support the National Memorial Day Parade](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDg5NjkifQ/UaNQF--HQvpaVMMnrpkRQg)
---
Fellow American, after you read my note today, I hope you’ll consider making a generous gift to support the work of the American Veterans Center. **And I strongly urge you to learn for yourself the stories of the men and women of the World War II generation – and then share those stories with a young person in your life.** It’s easier to access this information than ever before, thanks in part to my friends at the American Veterans Center, and it’s easier to share our stories than ever before too. You can join me in my life’s work to honor and remember America’s veterans, from World War II to now, and you can start with me today. **[**Please, Fellow American, in this special 80th anniversary year, make your most generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more, to help support the special mission of the American Veterans Center.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDg5NjkifQ/W39Ng7JbMOvvAyOfc4NgKw)** Thank you for your consideration. God bless you, and God bless America. Sincerely, David YohoWorld War II Veteran _For the American Veterans Center_

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, The day the war ended, I became a World War II veteran – and I was just 16 years old. I had faked my birth certificate to enlist in the U.S. Maritime Service in 1944, and I served on a tanker ship that transported refined oil to the Pacific. Four days after Victory over Japan Day in 1945, I turned 17. Fellow American, as one of America’s youngest World War II veterans, I consider it my sacred duty to inspire the next generation to safeguard the legacy and honor the memories of the men and women who served with me. I’ve given thousands of speeches all across the country about America’s veterans. But who I’m really talking for is the more than 400,000 fallen Americans, the majority of whom were left in foreign soil or in a watery grave during World War II. So whether I’m standing on-stage speaking to hundreds or in a personal conversation with a curious young person, I say the same thing: go look up the stories. The real stories, not just what you got from your history book. Go back to Pont du Hoc and the invasion of Normandy – those were young men climbing straight up a cliff. Go back to the servicemembers who won the war at the Battle of the Bulge, at the cost of more than 19,000 lives lost. Learn about the war contributions that the government took nearly 50 years to acknowledge: the thousands of women who flew bombers from the assembly lines to U.S. military bases, including the 39 who died serving our country, or the real dangers that those in the Maritime Service who were faced with the mortality rate of 1 out of 26, which was the highest rate in WWII (and then came home to be excluded from the GI Bill until the late 1980s!). Fellow American, no other organization does as much to honor America’s veterans – and tell our stories in our own words – as the American Veterans Center. That’s why I’m proud to support them, proud to take part in their excellent programs for veterans, and proud to ask you to join me and my friends at the American Veterans Center for our special mission this year. Fellow American, after you read my note today, I hope you’ll consider making a generous gift to support the work of the American Veterans Center. And I strongly urge you to learn for yourself the stories of the men and women of the World War II generation – and then share those stories with a young person in your life. It’s easier to access this information than ever before, thanks in part to my friends at the American Veterans Center, and it’s easier to share our stories than ever before too. You can join me in my life’s work to honor and remember America’s veterans, from World War II to now, and you can start with me today. Thank you for your consideration. God bless you, and God bless America. Sincerely, David YohoWorld War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Thanks, Peter. =)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Even opening these emails is a big deal
#

Good morning, Peter.
I wanted to send a quick note of thanks for your support for our campaign. I know we send a good number of emails, and I appreciate you opening and donating when you get the chance.
The donations we receive from emails like this allows me to focus my time meeting with Arizonans, doing media and all of the work people across the country may not see every day, but is what we need to do in order to win.
And yes, even opening these emails is a big deal -- so keep on doing that even if you aren't donating to each one (which is not something I expect anyone to do).
All of that is to say that you have my deep and unending gratitude for your support and well-wishes through this process.
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The PRO Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6344%2E5257348%2ENEj5o_)
Hi Derek,
This May Day, I’m celebrating workers across the country, their struggles, and their progress by pledging that California's next U.S. Senator will be a staunch ally of the labor movement.
I’ve been a strong supporter of workers for a long time.
I launched my campaign at the IATSE union hall in Burbank. I’ve marched alongside countless workers fighting for better wages and protections, including striking actors and writers, SEIU members, and many more. **And I’ve fought in Congress to pass legislation to protect workers’ rights to organize their workplace. That’s what I want to talk about today.**
You see, a few years ago, the _Protecting the Right to Organize Act_ (or _PRO Act_ for short) passed with bipartisan support in the House of Representatives.
But because of Mitch McConnell and the Senate filibuster, the bill never stood a chance of receiving a vote in the Senate.
Derek, the _PRO Act_ would begin to turn the tide against a decades-long assault on workers’ rights, from so-called “right to work” laws passed by Republican states to the union-busting efforts of some major corporations.
**Across the country, from California to Chattanooga, TN, workers are organizing to form unions and bargain for better wages and benefits.**
We need to support these workers — and it starts with abolishing the filibuster and passing the _PRO Act_ , so we can send this pro-worker legislation to our most pro-worker president, Joe Biden.
**[Will you stand with workers across California and this country today by adding your name alongside mine, calling on Congress to pass the _Protecting the Right to Organize Act?_](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20240501-may-day-pro-act._nSNGB&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240501_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=6344%2E5257348%2ENEj5o_)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20240501-may-day-pro-act._nSNGB&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240501_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=6344%2E5257348%2ENEj5o_)
---
Thanks for adding your name to stand with the millions of working people across our country. I’m grateful for your support.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/4126?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240501_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=6344%2E5257348%2ENEj5o_)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/4124?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240501_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=6344%2E5257348%2ENEj5o_)
---
