# In-Person Voting Begins Tomorrow.
-
My opponent is a nice guy - but nice and WEAK is not a reason we elect a representative to Congress. Tomorrow, when the in-person voting begins, the question on many voter's minds will be whether their candidate is strong enough to keep their word and end the SWAMP.

Did you know that Neil Parrott SUPPORTS THE INFLATIONARY MASSIVE BILLIONS of your taxpayer dollars being sent to UKRAINE WAR?

On February 17, 2024 at our GOP CD6 Debate he said just that to this question: "Would you end US Foreign Aid to the War in Ukraine?" and he answered, "NO, we have a responsibility to protect UKRAINE."

_HOW ABOUT A RESPONSIBILITY TO PROTECT AMERICA'S BORDERS?!!!_ That's what I believe. After I pointed this out, Neil later said on the day of the $61 BILLION vote he "will look around and see what others do on that issue" and as quoted in The Washington Post he said "I don't know [now] how I'd vote [on $61 BILLION US dollars to send to Ukraine for War]...". That is weak and it is wrong - endangering all of us.

But without your support Maryland could have more of this kind of wishy-washy weak-willed failure to our country.

Yet, there is more than whether we might have to send our sons and daughters to fight in UKRAINE in WWIII.

The differences between my America First real conservative Republican leadership and Neil Parrot's weakness include the following:
* Neil is weak on PRIVACY and SOVEREIGNTY (he won't join me and speak against the WHO Pandemic Treaty and he VOTED for BIG INTERNATIONAL CORPORATIONS TO SELL YOUR BIOMETRIC DATA without your consent - HB 259, 2022).
* Neil is weak on inflationary spending (would send BILLIONS to Ukraine War!).
* Neil is weak on election integrity ("2020's election was not stolen" \- at Asians for Trump dinner, '22 and refused to answer at recent debates).
* Neil is weak on LIFE ("Congress should stay out of the abortion debate" - Balto. Sun 4/11/24).

For my voter guide to print and share with friends who need to know, please see the attached document.
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=ed7c3db3d6&e=5bb5efcda7)
I need to raise our final Primary funding and we are still short. I need urgent fundraising help if you can support me. Now is more important than after the primary at this point since national conservatives will support the winner of the primary. [Click here to help us win](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=1d1cd4b330&e=5bb5efcda7).

[Help me fight the SWAMP with President Trump](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=7a86e68097&e=5bb5efcda7) and have the fuel to run past the finish line on May 14.

Thank you.

Freedom and Victory,

Neil is weak on election integrity ("2020's election was not stolen" \- at Asians for Trump dinner, '22 and refused to answer at recent debates). Neil is weak on LIFE ("Congress should stay out of the abortion debate" - Balto. Sun 4/11/24). For my voter guide to print and share with friends who need to know, please see the attached document. I need to raise our final Primary funding and we are still short. I need urgent fundraising help if you can support me. Now is more important than after the primary at this point since national conservatives will support the winner of the primary. . and have the fuel to run past the finish line on May 14. Thank you. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: **.

name: Mayor Michelle Wu
subject: Why I'm proud this month, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Friends, Colleagues, and Fellow Democrats,
Happy Asian American, Native Hawaiian & Pacific Islander Heritage Month!
This month is an opportunity to reflect on AANHPI history, and celebrate the AANHPI community’s culture, traditions, and contributions. Every day across our city, members of our community work to make Boston a better home for all of us, as they have for generations. My team is proud to carry on that tradition, amplifying the AANHPI voices calling for safety, opportunity, joy, and justice—and doing the work to make that vision a reality.
Boston is home to thriving AANHPI communities with leaders who have shaped our city for generations. Our Chinatown neighborhood—the third largest Chinatown in the country—has produced history-makers like Tunney Lee and Uncle Frank Chin, who dedicated their lives to making Boston a place of belonging for our AANHPI community. In Dorchester, our Vietnamese-American community has nurtured a vibrant community in Fields Corner, with Little Saigon earning an official cultural district designation from the state. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Michelle%20Wu%20Headshot%20%281%29.jpg]
These communities opened doors and pulled up chairs for a new generation of AANHPI leaders. Leaders who are stepping up in cities and towns across Massachusetts. Right next door in Cambridge, I’m proud to be building a coalition with City Manager Yi-An Huang.
It means so much to me to be celebrating this month with all of our Massachusetts Democrats who work tirelessly every day to ensure that we are hearing and honoring AANHPI perspectives, and learning from and celebrating AANHPI history. As the first Asian-American mayor of Boston, I am constantly inspired by the strength and courage of all those who made it possible for me and so many others to lead in our own time.
I am wishing all of you an Asian American, Native Hawaiian & Pacific Islander Month filled with prosperity and connection!
Sincerely,
Mayor Michelle Wu

| | Fellow Conservative, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ca9518f7bf4146a2b1fb45977809bf9e&_e=i-MP-kdYx0aX1BtFVu_dTWF_9YS4JrE8Rk6Q5CEWAsAUwT8gQsHc-QfKz4ZzEyCNLLXF9YIvC881mwha9ZfJ-6y2EIKcU0JGprfFWdzhXQEDjhbcusHL5AGqHkc14CkdVqMaPtC2tXBT-K3Asw_ED5F-DJPYc9wwnVWhNVt2eXM-vbBIuZOnYnaiP9yHuBl3soJgkUBY84bP1YN7UiXRjXajGkGbxPOrJzem-8DfXY3pDzuOghiSLE6GYAoc3L27Sj3nG2WV2SukPcedkc0qMCitVXU7q-H_Cofc1kCIzxOAQiswzm8ZDYoBMcAzvpzCFQZj7ORWCXFIJxhxgbuALl2qZ9II-EkLB8URmHy_kmJqaqZVYlk2l1zMDo_6tr2rRp26plun8yMu-mGUFxkQkNfIkcQnmjq0vm7mYFMP7yUMZLQKC4_craGkUPSzdNX-iUCFaN-ZKwPkH_P5Co2voreuLD17hAWr2YPI3JZSaA7dmUVDF78uViB9FT8_IuU5)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they’d rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ca9518f7bf4146a2b1fb45977809bf9e&_e=i-MP-kdYx0aX1BtFVu_dTWF_9YS4JrE8Rk6Q5CEWAsAUwT8gQsHc-QfKz4ZzEyCNLLXF9YIvC881mwha9ZfJ-6y2EIKcU0JGprfFWdzhXQEDjhbcusHL5AGqHkc14CkdVqMaPtC2tXBT-K3Asw_ED5F-DJPYc9wwnVWhNVt2eXM-vbBIuZOnYnaiP9yHuBl3soJgkUBY84bP1YN7UiXRjXajGkGbxPOrJzem-8DfXY3pDzuOghiSLE6GYAoc3L27Sj3nG2WV2SukPcedkc0qMCitVXU7q-H_Cofc1kCIzxOAQiswzm8ZDYoBMcAzvpzCFQZj7ORWCXFIJxhxgbuALlPWy6Mwd_o7YvQqAh43vzdQTmgcp9yipMjSIVEC64y5R3G8L-fe5Cx-GXD5bQL2AzUJLlmd-pWIf8lqWvUpMQTMy42UHSW8_cYT2OegHIVh6D726EzTIzEXyl9XuDXqKgPQOkBnWfwJoLMjI3DWF9KnQ10HfoVJL85k7ezOjIWG) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There’s no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!

Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. **[**Your prompt support is critical.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ca9518f7bf4146a2b1fb45977809bf9e&_e=i-MP-kdYx0aX1BtFVu_dTWF_9YS4JrE8Rk6Q5CEWAsAUwT8gQsHc-QfKz4ZzEyCNLLXF9YIvC881mwha9ZfJ-6y2EIKcU0JGprfFWdzhXQEDjhbcusHL5AGqHkc14CkdVqMaPtC2tXBT-K3Asw_ED5F-DJPYc9wwnVWhNVt2eXM-vbBIuZOnYnaiP9yHuBl3soJgkUBY84bP1YN7UiXRjXajGkGbxPOrJzem-8DfXY3pDzuOghiSLE6GYAoc3L27Sj3nG2WV2SukPcedkc0qMCitVXU7q-H_Cofc1kCIzxOAQiswzm8ZDYoBMcAzvpzCFQZj7ORWCXFIJxhxgbuALpC3upyPV2ioUgAx-H68Z231RxZEwtw63HKpwC2VIyuK7vmStdWhtnWzU3QmUCnIS6-D-QhOvAB3qkVYunWl44aMKQuLZS0-ZctgSo3g0wYv0Xi2PBXnexJxtldJZ4te0bLtkfB6RyXyTGKBWMyXlELh58FAQaNg4s9eew4zh39i)** Please don’t delay.

name: Team Biden-Harris
subject: Not asking for money.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Today, we’re asking you to take the next step. | | |
---
Peter, Thank you. We know you receive a lot of emails from us, but we’re not asking for money on this one. Instead, we wanted to express our gratitude and ask for your personal endorsement. We are so grateful to have you on this team. You are directly powering our efforts to reach and persuade voters, spread President Biden and Vice President Harris’ message, and open hundreds of field offices across the country! _**Your support matters.**_ It truly makes an impact. | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

name: Bill Eigel for Governor
subject: War in the Missouri Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eigel for Missouri, Thomas Hughes, Treasurer_
body:
Eigel is fighting for life, and he needs your support... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billeigel/war-in-the-missouri-senate?e=c00a6982d2)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | **War in the Missouri Senate**
The Missouri Freedom Caucus is now in its 24th hour of filibustering against The Swamp.

Yesterday, I offered a motion to bring Initiative Petition Reform up for debate. A substitute motion was then offered by the Majority Floor Leader, Senator O'Laughlin, to go to another bill that had nothing to do with IP Reform.

**Senator O'Laughlin** and the **RINO brigade** voted **AGAINST** bringing IP Reform to the floor. Why would she do that? Why is it so hard to get Republicans to act like Republicans?
See how your Senator voted below **⬇️⬇️⬇️**

****
Yesterday on X, [I put out this statement:](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=d7ea887c5f&e=c00a6982d2)

"Until I**P Reform (SJR 74)** is third read and finally passed and **Defund Planned Parenthood (HB 2634)** is signed by the governor, [@MOFreedomCaucus](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=8bb6613567&e=c00a6982d2) will filibuster any attempt to pass the FRA (SB 748). There are three weeks left of session, and I will fight with everything I've got to make sure IP Reform and Defund Planned Parenthood cross the finish line." _**There has still been no movement on these crucial, necessary pieces of legislation. **_
* Defund Planned Parenthood (HB 2634) has yet to be signed by the governor.
* Initiative Petition Reform (SJR 74) has yet to be third read and finally passed by the Senate.

_**Defund Planned Parenthood (HB 2634)**_
The Federal Reimbursement Allowance (FRA) is a multi-billion dollar state/federal funding mechanism, but it has been used to fund abortion providers in the past. Despite both the House and Senate passing a bill prohibiting public dollars from going to abortion providers like Planned Parenthood, _the governor has yet to sign the bill._ Asked when he would sign this bill, [his response ](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=c513a966c6&e=c00a6982d2)was basically - "I'll get around to it when I have time."

_**My[response](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=25d16d7aa3&e=c00a6982d2) to the governor**_
"Conservatives are fighting tooth and nail to ensure that IP Reform passes & Planned Parenthood is defunded. [@GovParsonMO](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=711bd11065&e=c00a6982d2), per usual, has provided zero leadership. With barbaric abortion initiatives breathing down our necks, Parson says, 'I’ll get around to it when I have time.' Missouri deserves better. This town needs a reckoning."

_**Initiative Petition Reform (SJR 74)**_
I have been clear from the VERY beginning of session that I would do EVERYTHING in my power to ensure that Initiative Petition Reform crosses the finish line. Our constitution MUST be protected from these barbaric abortion initiatives funded by out-of-state dark money groups.

We need to pass Initiative Petition Reform to:
1\. Stop abortion from being enshrined into the MO Constitution
2\. Protect our MO Constitution from out-of-state dark money
3\. Ban [non-citizens](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=b964de255f&e=c00a6982d2) and illegals from voting in our elections
4\. Prevent foreign governments from changing our Constitution

Year after year, even though IP Reform has been the stated #1 priority for the Republican Caucus, leadership always finds a way to kill it. This year, it is _**one single vote away **_from the governor's desk.

**Leadership** and the **RINO brigade** need to stop the political shenanigans. No more excuses. We need to pass IP Reform. We need to Defund Planned Parenthood.

In liberty + for the people,

body:
Putting party over country is a nationwide problem. It’s too late to save Barr, McConnell, Sununu, and countless other Republicans from PDS.
|
---
Friend,

You may know someone suffering from PDS and not even know it.
Former Attorney General Bill Barr once said Trump tried to subvert the peaceful transfer of power. Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell blamed Trump for the violence on January 6. New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu said Trump’s rhetoric “contributed to the insurrection.”

And yet, they all want Trump back in the White House. That’s what PDS—[partisan derangement syndrome](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VW_79919Z3trW38Y_Mh2NQ02kW8SvcRS5dzsJDN7FnD143m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3nbN5Kt_PVF1HbkW7c_XFz1QcJ8KW33KZvj5lPr-7W68-1763Vgrz0N2jVB0xn_mW9W3r6yBd7PVHVPW3SWhYK1pvQvBW3CgMJl3Bqj0SW4FXj9g2tRwlkVFJxg44_QkwkW1tV6m14yHyKjW89pVnR57d29qN70NvcjxN502V8kTBQ4L6QbsW5fLlFz6xmvR2W8JXb0s33-W41VzhBg580g44bN2gh5n0qfnFxW62F6Qs6GxbHtW1sdDk03g303PW7Zgy9t2dNZ5jW4mc5X05xr9gff1GjJzM04)—does to people.

Sarah Longwell

body:
have you met Finn?

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84114563/470509308/-1790964741?refcode=mw_em_240501_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3NzgxMy1kMjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2apmBffmr2QrO7yokhmfveHaiiKxRkWOaHe6HOCwU8=) Derek, You may have seen the news that a certain governor – who has been considered to be a potential running mate for Donald Trump – recently bragged about her decision to shoot and kill a 14-month-old “unruly” puppy. I’m a proud dog dad myself. If you’re like me, you consider your dog part of the family. I mean... just look how perfect Finn is! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84114564/470509309/-1790964741?refcode=mw_em_240501_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3NzgxMy1kMjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2apmBffmr2QrO7yokhmfveHaiiKxRkWOaHe6HOCwU8=) I’ve always tried to push for policies to protect animals across the Commonwealth. That’s why I secured the release of nearly 450 beagles from terrible conditions at a breeding facility in Cumberland. That’s why I’ve worked to protect show horses from the cruel and inhumane practice of soring. And that’s why I’ll always push for justice for animals. Let’s elect leaders who help our furry friends, not hurt them. \- Mark Warner [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84114565/470509310/-1790964741?refcode=mw_em_240501_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3NzgxMy1kMjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2apmBffmr2QrO7yokhmfveHaiiKxRkWOaHe6HOCwU8=)

subject: RE: Republican Ballot Harvesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=53fcb211f66948639bb2226fb0c21129&_e=pdFTkixZXxyahqD6FqZ-m9GkvK0SJ4zeMGUP2ZnS5Eu1pDwYOa_EqYGLoNADBT3epDQA__AjyVBC-IsskXDjVCHvDLda1uWfFKZXL5-a62EOxvcEVScCzwwpKQ4qmT_NxKFFTcuKf0Or5sdpBKXbrTAcoDKCBaQMNw0zc-0FxHh3Phvws-4GQBcuHIsjLBr6FX1wMTpsDGW6FMEzJkErDrS1ERAOXboVil8TbJhPSwbKL9ikRmU7sJvbjoF7XcXeEnCxlGw3c2Gt50tkStEzo1Is2MRWXqVxhM9WKY_LFSc7DN5WTuw3Ot5nH-ziaYd6pVt_rD0w18ellqnAgJEe3J7Ybe0e3kHctZFjySlZtfPxYwQgA6rp8-rFMVTzvs9bponbZH0p0rNSVi1Wp7VeqjtwNwNZ9pUfaqBKlmWxx1Q%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=53fcb211f66948639bb2226fb0c21129&_e=pdFTkixZXxyahqD6FqZ-m9GkvK0SJ4zeMGUP2ZnS5Eu1pDwYOa_EqYGLoNADBT3epDQA__AjyVBC-IsskXDjVCHvDLda1uWfFKZXL5-a62EOxvcEVScCzwwpKQ4qmT_NxKFFTcuKf0Or5sdpBKXbrTAcoDKCBaQMNw0zc-0FxHh3Phvws-4GQBcuHIsjLBr6FX1wMTpsDGW6FMEzJkErDrS1ERAOXboVil8TbJhPSwbKL9ikRmU7sJvbjoF7XcXeEnCxlGw3c2Gt50tkStEzo0svo0flNrbp3U5bpVkV00Eud1AFMrqQftRXH2vqBzZijYX5-bBlp6bcMGvHiebBzjDYKH927mySOeGyQSm4s6ja5EC8Ji196tbSDTiT7YDcMM54nZleo1ds0WKJIsV2vYXb9GmhhHggUfl2FaGlk7w%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents. There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. body:

Friend, I'm sorry to start this email with bad news, but I don't have anywhere else to turn.
**New polling shows this Ohio race is still tight, which is not where we want to be in a race that could decide Senate control.**
The good news is there's still time to right the ship – but we must act NOW. I set a personal goal to raise $100,000, and I'm counting on you to help us get there by midnight: [**Please, friend, will you split $5 or more right now between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84115190/470511219/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5006-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2E0NDA4Mi1kMjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=__AqkQ8bxhZ8lXGAJ8ymcXXWPUmv0zCAPpdt8xv18qk=)
The stakes couldn't be higher. Reproductive freedom, affordable health care, our fight for the Dignity of Work, and more are on the line.
We have so much to fight for, but it's going to be a tough one. Right now, my wealthy opponents are pouring millions of dollars of their own money into this race.
**But with your grassroots support at this critical moment, I know we can turn this around and win. Your support is how I've won every tough race before, and I'm counting on you to come through now.**
[**Please, will you split $5, $25, or any amount at all between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s to help us reach this goal before midnight? name: VoteVets.org
subject: The stormy present
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
"The dogmas of the quiet past are inadequate to the stormy present.”
#
Derek,
**There is absolutely nothing more important than making sure Democrats win a large and sweeping victory this fall** — from the presidency, the Senate, the House, state legislatures and all the way down to local offices.
We all have a role to play in making sure that happens.
**As the last great Republican president, Abraham Lincoln, once said, "The dogmas of the quiet past are inadequate to the stormy present. The occasion is piled high with difficulty, and we must rise with the occasion"**
We all must rise to the occasion.
Some run for office. Some make phone calls and knock doors. At VoteVets, we're running some of the most powerful ads of the cycle — ads that swing races.
**Hopefully supporting our efforts is part of your calling for this election.** And as we finalize some budgets for fights ahead, there's no better time than today.
[**Use this link to contribute $5, $25, $100 or more to VoteVets to help us ensure Democrats win sweeping victories in the races that determine the White House, Congress and other races across the country.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-may24.RUuZX0&refcode=em240501-1-30&t=1&akid=25084%2E3013755%2E87u2k9)**

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84116466/470515642/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2NlNGUyZi1kNDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fo3AbUqTKCfQZAimwQcdblC15-FnfdPhz98CSdhi5xw=) Once again, this coalition delivered. **Last night, thanks to hundreds of supporters like you, we hit our April fundraising goal.** We’re about to take this campaign to the next level by hiring even more incredible team members who will help us knock every door and talk to as many voters as we can about what’s at stake in this election. **Michigan’s 8th District will be a battleground like no other.** Control of the House will be decided here – and with it the fate of abortion rights, health care and support for Michigan’s working families. Thanks again for your support,

| |

| | | | | | **TRUMP RALLY IS RUINED?!**
---

Get a load of this, Friend.

**Joe Biden is calling on the liberal MOB of Democrats to destroy President Trump 's huge upcoming MAGA rally in Wisconsin.**

This can't come at a worse time, to be honest with you.
__** FIRST:**__
President Trump announced he is holding a HUGE rally in Wisconsin to stand with working class Americans & the Pro Trump conservatives Joe Biden wants to put in unemployment lines.

__** THEN:**__
BIDEN saw the latest poll that has President Trump beating him by 10% of the vote in 2024.

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Re: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Donald Trump is holding a rally TODAY in Waukesha.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2532%2E35263%2E2Lnm-R)
Peter — We wanted to make sure you saw Tammy’s message: Donald Trump is holding a MAGA rally TODAY in Waukesha. Before he takes the stage this afternoon, we need to be prepared to fight back. Rush a donation to help us defend Tammy against whatever attacks Trump throws her way at today’s rally: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/tbe-em-may24](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may24.HLGTSS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240501_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2532%2E35263%2E2Lnm-R)** \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tammy Baldwin
Date: Tue, Apr 30, 2024 Peter — I wanted to make sure you saw this: Donald Trump is coming back to Wisconsin tomorrow. At his last MAGA rally here in April, he raised the stakes of this race. He reaffirmed his intentions of winning our state’s presidential election like he did in 2016. He endorsed my Republican opponent. He even directly attacked me from the stage. We may not know exactly what Trump will say about me or this Senate race at tomorrow’s rally. But we do know this: **Wisconsin’s Senate race is tied, and Trump’s visit will give our opponent yet another surge of momentum.** **[We need to be prepared to fight back. Will you chip in to help us build the resources we’ll need to respond?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-may24.HLGTSS&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240501_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2532%2E35263%2E2Lnm-R)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-may24.viyL1N&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240501_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2532%2E35263%2E2Lnm-R)

Before he takes the stage this afternoon, we need to be prepared to fight back. Rush a donation to help us defend Tammy against whatever attacks Trump throws her way at today’s rally: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Tammy Baldwin Date: Tue, Apr 30, 2024 Peter — I wanted to make sure you saw this: Donald Trump is coming back to Wisconsin tomorrow. At his last MAGA rally here in April, he raised the stakes of this race. He reaffirmed his intentions of winning our state’s presidential election like he did in 2016. He endorsed my Republican opponent. He even directly attacked me from the stage. We may not know exactly what Trump will say about me or this Senate race at tomorrow’s rally. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84119250/470524460/-120062714?refcode=WTEFEQ02_20240501_SapphirePoll_ND_v1s1&sourceid=1053584&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2NlYzNmYS1kNjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r0jIB4lHWIdl8NIA8bYUJIsjH6r1HAyiK5PDCTFOau0=) Peter, I need you to see this.

The latest polls just revealed that Democratic pro-choice women are on the cusp of winning FOUR battleground U.S. Senate seats in this election:
* **Jacky Rosen** could **WIN** in Nevada.
* **Elissa Slotkin** could **WIN** in Michigan.
* **Tammy Baldwin** could **WIN** in Wisconsin.
* **Debbie Mucarsel-Powell** could **WIN** in Florida.

These FOUR Senate seats could decide the fate of our majority — and the future of reproductive freedom for generations to come. But we'll ONLY win if we have the resources to connect with every last voter in make-or-break races like these. I crunched the numbers, and if **4,374 supporters** spring into action, we can throw a serious wrench in Republicans' hopes of regaining the Senate and enacting a draconian nationwide abortion ban. | |
---
**Derek,**
Tomorrow is going to be a pivotal point for our campaign, and I'm extending a personal invitation for you to join us!
From the beginning, this campaign has been about who we can trust as our next Governor to build on our conservative successes, leaving a better New Hampshire for our kids and our grandkids.
Tomorrow's rally embodies all that and more, featuring live music, food, a cash bar, special guest speakers, and supporters from across our Granite State.
**Doors open at 5:30pm** **Speakers begin at 6:45pm**
**Email: Maya@chuckmorsefornh.com to RSVP** **Or support our campaign by purchasing a ticket/sponsorship[ HERE](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)**
Thank you for your continued support and dedication to our conservative cause.
Yours in Liberty,
Chuck Morse Candidate for Governor
| [Buy A Ticket](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)

As we head into May, we must keep our momentum going. | |
---
Hi Derek, Exciting news today! One of my favorite things happened in April. **We not only hit our fundraising goal --_we surpassed it!_** Our mission to support President Biden, Vice President Harris, and Democrats across the country relies on grassroots supporters like you. **But as we head into May, we have to keep our momentum going -- our goals get higher and higher each month.** In the last few months, we’ve seen Trump and his MAGA allies ramp up their fundraising. That’s why we can’t slow down. MAGA extremists are going to continue pouring _millions_ of dollars into attacking Democrats across the country, and we need to fight back. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Must-read book on the Electoral College
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend,

It's one of the most IMPORTANT issues for Americans
to understand this year.

But until this week, no one on the Right was
talking about it ... and everyone on the Left was lying about it.

I'm referring to the Electoral College, the
Founding Father's brilliant system for preserving our FREEDOM -
and today, it's safeguarding America from the destruction of the
"Woke" Left.

Get your FREE booklet today with your gift to
Turning Point USA!

Friend, I want to get my booklet on the Electoral
College to as many grassroots patriots as possible …
because this is an URGENT ISSUE for America's future.

Can I send you a FREE copy of The Electoral
College: Critical to Our Republic right away? All I ask for in
exchange is a gift of ANY amount to support Turning Point USA.

Make your gift and get your book!

The Electoral College: Critical to Our Republic
will explain the history and purpose of the Electoral College in
a clear, compelling way - and it's written for an audience of
constitutional conservatives like YOU.

You'll learn why this system is one of the greatest
safeguards against the tyranny of the majority and why we must do
everything in our power to protect it. And you'll also discover:

The Founding Fathers' brilliant reasoning
behind the Electoral College,

How the Electoral College is a firewall against
tyranny and bad government,

Why the Left is desperate to abolish the
Electoral College ... and the lies they've told to try to do it,
and

What YOU must know about the Electoral College
in this critical year for America's future.

Friend, please claim YOUR copy of The Electoral
College: Critical to Our Republic right away by making your
generous gift of ANY amount - even just $5 - to support the
critical work of Turning Point USA this year.

Make your gift and get your book!

I can only continue this offer while supplies of
this booklet last at Turning Point USA, so please don't miss your
opportunity!

With your gift of ANY amount, even just $5, you'll
get the facts you need to defend the Electoral College against
the Left's relentless attacks…

…and you will help Turning Point USA inspire
THOUSANDS of America-loving young people to pick up the mantle of
our Founding Fathers and register to vote this year.

Please make your most generous gift of ANY amount
to Turning Point USA - even just $5 - to receive YOUR copy of The
Electoral College: Critical to Our Republic.

Together, we can defend the brilliant system our
Founding Fathers gave us AND inspire young people to love America
again.

Thank you for your support.

For America,

Charlie Kirk

Founder & CEO

Turning Point USA

Make your gift and get your book!

4940 East Beverly Road

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

| | | **It's time to[expand the Supreme Court, and restore balance](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0041128c-80ed-4654-a8f2-4c0c4cd2f090/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in place of extremism.** The right-wing majority on the Supreme Court will soon decide whether Trump is above the law and has "total immunity" from crimes he committed while in office, potentially delaying Trump's Jan 6 trial until after the election, leaving the possibility for him to win and pardon himself -- **and making him free to commit whatever crimes he wants in a second term. ** The fact that we are even in this situation shows that the Supreme Court is in dire need of reform, or expansion. Trump was able to appoint THREE Supreme Court justices with life-long terms during his disastrous presidency, and now they can do his bidding from their seats on the most powerful court in the country. [**This is extremely dangerous, and threatens our democracy. And we must do something about it.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0985d46d-524a-4ecc-a67f-0ce9dabd6969/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The Supreme Court has been chipping away at our rights, and now our democracy is at stake. We need Congress to step in and pass legislation to check the Supreme Court's power – whether that's term limits, ethics reform, adding seats to the court to weaken the right-wing majority's power, or something else – and it needs to happen now. [**Sign your name: Tell Congress to reform and expand the Supreme Court!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T576323c8-01c2-4796-8fde-adb7d7f66bcc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

#### [Read The Article](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6632a882a1d4846e99d8ea5c&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2024%2F04%2F28%2Falaska-ballot-petitions-in-the-works-to-mandate-hand-counting-in-person-voting%2FThank&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6632a71d9d53626191e522fd&l=en-US&s=9-gd0fgI8haVDX-gXggFqMM14rk%3D)
---
#### We have already made the news for our new petitions...
"One of the architects behind the ongoing effort to do away with Alaska’s controversial ranked-choice voting system is already working on two more ballot petitions in a multi-pronged effort to cut down on voter fraud.Phil Izon, who spearheaded a grassroots effort of volunteers in successfully gathering enough signatures to ensure that Alaskans have an opportunity to repeal ranked choice voting this coming November, has written two other petitions that would drastically limit absentee and mail-in voting, while requiring hand-counting of ballots." Step 1: we will need to get our proposed legislation signed and sponsored by 100+ registered voters in Alaska. We already have 125 people signed up to this list, last petition we submitted 180+ signatures. We will provide the document, you need to sign it and then mail it back to us so we can submit them by June 1st. Once we have the 100+ Sponsors we will then submit our two petitions to the Lt. Governor for approval, that process takes 60 days, so by Mid-August we should be collecting signatures. https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/future-volunteers-list
---
#### [**We have started the work on another petition**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6632a882a1d4846e99d8ea5c&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2Ffuture-volunteers-list%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6632a71d9d53626191e522fd%26ss_email_id%3D6632a882a1d4846e99d8ea5c%26ss_campaign_name%3DJoin%2BOur%2BAdvisory%2BBoard%252C%2BVolunteer%252C%2Band%2BHelp%2BUs%2BWith%2BNew%2BPetitions%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-05-01T20%253A39%253A54Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6632a71d9d53626191e522fd&l=en-US&s=RkjV25RFc2xCDUEXCeEXxxHcVN0%3D)
#### [**Join Us, By Adding Your Name To The List, Help Us Today!!!**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6632a882a1d4846e99d8ea5c&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2Ffuture-volunteers-list%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6632a71d9d53626191e522fd%26ss_email_id%3D6632a882a1d4846e99d8ea5c%26ss_campaign_name%3DJoin%2BOur%2BAdvisory%2BBoard%252C%2BVolunteer%252C%2Band%2BHelp%2BUs%2BWith%2BNew%2BPetitions%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-05-01T20%253A39%253A54Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6632a71d9d53626191e522fd&l=en-US&s=RkjV25RFc2xCDUEXCeEXxxHcVN0%3D)
---
I’ve finished writing two more petitions. Both election related, 1: Require precinct level counting with hand counting, also requires to have tabulation done asap, so we can get election results day of or next day. No more machines. 2\. We are going to modify existing absentee laws so they are only available to a limited population. The new law stipulates that all eligible voters must cast their ballots in person unless they meet certain exceptions such as being 65 years of age or older, disabled, out of the county during the elections, about to give birth, or confined in jail. Many I’ve talk to say my three pieces of Legislation below led by citizen initiative will cut down on 90% of voter fraud. Our elections will be far more Free, Fair, and Honest 1\. Repeal Jungle Primary and RCV 2\. Require Hand Counting at Precinct Level 3\. New law stipulates that all eligible voters must cast their ballots in person unless they meet certain exceptions such as being 65 years of age or older, disabled, out of the county during the elections, about to give birth, or confined in jail. Join me today and help us, we need 1\. Volunteers to help with signature gathering 2\. Advisory board members to help keep us on track 3\. People sharing our messages and get out the vote this November 5th and tell everyone you know hundreds of times to Vote Yes to Repeal. Big money millionaires and billionaires have a big target on Alaska. Our future is not for them to decide regardless of their money. Read Below
---

#### **Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.**
#### **The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**
#### _**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**_
#### _**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**_
#### _**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_
---
This is who is funding the [#RankedChoiceVoting](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6632a882a1d4846e99d8ea5c&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6632a71d9d53626191e522fd&l=en-US&s=kMKD3xIInCicMtkTaDA_KNxHL5U%3D) group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,”
---
---
|
---
Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes.https://thefederalist.com/2024/04/18/dark-money-group-backed-by-foreign-billionaire-has-dumped-100-million-into-state-ballot-initiatives/1630 Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:**Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals.
** (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure.

(b) The provisions of this section prohibit a foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national from making a contribution or expenditure in connection with a state election only to the

**I’m not the only one who’s worried about**[**#RankedChoiceVoting**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6632a882a1d4846e99d8ea5c&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6632a71d9d53626191e522fd&l=en-US&s=kMKD3xIInCicMtkTaDA_KNxHL5U%3D)**impact on vulnerable voters** Washington Secretary of State Steve Hobbs (Democrat) to discuss his opposition to RCV. Here is what Secretary Hobbs told us: “Ranked-choice voting adds a layer of complexity to voting that threatens to disenfranchise people who aren’t experts at the process. This includes people living with developmental disabilities – such as my son – for whom choosing one candidate is more straightforward than figuring out how to rank a list of them. Additionally, it can be a challenge for newly-naturalized citizens to adapt to American elections. Converting some elections to ranked-choice voting would increase the obstacles to exercising their rights as Americans. Top-two primaries present none of these challenges. You pick your favorite, then you send in your ballot. That’s something people can easily grasp. I stand firmly behind Top Two and encourage other states to learn from our usage of it.” Secretary Hobbs also recently told Crosscut: “Oh, I have lots of feelings about ranked-choice voting. I’m completely against ranked-choice voting; I used to be for it. But when you occupy this office, you have to take a step back and look at how elections affect everyone. Right? You know, the top three things, transparency, accessibility and security is what I look at. And then just with my own personal situation, my mom came to this country, she didn’t know any English. You know, we both learned by watching Sesame Street. And then my middle son is a child with special needs. So imagine, if you will, a naturalized citizen where English is not their first language, receiving a ballot, where they have to vote by ranked choice? How are they going to do that? They don’t know how to do that . . . And that’s why I am no longer for ranked-choice voting because you will disenfranchise people. They will not take full advantage of their vote because they don’t understand what they’re doing.”
---
---
|
---
**Overview of Election Types and Systems** The recent elections comprised various types, including Special Primary, Special General, Regular Primary, and Regular General elections. Each election type presented its own set of rules and systems. Notably, both the Special General Election and the Regular Primary occurred simultaneously. The Special General employed a Top 4 Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) system, whereas the Regular Primary followed a simpler system where voters were to select just one candidate. Complexity of Simultaneous Elections The concurrent scheduling of the Special General Election (using a Top 4 RCV system) and the Regular Primary (select one candidate system) undoubtedly introduced complexities. Voters received a single ballot that included both election types, potentially leading to significant confusion. This complexity was especially pronounced because the instructions for the Regular Primary (to choose one candidate) could easily be mistaken as applicable to the Special General Election as well. Voter Confusion and Election Outcomes The confusion among voters is highlighted by the election outcomes. In the Special General, a Democrat secured victory with 75,000 votes, despite Republican candidates collectively garnering 112,000 votes. This result suggests a significant portion of voters may have followed the Regular Primary’s instructions, opting to vote for only one candidate in the Special General as well. Such a scenario would inadvertently skew the effectiveness of the RCV system, where ranking multiple candidates is crucial. Introduction of Ranked Choice Voting Adding to the electoral confusion was the introduction of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) for Alaskans. As their first experience with RCV, many voters were unfamiliar with its mechanisms, which require voters to rank candidates by preference. The presence of both a new voting system and dual election types on the same ballot likely contributed to unintended voting behaviors and unexpected election results. Implications and Reflections The overlap of different voting instructions and the debut of RCV evidently had a profound impact on voter behavior and the election’s outcome. This scenario underscores the need for clear communication and voter education, particularly when implementing new voting technologies or systems. Ensuring that voters are well-informed and understand the distinctions between concurrent elections is crucial for the integrity and accuracy of electoral processes.

"One of the architects behind the ongoing effort to do away with Alaska’s controversial ranked-choice voting system is already working on two more ballot petitions in a multi-pronged effort to cut down on voter fraud.Phil Izon, who spearheaded a grassroots effort of volunteers in successfully gathering enough signatures to ensure that Alaskans have an opportunity to repeal ranked choice voting this coming November, has written two other petitions that would drastically limit absentee and mail-in voting, while requiring hand-counting of ballots." Step 1: we will need to get our proposed legislation signed and sponsored by 100+ registered voters in Alaska. We already have 125 people signed up to this list, last petition we submitted 180+ signatures. We will provide the document, you need to sign it and then mail it back to us so we can submit them by June 1st. Once we have the 100+ Sponsors we will then submit our two petitions to the Lt. Governor for approval, that process takes 60 days, so by Mid-August we should be collecting signatures. I’ve finished writing two more petitions. Both election related, 1: Require precinct level counting with hand counting, also requires to have tabulation done asap, so we can get election results day of or next day. No more machines. 2\. We are going to modify existing absentee laws so they are only available to a limited population. The new law stipulates that all eligible voters must cast their ballots in person unless they meet certain exceptions such as being 65 years of age or older, disabled, out of the county during the elections, about to give birth, or confined in jail. Join me today and help us, we need 1\. Volunteers to help with signature gathering 2\. Advisory board members to help keep us on track 3\. People sharing our messages and get out the vote this November 5th and tell everyone you know hundreds of times to Vote Yes to Repeal. Big money millionaires and billionaires have a big target on Alaska. Our future is not for them to decide regardless of their money. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes. Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Peter, I'm Counting on You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
“Here stands a chance—an opportunity for me to pivot the nature of our governance.”

|
---
| | | | [**“Here stands a chance—an opportunity for me to pivot the nature of our governance.”**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=1)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
Right now, we are facing monumental challenges that could shape our nation for generations to come, and the solutions we need cannot be found in the status quo.
With stakes this high, stepping forward with determination is our only option. But before I go on, _I need to ask you to stay in this fight with me._
This campaign advances solely through the contributions of faithful supporters like you. This is a team effort, and _I can’t do it without 100% participation from every single friend we have_!
[If you are receiving this email and haven’t yet donated, please consider chipping in $5, $10 or whatever you can spare.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=5) I need you!
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=6)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=75&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=7)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=20&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=8)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=9)
---
I can win this election, but we can't do it without your help. _And here are three reasons why we must win:_
1. I believe that neither President Biden nor President Trump will navigate us through the looming debt crisis that threatens our country's very foundation.
2. Their strategies fall short in confronting the perpetual foreign conflicts. There’s no sign that either will halt the relentless cycle of these forever wars.
3. Nor do I see them severing the ties of vested interests that have led to the corporate capture of crucial agencies — whether it’s the Military Industrial Complex’s hold on the CIA, Big Pharma’s influence on the NIH, CDC, and FDA, or the USDA’s sway under Big Ag.

If either Biden or Trump are elected, change will only graze the surface; we’re likely to see minor shifts in policy areas like taxation or abortion rights, but not the sweeping reforms we so desperately need.
No, they won’t dismantle our democracy within their term—the resilience of American institutions is formidable—their presidencies are simply not set to veer away from the well-worn path of politics as usual.
But here stands a chance—an opportunity for me to pivot the nature of our governance, to rejuvenate the spirit of our democracy, and to rebuild our nation's standing on a global scale.
| | **"Here stands a chance—an opportunity for me to pivot the nature of our governance."**
---
—Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
This is about instilling a foreign policy not predicated on the show of military might but on the strength of our economy and the power of our values.
The possibility of enacting such pivotal change, of steering our country back to its principled course, is a calling too pivotal to ignore.
That's why the thought of backing down from this contest doesn’t cross my mind.
The prospect of what we can achieve together is immense, demanding unwavering commitment and a relentless pursuit of the vision we share for America.
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=10)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=75&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=11)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=20&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=12)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=13)
---
[I am asking you for your donation today.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=my_mission_nd_5_1_24_nd3&n=14) I know I can count on you!
| |

Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

clean_body: “Here stands a chance—an opportunity for me to pivot the nature of our governance.” | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Right now, we are facing monumental challenges that could shape our nation for generations to come, and the solutions we need cannot be found in the status quo. With stakes this high, stepping forward with determination is our only option. But before I go on, I need to ask you to stay in this fight with me. This campaign advances solely through the contributions of faithful supporters like you. This is a team effort, and I can’t do it without 100% participation from every single friend we have! I need you! | I can win this election, but we can't do it without your help. And here are three reasons why we must win: 1. I believe that neither President Biden nor President Trump will navigate us through the looming debt crisis that threatens our country's very foundation. 2. Their strategies fall short in confronting the perpetual foreign conflicts. There’s no sign that either will halt the relentless cycle of these forever wars. 3. Nor do I see them severing the ties of vested interests that have led to the corporate capture of crucial agencies — whether it’s the Military Industrial Complex’s hold on the CIA, Big Pharma’s influence on the NIH, CDC, and FDA, or the USDA’s sway under Big Ag. If either Biden or Trump are elected, change will only graze the surface; we’re likely to see minor shifts in policy areas like taxation or abortion rights, but not the sweeping reforms we so desperately need. No, they won’t dismantle our democracy within their term—the resilience of American institutions is formidable—their presidencies are simply not set to veer away from the well-worn path of politics as usual. But here stands a chance—an opportunity for me to pivot the nature of our governance, to rejuvenate the spirit of our democracy, and to rebuild our nation's standing on a global scale. | | "Here stands a chance—an opportunity for me to pivot the nature of our governance." —Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. This is about instilling a foreign policy not predicated on the show of military might but on the strength of our economy and the power of our values. The possibility of enacting such pivotal change, of steering our country back to its principled course, is a calling too pivotal to ignore. That's why the thought of backing down from this contest doesn’t cross my mind. The prospect of what we can achieve together is immense, demanding unwavering commitment and a relentless pursuit of the vision we share for America. | I know I can count on you! | | Sincerely, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

I've got a lot to say -- but let me start by saying THANK YOU for all the support you've given me since I launched my campaign for the United States Senate. Stepping out of the newsroom and into the rough, brutal world of politics was never easy. Thankfully, everyone I've met along the way has made it all worth it.

The donations I've received have helped me maintain an election-winning campaign, and we're entering into the most important time of this election cycle. Without my grassroots supporters, we would never be able to keep fighting. I can't do this without you; that's why I hate to ask you again, but there's just too much on the line this November.

Can you help me reach my emergency midnight fundraising goal? We're just over 6 months out from Election Day, and **[I'd appreciate any help you can send me.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=8d39bb269ed845e68d86a9109a8a61fa&_e=WGT8XK0rl-03LIsIEIZYImDMR2WCBc_3A529IcGQTtj7Bq27JXFL-Ru2A7xb_wlGpA4nynYBctf5ViiSBp_Mz3GXwapM9mm9fakDIT4uVjH55asBx1Wh_Xh_c_qJZmhk2lwS7mDE3dx9yWpGsvYR-80BzAtYrTISjcjjvRwvJrhz-E0E6HjDNz58uY4-3HVWOrRWQaA9JqfOMWpG0vK4CauDBmZwXqUa5B3r7PD2Vl6oWBu0PI7G5dSY2z5KOF0W9dZmO_hoBg-kdgpwIaFLYsDwCNxidNwcJE_C6mkGCrLN43i2Y38U7eC_xa3-gQcbeiOnC0dGKjzsm5vSzjL2nw84RlkpVMtpC0Oa_aQcdR7LUpAUHRtS_NRs5cStV0coO0h9Bac4gMP8zKg0BclCsw%3D%3D)**

****We absolutely must win this election. The Senate majority rides on this race.****

name: Charles Schumer
subject: I understand if it seems like all hope is lost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
but that couldn't be further from the truth:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84124722/470540409/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1171-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTIyYjlmNjEtZGUwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nAyvaBx6IgViLXEAVITR-pIBdfJK9v0qcp3qRri97gA=)
Hi, friend. Chuck Schumer here, and there's something I need you to understand: **This November, not only is our one-seat Senate majority at stake — but so is the future of reproductive rights nationwide.**
I know Florida's already facing the sobering reality of extreme limits on abortion, and it'll only get worse now that DeSantis' six-week ban is in effect.
That's why I'm _thrilled_ Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running to defeat Rick Scott and his massive personal fortune. **But I just got word from DMP HQ that they’re 42% behind on their crucial $60,000 goal.**
**With so much on the line, I can't sit and watch as Scott's expensive ads threaten her chances. So I've got to ask: [Will you chip in $5 by midnight to help her close the shortfall and stay on track to kick out Rick?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84124723/470540410/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1171-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTIyYjlmNjEtZGUwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nAyvaBx6IgViLXEAVITR-pIBdfJK9v0qcp3qRri97gA=)**

---
Between Democrats defending what experts call the "Senate map from hell" and Floridians bracing for a heartless crackdown on personal freedoms leveled by some of the most extreme far-right leaders in the nation, I understand if it seems like all hope is lost.
**But believe me, friend — it couldn't be further from the case.**
See, this November, Florida has an incredible opportunity to turn the tides: **Both an initiative to enshrine the right to abortion in the state constitution _and_ a competitor to retire Rick Scott will be on the ballot.**
If enough Floridians come out to demand the GOP stands down, not only would it reinstate reproductive health care access across the Sunshine State .._. **it could also be what ends Rick Scott's Senate career.**_
**And if that happens, we might just be able to keep the Senate blue ... and _finally_ get federal protections for abortion across the finish line. **
But the _only_ way we do that is if Debbie Mucarsel-Powell has your support ahead of major deadlines like the one tonight —**[so please friend, will you donate $5, $25, or anything right now to help her reach her $60,000 goal, beat her anti-choice opponent, save our Senate majority and reproductive rights with it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84124725/470540412/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1171-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTIyYjlmNjEtZGUwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nAyvaBx6IgViLXEAVITR-pIBdfJK9v0qcp3qRri97gA=)**

clean_body: but that couldn't be further from the truth: | | | = Hi, friend. Chuck Schumer here, and there's something I need you to understand: This November, not only is our one-seat Senate majority at stake — but so is the future of reproductive rights nationwide. I know Florida's already facing the sobering reality of extreme limits on abortion, and it'll only get worse now that DeSantis' six-week ban is in effect. That's why I'm thrilled Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running to defeat Rick Scott and his massive personal fortune. But I just got word from DMP HQ that they’re 42% behind on their crucial $60,000 goal. With so much on the line, I can't sit and watch as Scott's expensive ads threaten her chances. So I've got to ask: = | | = Between Democrats defending what experts call the "Senate map from hell" and Floridians bracing for a heartless crackdown on personal freedoms leveled by some of the most extreme far-right leaders in the nation, I understand if it seems like all hope is lost. But believe me, friend — it couldn't be further from the case. See, this November, Florida has an incredible opportunity to turn the tides: Both an initiative to enshrine the right to abortion in the state constitution and a competitor to retire Rick Scott will be on the ballot. If enough Floridians come out to demand the GOP stands down, not only would it reinstate reproductive health care access across the Sunshine State ... it could also be what ends Rick Scott's Senate career. And if that happens, we might just be able to keep the Senate blue ... and finally get federal protections for abortion across the finish line. But the only way we do that is if Debbie Mucarsel-Powell has your support ahead of major deadlines like the one tonight —= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for reading, Chuck Schumer Senate Majority Leader | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com/ [https://ericswalwell.com/]
Month after month, we ask a lot of you. So, thank you, friend. It's grassroots supporters like you who fuel my daily fight to end the MAGA circus once and for all.

I'll be frank: It's tough battling MAGA clowns in Congress. With everyday Americans being held hostage by the MAGA-influenced clown caucus, our resolve must only strengthen.

This November, we face a crucial decision—whether to have an America dominated by chaos or one defined by community. The stakes for the future of our nation couldn't be higher. That's why I'm in the trenches, fighting to help elect Democrats, send the MAGA circus packing, and reclaim the House.

Thank you, friend, for empowering this fight. Together, we will champion an America about community this November. If you're with me, please consider donating today to continue our battle against MAGA clowns tomorrow and beyond. body:
Your generosity and dedication have propelled us forward in our mission to flip this seat and take back the House, and I am truly grateful for each and every one of you.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84125167/470541826/180180251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODcxZmFhYS1kZjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZKiVvxIQUOP3iOaf8E3Jw9u_zU9uPwrLEOuPMKtWWU=)
Peter,

On this International Workers' Day, I want to take a moment to acknowledge the hardworking men and women who make our communities thrive. **I am proud to stand with the working people of Iowa and will always fight to ensure their voices are heard and their rights are protected.**

I am also thrilled to share some exciting news with you today. **Thanks to the incredible support of our grassroots team, we reached our end-of-month fundraising goal for April and are steadily chipping away at the cash-on-hand gap with Mariannette Miller-Meeks.** Your generosity and dedication have propelled us forward in our mission to flip this seat and take back the House, and I am truly grateful for each and every one of you.

As we celebrate this achievement, **I am more fired up than ever to continue fighting alongside you.** Together, we are making real progress in our campaign to create positive change for the people of Iowa and beyond.

Thank you so much,

Christina

name: Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska
subject: Nancy Dahlstrom Denounces Peltola's Anti-Alaskan Vote Against Energy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska
body:
*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|*

View this email in your browser

<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=67341&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=59260>

May 1, 2024
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
CONTACT: Houston Keene
press@nancyforalaska.com

Nancy Dahlstrom Denounces Peltola's Anti-Alaskan Vote Against Energy

ANCHORAGE, AK - If you need another reminder that Mary Peltola is more
concerned with backing Joe Biden's agenda rather than supporting
Alaskan families; look no further than her latest vote.

On Wednesday, Peltola voted present on a bill that would stifle
American energy dominance and further knee cap Alaska's economy by
shutting down development in the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge (ANWR).

In fact, it goes one step further in allowing unelected bureaucrats
like Interior Secretary Deb Haaland to delay and even block development
within the ANWR by pushing decades-long environmental impact studies -
all while allowing energy costs
<https://platform.gulfpartyline.com/email/go?c=67341&s=93E87E38-2FE8-4BC
3-A904-E168017696C1&u=59261> to increase on Alaska families.

Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom released the following statement
condemning Peltola's latest anti-Alaskan vote.

"It should come as no surprise to Alaskans that Mary Peltola is putting
party politics ahead of our state's needs. Her present vote is nothing
more than a smokescreen that hurts Alaska's economy and our people. It's
a position that lacks the courage and conviction our state deserves in
Washington, all for the sake of scoring political points with Joe
Biden," Nancy Dahlstrom said in a statement. "Peltola's latest vote is
yet another reminder that it will never be Alaska first when her seat
is on the line. As your congresswoman, I will ensure Alaska continues
to grow as one of our nation's top energy producers."

To learn more about Lt. Gov. Dahlstrom's campaign for Congress, you can
visit https://nancyforalaska.com/

name: Dave Min for Congress
subject: Dave Min Champions AAPI Equity and Safety During AAPI Heritage Month
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1addeb0cbecd/dave-min-champions-aapi-equity-and-safety-during-aapi-heritage-month-16195919?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** May 1, 2023
**Contact:**[**press@davemin.com**](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**Red-to-Blue Democratic Congressional Candidate Dave Min Champions AAPI Equity and Safety During AAPI Heritage Month**
**IRVINE, CA** — The Dave Min for Congress campaign proudly celebrates Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) Heritage Month, recognizing the profound and diverse contributions of AAPI individuals to California's cultural, social, and economic landscape, as well as to our nation as a whole. As the only Korean American serving in the Legislature, Senator Dave Min is at the forefront of efforts to combat anti-Asian hate and amplify the voices of the AAPI community. While serving as Vice Chair of the California AAPI Legislative Caucus, Senator Min worked tirelessly to tackle the recent surge in anti-Asian hate and championed historic state investments, including the multi-year AAPI Equity Budget, which has funded over 80 community-based organizations statewide.

**"Throughout my career, I have aimed to safeguard the opportunities that hard work and the American Dream have afforded my family,"** Senator Min stated. **"In these challenging times, as the AAPI community confronts alarming levels of bigotry and violence, I have proudly advocated for hate crime legislation in California and stood with leaders who forcefully denounce AAPI hate. I’ve worked hard to ensure that the AAPI community is ably represented, including authoring legislation and budget requests to foster more language access for those who do not speak English as a first language, and to promote greater safety in public spaces. As a father of three young children, I am absolute in my dedication to ensure AAPI representation in government and to advocate for families throughout Orange County."**

In the wake of increased anti-Asian sentiment during the COVID-19 pandemic, Senator Min played a key role in enacting the historic AAPI Equity Budget, which directs $156.5 million to over 80 nonprofits focused on enhancing AAPI representation and combating hate crimes. In 2022, Senator Min partnered with Stop AAPI Hate and LA Metro to introduce data-driven safety solutions to increase ridership and stop harassment on public transportation, specifically safeguarding AAPI communities. SB 1161 creates a framework for the Mineta Transportation Institute at San Jose State University to understand how we can make public transit safer and develop ways California transit agencies can strategically address public safety, and overall experiences with safety.

Furthermore, Senator Min has staunchly defended language accessibility within state services. He has authored SB 1078, which would create a new Office of Language Access with California’s Department of Health and Human Services to ensure that translation requirements are being implemented to ensure better awareness of available healthcare services and to drive better health outcomes. Earlier in his term, Senator Min intervened to help reverse a decision by the CA Department of Motor Vehicles to eliminate 25 languages, including Korean, Tagalog, and Arabic, from its written drivers tests. Additionally, when the Department of Alcoholic Beverage Control initially offered the state’s Responsible Beverage Service (RBS) Training Program only in English and Spanish, Senator Min advocated for the inclusion of other languages such as Chinese, Korean, Vietnamese, Tagalog, Hindi, and Punjabi. This ensured that employees from diverse linguistic backgrounds were not disadvantaged in complying with regulations designed to mitigate the risks of serving alcohol to minors and overly intoxicated patrons.

Beyond his legislative endeavors, Senator Min is actively involved in community leadership. He serves on the Planned Parenthood of Orange and San Bernardino Counties' AAPI Leadership Council, co-founded the Orange County Korean American Democratic Committee, and was a founding member and director of Asian Americans in Action. Throughout his public and private life, Senator Min has stood loudly and forcefully against hate of all kinds, denouncing and addressing anti-Asian hate, anti-Semitic hate, anti-Muslim hate, anti-Black hate, and anti-LGBTQ+ hate, including by leading over 200 anti-hate events. ###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

clean_body: Hear me out. | Fellow American, I've held off on hitting "send" on this email all morning because I don't want to let you down. That being said - I need you to hear me out. I need your help NOW if we're going to meet our goal. I won't get into the nitty-gritty of it, but I'm telling you now - we didn't do so hot on our last deadline goal, and we need your help to turn this around. ACTIVATING A 500% IMPACT ON ALL DONATIONS:** | Thank you so much for considering, Wesley Hunt Changing Washington won 't be easy, but graduating from West Point and serving in the United States Army, being deployed to combat zones, and flying Apache helicopters over Iraq has prepared me for tough fights and big challenges. I truly believe nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and our way of life in the Houston area.******** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. subject: BREAKING: Louisiana decision
