body:
Yesterday’s decision harkens back to a dark time in our nation’s history.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84126839/470546399/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0YmFjMjNmLWUzMDctZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qtkJ1jZtUEzuX4w81X2JCOF6CwVmLT0MgCvrheFCuXU=&emci=1778e520-ca07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=54bac23f-e307-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=8431045)
---

**BREAKING: A federal three-judge panel struck down Louisiana’s congressional map, which contains two Black-opportunity districts as required by Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act** The court’s ruling unnecessarily puts Louisianians’ right to vote in a very precarious position. This decision is a radical departure from multiple recent court decisions regarding Louisiana’s congressional map. It is so wildly out of step from settled law and recent Supreme Court precedent that the ideological nature of the decision could not be more clear. Since the Voting Rights Act was enacted, anti-democracy forces have sought to minimize its effectiveness. The fight for equal representation is both historic and ongoing. **Yesterday’s decision harkens back to a dark time in our nation’s history. Undaunted, we will continue the fight for fairness and equality.** **Louisiana’s current, fair maps — which gives Black Louisianians their long denied but rightful voting power — should remain in place for 2024 and for every future election.** As this case proceeds, other courts must ensure that our march to justice continues, that precedent is respected and that the fundamental rights of all American citizens are upheld. **Eric H. Holder, Jr.,
82nd Attorney General of the United States

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Something needed to change
body:
In my first job, we simply couldn't afford the cost of housing, groceries, transportation, and other living expenses unless something changed.
#
Today's a special day!
It’s May Day — a day to lift up workers and stand in solidarity with those bravely fighting to unionize their workplaces.
**Did you know that I was part of a group of employees that voted to unionize our workplace?**
In my first job, we simply couldn't afford the cost of housing, groceries, transportation, and other living expenses unless something changed — **an experience so many workers in Delaware and across the country are facing right now.** Unionizing led to better pay and benefits — almost immediately.
**Every worker deserves a living wage, basic protections, good benefits, and the support necessary for them to thrive.** And I've seen firsthand how the right to unionize empowers workers and improves their working conditions.
**That’s why in Congress, I’ll advocate for workers’ rights and strengthen unions — starting by sponsoring and supporting the PRO Act, legislation that will empower workers to unionize and protect employees from union-busting.**
**[I need to know if you're with me. This May Day, can you add your name to show your support for the PRO Act and our fight to advocate for workers?](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/support-the-pro-act-petition/?source=em20240501&t=1&akid=238%2E21716%2ETaZMfq)**
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/support-the-pro-act-petition/?source=em20240501-1&t=2&akid=238%2E21716%2ETaZMfq)**
In the State Senate, I enshrined protections for unionizing workers in state law, cosponsored the $15 minimum wage law, passed paid leave, and fought for better pay and benefits for educators and state employees — all while working arm-in-arm with labor unions in Delaware.
I’m ready to take this fight to Washington and pass federal protections for workers fighting to negotiate for better wages, benefits, and conditions. **And I’m proud that I’ve earned the endorsement of more than 25 unions across Delaware.**
**[But I need you on my team, too. Can you add your name and show your support for pro-worker legislation, like the PRO Act?** **[Add Your Name »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/support-the-pro-act-petition/?source=em20240501-1&t=4&akid=238%2E21716%2ETaZMfq)** In solidarity, Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20240501-1&t=5&refcode2=238_21716_TaZMfq&akid=238%2E21716%2ETaZMfq)** This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=6&akid=238%2E21716%2ETaZMfq)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=7&akid=238%2E21716%2ETaZMfq)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=238%2E21716%2ETaZMfq)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Um... are you lost?
body:
| |
---
Hey Jim... are you lost?? | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMjAxNTIxNzQxODQzNjcyMTcsXCJyXCI6MTIwMTUyMzE0NzU3NTE1MDMzfSIsInMiOiJjNWY4OTUwMGQ0NGJlMjA4In0)

Friend,

What's unfolding on college campuses across the country is terrorism. Call it what it is.| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=9c14d43802b5484d816470c5f0772ccc&_e=KExBby0reqEZ0bmVsS7Gs1TRbFif9yazOvz6nbSot40Z5G5uQAhR7s-gLlE9sUNjE4PyOOWllHsjwbbOBrzr4cm1qebeZjpGXW4x2nlJms7qkxyxD0tOUabDCmM-ukCaNioQCKc3E4tKInuFMMZuf3PzBl3htWxfFVI1mcqA1Ekp458_eJ74FQOSvy5sPZoWUgvTgVObJO46iL3RZ8g3qpzjCd58FZSRmqYV0d0GYgfVovTQRUD52gELcBM9ayfQQwB36l0wiUh9JOt0MjOr8P8WKvj1RlZVIyOQej5KSuypK_7WnPpVeJxSnbfCZZMe)

| | _**If it talks like a terrorist and acts like a terrorist, it is a terrorist.**_ By Sean Feucht
---
_What's unfolding on college campuses across the country is terrorism. Call it what it is._
---
| | America's college campuses are burning with antisemitism, a byproduct of the left-wing ideology that has, for years, dominated the upper echelons of academia and poisoned the minds of so many of America's youth.

We are witnessing a poisoned generation of college students on campuses from coast to coast. What started out under the false guise of "peaceful protests" in support of a ceasefire in Israel, manifested into its true form-- the latest in a long history of hatred for the Nation of Israel. Now, terrorist-sympathizing college students are inching closer to the level of antisemitic violence we've come to expect from terrorist groups like Hamas.

For nearly thirty years, the world has designated Hamas as the terrorist organization that it is. Their goal is the erasure of Israel, and they've used fear and violence to accomplish that goal. When students at Columbia, UCLA, and elsewhere start acting like terrorists, we should treat them like terrorists. ****https://seanfeucht.substack.com/p/if-it-talks-like-a-terrorist**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=9c14d43802b5484d816470c5f0772ccc&_e=KExBby0reqEZ0bmVsS7GswkmQtPiEJ3iF4B-XiobD1blHuzsCSvIXMwxvMzT2nf09K-wEk0nxZepAxBdfqE5MyDgvVNSrI-DhOMkAwWvFZq5tgSv7lUe4_ZAzeXna5-xTKBxHwjX9xBuJlTJxM-NcjSiC33IOrbCnW7Tn4PeovlyyWDkQBFeR2jiG1IMQsUFeVW0mVxys_GbnIJvwrr7TLCwiAyRELcECdQgrLBICGxCAankC0ZCKCvGsZ8ASjJGjsdQFm7OgJ-M454F5PTQOcQB1MbmguOOq5qZxgnUI9MSQPCUNPDE5B61BYkbwOHVakgjShmQNud4JMuoKOkJSbs2u-74YT9-4YxZ2VhrJxU%3D)[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=9c14d43802b5484d816470c5f0772ccc&_e=KExBby0reqEZ0bmVsS7Gs6ou19QYIS_KB5MgRazu4Yn7sQDDGV-VdQZJFh3iupd4VtqMimOpyGBMYwFCJoP40CcQOo5zWiFNhFmiX5g6lhETCa-6FLI5A6N3Rr-RwJUGl8miDi1mt_cCVQ6VsPdHdXXGFfJmuOfjVOGeWGPcX-4IpSON1MTD08Rc2s-df5d0XrpF4JQ8TVlGb8rI5CTBksWsqdjMIiAvFJr7sdnItMYMvuZzMMcQNQTzze9m6kFeyHSuyatJTB5UWyBST8_68ynncVlKZqy0SPw75RurpjrmWdnUwON12bMGYo_dNxhjilkSGr8i9_7LLlG5LT-IhQ%3D%3D)[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=9c14d43802b5484d816470c5f0772ccc&_e=KExBby0reqEZ0bmVsS7Gs6ou19QYIS_KB5MgRazu4YkrcVtbwTNE2QYqQKysh5xeIIFJUe4v1yZrznL_GFC91-KiKiH5WkdV52kRxe4gGyIUi0U5D41UXBIwFOIiXpTJcRD_Hcj97HCZVk6CHS6c-25aHAPe0h54NJzufqjKgAUbnBH5fpY_9ID5Vs0agAhXP_RRRKoklRnpekPnT0jRxDs1AOyOEZpoft3WXH626KIP9FjSrzeWM82SIx7gnP2JaMExNl2yRqscXL3ncFwgx7URkdYLY43eXhhEQv2vU69URACOD_O0sObxWqokl1nsMNqOyrQ1YOh6cxUGzjmPLg%3D%3D)[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=9c14d43802b5484d816470c5f0772ccc&_e=KExBby0reqEZ0bmVsS7Gs6ou19QYIS_KB5MgRazu4Yn7sQDDGV-VdQZJFh3iupd4VtqMimOpyGBMYwFCJoP40CcQOo5zWiFNhFmiX5g6lhETCa-6FLI5A6N3Rr-RwJUGl8miDi1mt_cCVQ6VsPdHdXXGFfJmuOfjVOGeWGPcX-4IpSON1MTD08Rc2s-df5d0Cwkz5dLpJIUAoCf2QwrneOQlwwfm8WIU94SkuL2j1SaLKDV-utudkD-YNecc3gAczc6W3iy5IoXPjaYtY8C3mFDhY-3segiiRzlKjGcCNE7s0TzAI6hPLGL9s1qiTmzAMvJo4jpdB1ybbDKuUjELEA%3D%3D)[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d Thanks to you, we had a record-breaking month

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84127834/470549490/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVhZTUxYmEtZTQwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xGcRIonoSk1iXUQX7K1c9Mxq0t2GK4br_QGmfgNECmM=&emci=fdad51ba-e407-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=05ae51ba-e407-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=14016711)
Hey Peter, it’s Tara McGowan, the Founder and Publisher of COURIER.
**Thank you on behalf of all of us here at COURIER.** Because of you, April was our best grassroots fundraising month ever. Your support goes a long way toward funding our newsrooms and helping us fight back against right-wing misinformation.
Earlier this month, Fox News published a hit piece on me and COURIER. As a result, their audience came out in droves to attack me. Just take a look:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84127836/470549493/-593472309?refcode=20240501-EM-TY&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVhZTUxYmEtZTQwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xGcRIonoSk1iXUQX7K1c9Mxq0t2GK4br_QGmfgNECmM=)
Look, Peter, it's disheartening to get messages like this. But knowing that a community of grassroots supporters like you have my back makes it all worth it. We simply wouldn’t have the resources to fight back against right-wing misinformation and provide trustworthy local news coverage without your generous support.
[**By setting up a monthly recurring donation of $15 or any amount you choose, you are making a significant impact. Your recurring donations help us build a strong and reliable support base for our newsrooms, enabling us to continue our fight against right-wing misinformation. Your contribution, no matter the size, means the world to our team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84127837/470549496/-593472309?refcode=20240501-EM-TY&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDVhZTUxYmEtZTQwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xGcRIonoSk1iXUQX7K1c9Mxq0t2GK4br_QGmfgNECmM=)
Thanks,
Tara McGowan
Founder & Publisher

clean_body: Thanks to you, we had a record-breaking month Hey Peter, it’s Tara McGowan, the Founder and Publisher of COURIER. Thank you on behalf of all of us here at COURIER. Because of you, April was our best grassroots fundraising month ever. Your support goes a long way toward funding our newsrooms and helping us fight back against right-wing misinformation. Earlier this month, Fox News published a hit piece on me and COURIER. As a result, their audience came out in droves to attack me. Just take a look: = Look, Peter, it's disheartening to get messages like this. But knowing that a community of grassroots supporters like you have my back makes it all worth it. We simply wouldn’t have the resources to fight back against right-wing misinformation and provide trustworthy local news coverage without your generous support. = Thanks, Tara McGowan Founder & Publisher COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84127855/470549508/950179054?refcode=EM_C_240501thanks_N_SB_90DO_3_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzhmYzVhYi1lNDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eS7-P-990YJ1FZ7wJADexkaxVZP100dB3Tc5pVmOla8=) Hi Peter,

I wanted to reach out to personally thank you for your support. Thanks to our grassroots team, we were able to hit our April end-of-month fundraising goal!

With a challenging year ahead of us, it’s critical that we hit these goals to ensure that voters in Ohio are ready to turn out for Democrats. Voters in Ohio could determine control of both the U.S. Senate and the House, not to mention turning out to re-elect President Biden, so it’s up to us to ensure that they know what’s at stake.

I’m humbled by and grateful for all your support, which has allowed me to work on your behalf in Congress.

Thank you,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

clean_body: Peter, we’ve got some bad news. We missed our April fundraising goal last night — and we’re still $30,544 short. David McCormick has already spent seven figures on ads, so this is a bad time to miss our goal. We need to turn things around ASAP in order to compete with GOP spending. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. Thanks in advance — we really appreciate you! Together, Team Casey

Hi Peter, it’s Michelle Vallejo. Today, I’m emailing because I wanted to make sure to personally reach out and say thank you. Last night, we closed the books on end-of-month fundraising, and I have been overwhelmed by the sheer amount of support we’ve been seeing from the South Texas community. This is a grassroots, community effort, first and foremost, so every single contribution — whether it’s $500, $5, or just telling a neighbor about this campaign — is going to make a HUGE difference in the outcome of Election Day. I’m sure I’m not the first one to tell you about the gravity of this year’s election — but I’m going to re-emphasize it anyway. In November, we’ll be voting on the future of democracy, reproductive health care, and the House majority. We have a real shot at flipping TX-15 blue... That means we’re one step closer to reclaiming a Democratic House majority, one step closer to squashing the growing MAGA extremism, one step closer to ensuring our freedoms are protected. Winning on Election Day means we’re that much closer to making sure South Texans are fairly represented in Washington. And I know we have a serious shot at making this happen. With supporters like you on the team, I know we can make anything possible. Thank you for your support, Peter. I have so much gratitude for this team. ¡Vamos por Quince! Michelle
* * *

name: Team Bynum
subject: Three most important things to know before midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team, As we head into the last few weeks of this primary, this is the most critical time for our campaign. Here are three things you should know about the state of our race.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84130341/470556951/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.05.01_b1_tb_all-nd&amount=10&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGZiOGY5ZGItZTgwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kkYNvgX5Sn_JqOgypXSd8oIotYrbKJirjIHq72tqLnE=) Team, As we head into the last few weeks of this primary, this is the most critical time for our campaign. Here are three things you should know about the state of our race.
1. **OR-05 is one of the most competitive districts in the country.** As one of the most flippable seats in the entire country, taking back OR-05 brings Democrats one step closer to taking back the House Majority.

2. **Janelle is the _only_ candidate in this race who can beat Lori Chavez-DeRemer to flip this seat blue.** After all, she’s already defeated her before... _twice._

3. **Retaking control of the House is our best shot at blocking the GOP’s anti-choice, extremist agenda – _and that won’t happen if we don’t make Janelle our Democratic nominee on May 21. _**

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
I'm reaching out to simply say thank you for proving that Northeast Ohio is worth fighting for.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84130426/470557054/-1747597063?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.01_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI4ZjlkYi1lODA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z6QdjBRrl0TMxT8PjTE4RBC6HlTNb2j3oWRjKxxfOtk=) Hi Peter, it's Emilia. I'm reaching out to simply say thank you for your continuous support and for proving that Northeast Ohio is worth fighting for. It's people like you that have made it possible for me to serve our community and make a positive impact in OH-13. _For that, I say thank you._ **I am proud to advocate for Northeast Ohio and I will continue to speak up on the issues impacting our community that you care about the most.** From ensuring access to affordable healthcare, to creating safer communities, to promoting environmental-friendly policies, to fixing our broken immigration system: **no issue is too big or too small.** Your donations have helped us to knock on more doors, get supplies for volunteers, print more yard signs, and ensure this team has the resources we need to win in November––but this is just the beginning. **Peter, I am going to continue needing your support over the next six months.** I want to keep working to deliver results for the Birthplace of Champions, but I cannot do it without you. [**Will you please chip in $13 for OH-13, so I can keep working on behalf of our community?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84130431/470557065/-1747597063?&amount=13&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.01_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI4ZjlkYi1lODA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z6QdjBRrl0TMxT8PjTE4RBC6HlTNb2j3oWRjKxxfOtk=) | [$13 for OH-13»](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84130434/470557071/-1747597063?&amount=13&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.01_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI4ZjlkYi1lODA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z6QdjBRrl0TMxT8PjTE4RBC6HlTNb2j3oWRjKxxfOtk=)

I want to keep working to deliver results for the Birthplace of Champions, but I cannot do it without you. = | = I can’t do this without you––thank you for your support. Emilia Sykes A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country.Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results. = | = | Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. name: Mayor Jerry Bien-Willner
subject: I’m with Andrei. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona** | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U
body:
We need leaders in Congress focused on results, not rhetoric and that’s why I’m supporting Andrei |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84130637/470557604/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240501_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzQ3OWQzMGUtZTkwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VeYcLv340MSQ5kOju6-Yqw6MRughKFuXgfd2L_CPqfY=)
---
Hi Peter, it’s Mayor Jerry Bien-Willner of Paradise Valley. I’m reaching out to share that — after careful consideration of all our communities’ needs — I’m proudly supporting Andrei Cherny for Congress, and I’m asking if you’ll [add your name alongside mine to personally endorse Andrei today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84130639/470557605/1049607362?refcode=AU_AHC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240501_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzQ3OWQzMGUtZTkwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VeYcLv340MSQ5kOju6-Yqw6MRughKFuXgfd2L_CPqfY=&emci=c079d30e-e907-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=c479d30e-e907-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=13520922) Let me explain why I’m with Andrei: I’m a registered Independent. The office I currently hold as mayor of Paradise Valley is non-partisan. But when I look at many of those representing us in Washington, I see people who too often put partisanship ahead of progress and rhetoric ahead of results. **Andrei is different. He’s someone who, when he sees a problem, steps up to do something. For him, “actions speak louder than words” isn’t just an aphorism, it's a guiding philosophy.** After 9/11, Andrei enlisted to serve our country in uniform. Later, as an Arizona Assistant Attorney General, he kept Arizonans safe by putting drug traffickers and human smugglers behind bars, where they belong. Concerned about the climate crisis and what it means for us when it comes to heat and water, Andrei didn’t just wring his hands, he did something about it. He started a business that planted millions of trees here in Arizona and around the world. In short, Andrei has already been fighting for our community and country for nearly three decades, and I know he’ll keep doing so as our next representative in Congress. **I couldn’t be prouder or more excited to give Andrei my endorsement, and I’m asking you to join me.[Will you join me to personally endorse Andrei’s campaign for Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84130642/470557607/1049607362?refcode=AU_AHC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240501_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzQ3OWQzMGUtZTkwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VeYcLv340MSQ5kOju6-Yqw6MRughKFuXgfd2L_CPqfY=&emci=c079d30e-e907-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=c479d30e-e907-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=13520922)** | [ENDORSE ANDREI](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84130646/470557609/1049607362?refcode=AU_AHC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240501_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzQ3OWQzMGUtZTkwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VeYcLv340MSQ5kOju6-Yqw6MRughKFuXgfd2L_CPqfY=&emci=c079d30e-e907-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=c479d30e-e907-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=13520922)
---
This election can be a turning point for Arizona and America. And at this pivotal moment, Andrei is the leader I trust to go to Washington and break through the gridlock and dysfunction we so often see in Congress.
I hope you’ll join me in supporting his campaign.
Respectfully yours,
Jerry

**In just HOURS, we'll have to close the books on our GOP Voter Verification Project, but as it stands, we still don't have nearly enough profiles from your area.**

Our America First Senate candidates are already being outraised and outspent on the airwaves. Simply put, they're being relentlessly ATTACKED every minute.

_We simply can't allow the Democrats to register more voters than us too - especially at a time like this... _

name: Bernie's bill via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie vs. Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, while the
vast majority of working people paid taxes a few weeks ago, companies like
Elon Musk’s Tesla and Jeff Bezos’ Amazon pay little or NO federal income
taxes. Despite massive profits, these big corporations are simply dodging
taxes. That’s why Bernie has introduced the Corporate Tax Dodging
Prevention Act.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17015?t=1011&akid=5895%2E5885482%2EuVE4U1 ][IMG]

Bernie said, “We have a rigged tax code that has essentially legalized tax
dodging for large corporations.” Well, it’s time to unrig the tax code so
massive corporations can’t keep getting away with enriching their CEOs
(like Musk), paying little or no taxes, and taking advantage of the
American people.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17016?source=email-20240501&t=1012&akid=5895%2E5885482%2EuVE4U1 ]Add your name: Support Bernie's bill to end the free ride for tax
dodging corporations. Congress must pass the Corporate Tax Dodging
Prevention Act!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17016?source=email-20240501&t=1013&akid=5895%2E5885482%2EuVE4U1 ]ADD YOUR NAME

34% of big corporations paid nothing in federal income taxes in the first
year of the Trump tax cuts. $0 while working people owe. And big
corporations dodging their taxes inevitably give some of those billions
back to their ultra-rich executives. Musk and Bezos are benefitting at
every turn.

Republicans and their right-wing billionaire donors want to protect their
bounty of tax loopholes while trying to cut Medicare, Social Security, and
Medicaid — all as they complain that there’s not enough money to fund the
social safety net. It’s blatantly hypocritical.

There’s a clear solution: Bernie’s bill to tax corporations so they pay
their taxes and fund Medicare, Social Security, and Medicaid.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17016?source=email-20240501&t=1014&akid=5895%2E5885482%2EuVE4U1 ]Stand with Bernie: Tax big corporations now! Support Bernie’s bill to
end corporate tax dodging!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: AMERICA FIRST PATRIOTS
subject: Out of everyone, we’ve picked you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | FirstName, Out of all the patriots we know, you stood out to us. **You’ve never backed down from what you believe. You’re not afraid of being canceled by the woke Left. ** _Now, we need your help in one of the toughest congressional races in America. _ The Left is determined to not just defeat John James, but PERMANENTLY silence him. name: Team Crouch
subject: 🧠💚 Mental Health Awareness Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/crouchforindiana/xeptldtbfk-12693535?e=8f9fef7158)

** May is #MentalHealthAwareness Month
------------------------------------------------------------
The mental health crisis facing our state is undeniable. I recently released a TV ad addressing this issue and how, under my leadership, ensuring Hoosiers have access to affordable mental health care will be a priority.

This month please take a moment to check in on your friends and neighbors.

If you or someone you know is in need of help, please visit www.in.gov/bewellindiana (https://www.in.gov/bewellindiana/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=d3c25343e1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_24_02_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d3c25343e1-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=2381428bdf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

At an April 23 “Water Summit” at the White House, the Biden
administration announced a multi-agency plan reasserting the federal
role in determining the future of wetlands in the wake of last year’s
landmark Supreme Court Decision limiting Washington’s authority to
regulate “waters of the United States” (WOTUS).

Date: Tue, April 30, 2024
Subject: Humbly asking, can you contribute $25 before our midnight deadline? Peter -- In its decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , the Supreme Court majority wrote, “Women are not without electoral or political power.” No kidding. Those bragging about overturning _Roe_ have no clue about the power of women, but they found out when it was on the ballot in 2022. And 2023. It’s our job to make sure they find out again this year. **Whether or not we succeed is up to you, Peter. It's up to you to exercise that political power that Republicans so easily dismissed when they took away millions of Americans’ rights.[If that’s all you need to hear, you can use this link to chip in $25 today >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tF02SEYb775JbaVddBglvb5bATKUlRslVui8wRTD29Vw9-x8qPZKCXVm8M9k0rWJWpSKwYs4nyzovBnOeCN3S2wH3-QPUJo73kOxZ6Pumhf-UOwrFrVL4R9G_J8wJ-YUREjpOr5mn0xycNMdEvHfAsQbjZnKfrBf-eSYZRdFQCzLc_ZlK8adO7R1-hZjqb91Zb5GAGAgdPT0DJSKYsxDnZbQui4lRLTyVxEw96iEKKcxu5PJprAO5pQli3EvE_LuBDdZgmZBEFexhdJ4HiKXHV-4WoGQ-qkKEX-5B0K4gGuTQn0L_s-EdXHWdtw0oqyE6/45z/iSloobJgQ_ae4SZ-0pdwuw/h3/h001.1-bw49Jzdnh1AyMZnnVRz5WQEcqnrXM9t7QGj-yogPY)** Tonight at midnight, we close the books on an FEC fundraising deadline -- and as you read this, we are short of where we need to be. The blue line is where we actually landed. 😬 With the MAGA Right spending millions to help Donald Trump win back the White House, and with the polls as close as they are, we simply can’t afford to fall short again. That’s why we’re urgently asking: Please, Peter, we’re counting on you. Here is the best link to give: Thank you, Biden HQ \-----Forwarded message----- Sender: Joe Biden Date: Tue, April 30, 2024 Subject: Humbly asking, can you contribute $25 before our midnight deadline? Peter -- In its decision to overturn Roe v. Wade , the Supreme Court majority wrote, “Women are not without electoral or political power.” No kidding. Those bragging about overturning Roe have no clue about the power of women, but they found out when it was on the ballot in 2022. And 2023. It’s our job to make sure they find out again this year. Whether or not we succeed is up to you, Peter. It's up to you to exercise that political power that Republicans so easily dismissed when they took away millions of Americans’ rights. Tonight at midnight, we close the books on an FEC fundraising deadline -- and as you read this, we are short of where we need to be. We will only win if we have the resources to fight back against Trump's attacks and all the outside money being spent to defeat us. So, I am counting on people like you who care about the outcome of this election to help close that gap. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | There is nothing beyond our capacity when we act together. name: Seth Moulton
subject: It’s official—I’m on the ballot

body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/SM4Clogo.png]Friend,
My opponent is an anti-Biden extremist who amplifies Donald Trump and spreads election conspiracy theories on social media—and he’s running in the Democratic primary.
DONATE TO MY CAMPAIGN [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]
The 6th District was once a toss-up, and will be again if my opponent is the Democratic nominee. We’ve not only made it solidly blue, but we’ve made it a powerhouse for Democratic organizing. Since 2018, we’ve helped elect 30+ service-focused leaders from all over the country to Congress, and we’re bringing more veterans into Democratic politics here in Massachusetts.
We’ve put mental healthcare on the national agenda, passing my national 988 hotline and saving countless lives. We’re confronting China and Russia and preparing for the national security threats of the future. And we’re working to finally transform American transportation with my bill, the American High Speed Rail Act.
My opponent could undo all of that progress.
Can I count on you to support my campaign with a donation today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]
I don’t think you need me to remind you that things have gone from bad to worse with the GOP in charge of the House. This is what happens when we lack principled leaders in Washington.
We aren’t going to defeat the MAGA movement with more yelling on Twitter. We’ll do it by putting people over politics and keeping leaders in Washington who are willing to make the hard choices to deliver for Americans.
That’s what I’m committed to doing, and I hope to count on your support
Regards,
Seth

Peter, it's with a heavy heart I’m reaching out to tell you that as of today — May 1, 2024 — reproductive rights are effectively gone in Florida.

**When the Florida Supreme Court upheld Ron DeSantis' already-unconstitutional 15-week ban last month, they gave the green light for his even worse six-week trigger ban to take effect.**

Even when 1 in 3 people only find out they're pregnant after six weeks have already passed.

Even when there are almost no exceptions for rape and incest.

Even when 75% of Florida voters oppose such extreme measures.

We haven't even gone a full day under this law, but one day is too many. And I know I'm not the only one who thinks so: abortion is a winning issue, and we've seen it in every election, red state or blue, since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned.

So today is not the end of our fight for abortion rights. **It's just the beginning.**

**We can save our pro-choice Senate majority and codify reproductive freedom nationwide, but it starts with kicking out extremists standing in the way, like Sen. Rick Scott.** [I'm fighting every day to defeat him, but I need your help to reach my emergency $100,000 goal and win. Look, Peter: This ban has ripped away my rights, the rights of my two daughters, and the rights of millions of women who will be put in danger across our state.

And just so we're clear:**It's all because of the Supreme Court that Donald Trump built, and the Senators who allowed him to appoint the anti-abortion extremists who went on to reverse the protections of _Roe._**

Senators like Rick Scott, who proudly says that, were he still governor of Florida, he would've signed that extreme six-week ban.

He's been living in a bubble of far-right extremists. He refuses to accept that the tides are turning in Florida, or that everyday families simply do not support his toxic, anti-choice agenda. _That's_ why I'm running to retire him.

**If I make it to the Senate, I'll do everything I can to pass legislation that reinstates abortion rights nationwide. But my opponent is a mega-millionaire who can and will spend practically anything to bankroll his attack ads and drown us out.**

[I need your grassroots support today because without it, I simply won't make it to the Senate. Save America!

Friend,

This is very serious, and I am coming to you first because I know you will not sit on the sidelines and let the radical left manipulate you with their murderous agenda.

That's right. Murderous. As in, they don't mind illegal aliens coming here and murdering American citizens.

But I am taking a stand. And I invite you to take a stand with me. Here and now. THIS MOMENT.

**[Will you make a special donation to my SECURE AMERICA money bomb and help me secure 100,000 online donations before 11:59 pm?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=ed3bb36f5b4c45598def04dec316c7d9&_e=wm9pifsIRyCAKIAMmPyK99AzYbcu-w9YGxHNWCIfkyWT_98FA2K87IiukgNDIxoaMqJgNX56npaaOW19tLKdC8s6UpRN4wvT-rG_qNPLt66TKwAYHZBOb8PCeMoKuqJInqOslXJlMcWdk0D7HExaylA4RHRmFt46GAN3K12a1isPqMOUPf3l3lPCoT1KwqyVVA7WKqjaG7KSZz47dREopSh62L6aZZ7L6bwOc8ex3EhSlrIf6F6jsidfzRCWohcu5wF9P3SBigfwr6Eje6alydFJOiESyQ1pmlZSBhnMhsP_zdH3X-CukC3g05BOoR8Dg6SaPb9ABwr_tjNaXGQiNQIpxsj9u_MY2Cq4OeMrAzstYT9XegLQzSf4rtw-2jXfnmk_oWIInRto-rhCqttoEA%3D%3D)**

I think your money should not have to go towards fixing the government that should be working to serve your best interests and promote human flourishing...but right now, we know that is not the case.

So, I implore you to make a personal sacrifice and stand with me as I face a horrific barrage of demeaning and downright evil attacks and threats.

I won't go into them here. But I do need you to be with me or I fear what will happen with Chuck Schumer still in charge of the greatest deliberative upper chamber of government on the face of the earth.

In short, I need you.

Joe Biden has had how many chances to secure our southern border, and he's taken zero of them.

Do you think he really cares about you? Do you think anyone in his party does?

They. Do. Not.

We must stop them at all costs.

**[Please, I'm counting on you to make a sacrifice today and stand with me or face the consequences of what will happen if we don't!](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=ed3bb36f5b4c45598def04dec316c7d9&_e=wm9pifsIRyCAKIAMmPyK99AzYbcu-w9YGxHNWCIfkyWT_98FA2K87IiukgNDIxoaMqJgNX56npaaOW19tLKdC8s6UpRN4wvT-rG_qNPLt66TKwAYHZBOb8PCeMoKuqJInqOslXJlMcWdk0D7HExaylA4RHRmFt46GAN3K12a1isPqMOUPf3l3lPCoT1KwqyVVA7WKqjaG7KSZz47dREopSh62L6aZZ7L6bwOc8ex3EhSlrIf6F6jsidfzRCWohcupzJbBUW8GvPaHwggNuoH8b7f_HoIAiuD8tFsYN8NQipeGONBJe99R4aDV153UJUeVo2AnBudVCjnxSmBJBGFUG56aEBPyloObqXlJ26vj4FOb3R50ELzRig-bfYZPAjJZ7AovlQ9efmeNFLbLezfRA%3D%3D)**

name: Team WFP
subject: Solidarity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
This Mayday – a day historically dedicated to honoring workers’ rights and solidarity, we’re reminded of these interconnected struggles for justice that continue to shape our world. | | | Peter, We are in the midst of an absolutely historic moment. Across the country, we’ve seen students, faculty, and staff of colleges and universities rising up. Throughout history, students have frequently stood in solidarity with labor movements, participating in strikes, demonstrations, and advocacy efforts to support fair wages, safe working conditions, and workers’ rights on their campuses and beyond. Colleges _are_ , in fact, workplaces. And right now faculty, students, university workers, and supporters all over the United States are building a movement at the forefront of a national struggle to divest their universities from Israel and to fight against repression in favor of free speech. It’s unlike anything we’ve seen in decades, employing walkouts, sickouts, pickets, and encampments to make their voices heard. They know as we know that worker power can move mountains, and that’s exactly what they’re attempting to do. These encampments serve as powerful symbols of collective action and demand action from institutions to uphold human rights and dignity for all. Meanwhile, unions are also standing up for students. On Friday, members of the United Auto Workers (UAW) Region 9A held a rally in Washington Square Park in New York City in defense of union members and students who are facing severe repression for standing up for Gaza. Last summer was a “hot labor summer” of strikes and actions, including the historic UAW and Hollywood strikes. Unions are issuing ceasefire resolutions as a result of massive rank-and-file pressure from new union activists who are connecting the dots and stepping into their full power and the movement has begun to spread to traditionally non-union states like Tennessee and Alabama. This Mayday — a day historically dedicated to honoring workers’ rights and solidarity, we’re reminded of these interconnected struggles for justice that continue to shape our world. This type of solidarity is exactly what’s needed in this moment, especially after the violence we witnessed last night and in the preceding weeks on the campuses of Columbia, UCLA, the University of Texas at Austin, Emory University, and across the country against students, simply for engaging in nonviolent protest. At a time when the world is grappling with intersecting crises, from the ongoing occupation of Palestine to systemic racism and economic inequality, it’s more important than ever to stand in solidarity with those fighting for liberation and justice. [**Donate now to campus bail funds and stand in solidarity with students peacefully protesting to stop the humanitarian crisis in Gaza.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sba8ANpfD_FI_rFB5S_gPiY0ul9ItBaSile7jlALqYN_nkC05itLvRToosL_jVZIt_NKVlm5VT-TtFvomNShRrTxj58napT6n1ZBcKnN5lu3Q_PmZZjoQHXGl9YQMtzOYYXkO_h9Lk1TQy_gg4NfZ0cMHu5_XseXzu8RClf1vL8F22pz_qzl1azmMloiF2i8j5cuLqt-qQFzAk7gvb4zrubGf5qCHaK9WGAH9SFBcFifoHXNkbqdJTRGpyxMjMKIIA/45z/PrWd0nllRNqIIKIilo1zwg/h0/h001.8_Nr_U9w_8OY_vUNvmu5cdhm4chUIrxXMdZ8kON8rC4) **[Donate](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sba8ANpfD_FI_rFB5S_gPiY0ul9ItBaSile7jlALqYN_nkC05itLvRToosL_jVZIt_4ksQ2kX6GL55NvEoGSXiHG7lf2nGGzKyJ_2D1MUeG38rtMryDWjGqhqwyWlkyhAArlPbR9wZiGNeE23OvpjcFywXgLk_u76OLWqn8hQbjWBKROUeuycO_1TFGu_b3CYVh4KNbkgiyAPxrTANDoSFtbnxqT72d4NQoSlcvGKSiF9ExwkfaoiMiJg6OuStbzCg/45z/PrWd0nllRNqIIKIilo1zwg/h1/h001.oDaDN0T7GwH-Mpy1HClCKsM2i1ofTwKMZVtpuUhX1JQ)** Historic moments inspire new people to enter the fight. It’s clear that the student movement is breathing new life into the labor movement and both are pushing for greater actions across the country. One thing we have always known is — our struggles for freedom are inextricably entwined. No one is free until we’re all free. And history is on our side. Solidarity forever, Team WFP [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.v92pwawuJ-Tgw-w_8VW1ElMyH8C6LbUDEH0XQJy4D17uiDmBV9LEthw1OrnOMlez9H9_vmZXW_jI6R7i6KFgs-Z-v9QG5xSquX4xZKq0XbKNv5ForO-2kjtLvDfVD7A_6sXmPh_ExAoH70PtZeI07rVi23gPROOvM-f_tKmdYmcrBLgeiyUVGpF8XNKrkgl0q4WY2DwkWnXJ34gwtQ6RYha6oFnrhdD-79wqII4XHPW1Y0Ww4bgFfvTRlRS5Im0J/45z/PrWd0nllRNqIIKIilo1zwg/h2/h001.h_DguEiCgxildqF5mdpAgG3-HY1BAN6OS860knAmggk)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.SEgofQhSb9pGg8bz5XQG3Qavg2v3du-P2-GHdERcbMNRq6NzmGzHx6lXMAu9obs-sCeEAKgLPw05n_C3rEUAzsAnI0KpXHyV2DTZJaKXqngt5ioa_seX07eaHJPPCQKPHNBEDFH697kBYYfR-NKtRUbU5auAbll_9_eRzAhwycoT6A294OjL6HrdtEQmfhdEiN_dpXhdI1wjeR3muGJjnIPzuxugdUl7Z85NsLJHB0w/45z/PrWd0nllRNqIIKIilo1zwg/h3/h001.byjpECl7huAgYrjAyKX-wPhfvXGkj0XZlNphYO61yCM)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg44Y70vF8LFR5ql1INGTAXhZp_zaxihZhNjSeO3wKbwLrmh06rEjal_EWsI-aQPIHEeWMuJiB0aQkNV_k436j5DhkmtsLEoA1QkOC-0rjKe-g4twni9633XDZUEz5edVhH0LQnrmgd1CKLR2Q6FUQ6HFwEwtNhoF6JD1Op5AAW2oBABkTac5EfqlGUz5BUTcwBP3hNjXniJRQY551LhwkotM/45z/PrWd0nllRNqIIKIilo1zwg/h4/h001.f4G8bgT8zu7dyVOcQNMjgwLiC2MWFJuszrMiD51wJaU) Thoughts? clean_body: This Mayday – a day historically dedicated to honoring workers’ rights and solidarity, we’re reminded of these interconnected struggles for justice that continue to shape our world. | | | Peter, We are in the midst of an absolutely historic moment. Across the country, we’ve seen students, faculty, and staff of colleges and universities rising up. Throughout history, students have frequently stood in solidarity with labor movements, participating in strikes, demonstrations, and advocacy efforts to support fair wages, safe working conditions, and workers’ rights on their campuses and beyond. Colleges are , in fact, workplaces. And right now faculty, students, university workers, and supporters all over the United States are building a movement at the forefront of a national struggle to divest their universities from Israel and to fight against repression in favor of free speech. It’s unlike anything we’ve seen in decades, employing walkouts, sickouts, pickets, and encampments to make their voices heard. They know as we know that worker power can move mountains, and that’s exactly what they’re attempting to do. These encampments serve as powerful symbols of collective action and demand action from institutions to uphold human rights and dignity for all. Meanwhile, unions are also standing up for students. On Friday, members of the United Auto Workers (UAW) Region 9A held a rally in Washington Square Park in New York City in defense of union members and students who are facing severe repression for standing up for Gaza. Last summer was a “hot labor summer” of strikes and actions, including the historic UAW and Hollywood strikes. Unions are issuing ceasefire resolutions as a result of massive rank-and-file pressure from new union activists who are connecting the dots and stepping into their full power and the movement has begun to spread to traditionally non-union states like Tennessee and Alabama. This Mayday — a day historically dedicated to honoring workers’ rights and solidarity, we’re reminded of these interconnected struggles for justice that continue to shape our world. This type of solidarity is exactly what’s needed in this moment, especially after the violence we witnessed last night and in the preceding weeks on the campuses of Columbia, UCLA, the University of Texas at Austin, Emory University, and across the country against students, simply for engaging in nonviolent protest. At a time when the world is grappling with intersecting crises, from the ongoing occupation of Palestine to systemic racism and economic inequality, it’s more important than ever to stand in solidarity with those fighting for liberation and justice. Historic moments inspire new people to enter the fight. It’s clear that the student movement is breathing new life into the labor movement and both are pushing for greater actions across the country. One thing we have always known is — our struggles for freedom are inextricably entwined. No one is free until we’re all free. And history is on our side. Solidarity forever, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Sen. John Kennedy
subject: One little, two little, three little RINOs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
See who I’m talking about

| | | **We don't want you to leave! But we understand if you don't want to receive these emails anymore. Click[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ea28e201cec04b68bf195c679ea3f73a&_e=UvoZWGYzUt0S1KAaWjzqNpxF-QHsbB7MHPiZnWgca_GoyE_pQo-_sTHL44w-rEhut2F6DgfVK8WuW-kOTHiI9o-Wxm0TRrAWBpHd73VkCZbrdDXVzAqtdgCTe3_wLXo9w7fUn3e8BK2L_wSsjfeGgCqFleLJdQqCS1oE2EAjjvvSBF0Yok4iAfSHE0iGLd599xAc0_ucW38XxjVSojpgJtij7iNhcjqrKmAeL635y9Yzul19hfKea2EXcMObZpCt)[HERE](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_s=ea28e201cec04b68bf195c679ea3f73a&_t=V3VheLfzFNg8Cgy4WMItaR4MFhGI6HxZINOBm0qoaVq5q-73gKrGJWGEbVWRZdCCbxFisXDETA691CiWe02kNJQfDlHUNEaSg4JFa3k0tbA%3D) to unsubscribe.**
---
Friend, The RINOs are coming out of the woodwork to attack my good friend and conservative candidate for U.S. Senate, Mike Rogers.

And I’m not just talking about any ol’ Republican In Name Only ... they’re sending the cream of the crop after him.

Keyboard warrior Adam Kinzinger spends more time hurling insults at Mike on Twitter than he does wiping his tears.

And those same RINOS will try anything to defeat him. Let me make it clear: their efforts to bring down Mike are as useless as a submarine with screen doors because he’s a fighter and won’t back down.
[**Thankfully, Mike’s a tough guy. He’s an Army veteran and former law enforcement officer, but he needs dyed-in-the-wool patriots like us to have his back.**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ea28e201cec04b68bf195c679ea3f73a&_e=UvoZWGYzUt0S1KAaWjzqNqT3cCV2CmjySJM3VPqie6Y3xEcHhGOKjMJUwM1Bkiu9t1TbgcNjig974FiRaf56Yl-o_LCvCNDBuIH2AeSKXFHFGMAMqGNImmiys_Xkkt3y6JgjQbN1FJ43buEYvb4jfxnFhgCmEm-xyo7cdBtu90unCyVXqQipB6ZwzI9yQWYa-x8CpV_tdjfKYEk9r9yVNp2eu3Q-2Gkfogc7W-A8VHybi01ZJFQZgZ0rk9zbwbl4V80Fd3ExePZ2Zor44bUYdq6JpeftmtL7DcN1_tmoqUSzsLrBXVzdyCrjoSME9psemxMSYI2D6lqDSTlFm8C2ukfEoaSarcVuxe42EzxIvObI13iGUSU2nCebNPHZ_IDalogIMI82kR-w_X-25zN9Guvfa_kzc-D9nOLkJTu6T_bVLchyebHBhqdMoz1KlaA4)
---
[**JOIN ME AND SUPPORT MIKE ROGERS**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ea28e201cec04b68bf195c679ea3f73a&_e=UvoZWGYzUt0S1KAaWjzqNqT3cCV2CmjySJM3VPqie6Y3xEcHhGOKjMJUwM1Bkiu9t1TbgcNjig974FiRaf56Yl-o_LCvCNDBuIH2AeSKXFHFGMAMqGNImmiys_Xkkt3y6JgjQbN1FJ43buEYvb4jfxnFhgCmEm-xyo7cdBtu90unCyVXqQipB6ZwzI9yQWYa-x8CpV_tdjfKYEk9r9yVNp2eu3Q-2Gkfogc7W-A8VHybi01ZJFQZgZ0rk9zbwbl4V80Fd3ExePZ2Zor44bUYdq6JpeftmtL7DcN1_tmoqUR8OlBmjQoAoeQDJMFJdOzOlugs8DRQ18lfcv1JFzISRANQGXrzsBmYOgOnBMt1rqXKD3aPPywX_IipPpgSKUKtZkV9TAfHuxQxXInvUjjZmD1B6m_rvXDyored55YNySsJDHwvL_fO_opsvG8xwMj4)
---
I’m not the only one supporting Mike Rogers — President Trump gave him his complete and total endorsement.

And since then, the attacks coming from both sides of the aisle have been endless. Because the combination of Mike Rogers in the Senate and President Trump back in the White House has the Washington Establishment more nervous than a long-tailed monkey in a room full of rocking chairs. I’m not going to keep dragging on about how important it is that we elect Mike Rogers, so I’ll leave you with this: **_[I’d rather drink weed clean_body: See who I’m talking about | | | We don't want you to leave! But we understand if you don't want to receive these emails anymore. Click to unsubscribe. Friend, The RINOs are coming out of the woodwork to attack my good friend and conservative candidate for U.S. Senate, Mike Rogers. And I’m not just talking about any ol’ Republican In Name Only ... they’re sending the cream of the crop after him. Keyboard warrior Adam Kinzinger spends more time hurling insults at Mike on Twitter than he does wiping his tears. And those same RINOS will try anything to defeat him. Let me make it clear: their efforts to bring down Mike are as useless as a submarine with screen doors because he’s a fighter and won’t back down. I’m not the only one supporting Mike Rogers — President Trump gave him his complete and total endorsement. And since then, the attacks coming from both sides of the aisle have been endless. Because the combination of Mike Rogers in the Senate and President Trump back in the White House has the Washington Establishment more nervous than a long-tailed monkey in a room full of rocking chairs. I’m not going to keep dragging on about how important it is that we elect Mike Rogers, so I’ll leave you with this: Thanks for your time,**** Sen. body:
Ever since mail-in voting became a more accessible and convenient way to exercise voting rights, Republicans have been committed to defunding the Postal Service. They know that the USPS is crucial to voting-by-mail, and they want to destroy it.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84137731/470577133/444630146?refcode=5-1-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyYTUxZjIxLWY2MDctZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CwxKO9b62AEwRC9W9OLwFooS7hne594oTjkweGVKOuk=)

| | Friend, Ever since mail-in voting became a more accessible and convenient way to exercise voting rights, Republicans have been committed to defunding the Postal Service. They know that the USPS is _crucial_ to voting-by-mail, and they want to destroy it. It’s bad enough that the GOP is threatening mail-in voting by attacking the Postal Service, but they’re doing more than that! The Postal Service is _crucial_ for people to receive medications, not to mention keeping in touch with loved ones and shipping important items across the country. **[**The USPS is a crucial part of the government, and something that every single one of us uses. It should be free from these partisan politics being pushed by the GOP. If you support vote-by-mail and the Postal Service, chip in $10 today so we can keep protecting it from Republican attacks and fighting for pro-voting rights legislation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84137732/470577139/444630146?refcode=5-1-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyYTUxZjIxLWY2MDctZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CwxKO9b62AEwRC9W9OLwFooS7hne594oTjkweGVKOuk=)** Trump made his hatred of mail-in voting a cornerstone of his campaigns, saying that it caused fraud. But we know better. Mail-in voting is a cornerstone of our democracy that allows folks all across the country to exercise their right to vote, and there’s _no_ __ proof that it causes any sort of fraud. **[Mail-in voting is necessary for a robust 21st century democracy, and the GOP is threatening the Postal Service to prevent us from exercising our rights. It is a transparent attack on our democracy and they must be held accountable. We know that you don’t agree with these ridiculous attacks, and by contributing $10 today, we can keep working to protect it as hard as we can.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84137733/470577140/444630146?refcode=5-1-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyYTUxZjIxLWY2MDctZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CwxKO9b62AEwRC9W9OLwFooS7hne594oTjkweGVKOuk=)** The continuous attacks on mail-in voting are proof that the GOP doesn’t care about democratic principles and our right to the ballot box. These attempts to destroy the Postal Service are just another example of Republicans trying to prevent mail-in voting by any means necessary. **[**These attacks are wrong and need to stop. Please chip in $10 today so we can continue to fight any more attacks on our Postal Service and voting rights.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84137734/470577141/444630146?refcode=5-1-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyYTUxZjIxLWY2MDctZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CwxKO9b62AEwRC9W9OLwFooS7hne594oTjkweGVKOuk=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

name: Hilary Franz
subject: I wish I had better news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz
body:
Today, Florida's 6-week abortion ban officially went into effect – forcing women to travel as far as Virginia and beyond for abortion and other pregnancy-related care.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84138790/470579440/-1503676179?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-05-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmZjZWFhYWEtZjcwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=akOfRfedA6tnOti99PiT-y_0DFjGutmmn3cUxidIDRM=)
---
| Peter,

Today, Florida's 6-week abortion ban officially went into effect – forcing women to travel as far as Virginia and beyond for abortion and other pregnancy-related care.

At an emotionally and physically painful time in my life, when I needed an emergency D&C in the middle of the night after a miscarriage, I was so grateful to be able to get care just a few minutes away. But now, women across much of the country are being sent home when arriving at the hospital with grave pregnancy complications – told to wait until they are near death until they can get care.

**This isn't just a Florida issue** – it's a threat to women's rights and health everywhere. Virginia is the only state in the South that offers legal protections for abortion rights, leaving many women without access to the care they need.

Now, more than ever, we need to defend our privacy and bodily autonomy. _The upcoming election will determine the fate of our rights, and the choice couldn’t be clearer_. **My Republican opponent supports passing a national abortion ban, overriding our protections here in Washington state. I will fight with everything I’ve got to restore federal protections for abortion.**

I've been a fierce advocate for women's rights throughout my life, from marching and fighting for reproductive rights for the last 30 years to supporting sexual assault survivors in finding health and legal services for many years. It is why I earned the sole endorsement of the National Organization for Women in this campaign. In Congress, I'll continue that fight every single day, but I can't do it alone.

[_**I need your help to ensure that every woman has the right to make decisions about her own body and future. Will you join me in this crucial fight by making a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84138791/470579441/-1503676179?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-05-01_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmZjZWFhYWEtZjcwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=akOfRfedA6tnOti99PiT-y_0DFjGutmmn3cUxidIDRM=)

clean_body: Today, Florida's 6-week abortion ban officially went into effect – forcing women to travel as far as Virginia and beyond for abortion and other pregnancy-related care. | = | Peter, Today, Florida's 6-week abortion ban officially went into effect – forcing women to travel as far as Virginia and beyond for abortion and other pregnancy-related care. At an emotionally and physically painful time in my life, when I needed an emergency D&C in the middle of the night after a miscarriage, I was so grateful to be able to get care just a few minutes away. But now, women across much of the country are being sent home when arriving at the hospital with grave pregnancy complications – told to wait until they are near death until they can get care. This isn't just a Florida issue – it's a threat to women's rights and health everywhere. Virginia is the only state in the South that offers legal protections for abortion rights, leaving many women without access to the care they need. Now, more than ever, we need to defend our privacy and bodily autonomy. The upcoming election will determine the fate of our rights, and the choice couldn’t be clearer. My Republican opponent supports passing a national abortion ban, overriding our protections here in Washington state. I will fight with everything I’ve got to restore federal protections for abortion. I've been a fierce advocate for women's rights throughout my life, from marching and fighting for reproductive rights for the last 30 years to supporting sexual assault survivors in finding health and legal services for many years. It is why I earned the sole endorsement of the National Organization for Women in this campaign. In Congress, I'll continue that fight every single day, but I can't do it alone. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me in this important fight. Together, Hilary Franz * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz Friends of Hilary Franz PO Box 7437 Tacoma, WA 98417 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you, but if you wish to receive less email, you can change your subscription . name: Team Baccam
subject: Celebrating Asian American and Pacific Islander Heritage Month
body:
www.lanonbaccam.com [www.lanonbaccam.com]
Dear Peter,

This May, as we celebrate Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) Heritage Month, we here on Team Baccam are filled with pride for the rich tapestry of stories and achievements that shape our community. After all, AAPI heritage isn’t only integral to America's story — it’s written in the fabric of Iowa’s legacy.

In 1975, our state, led by Republican Governor Bob Ray, became the first in the nation to welcome thousands of Vietnamese, Tai Dam, Lao, Khmer (Cambodian), and Hmong refugees fleeing the Vietnam War to settle in the U.S., including Lanon’s parents.

Sponsored by churches, organizations, and thousands of kind-hearted Iowans, refugee families like Lanon’s were embraced by a new community in the face of unspeakable tragedy. And while it wasn’t always politically popular, Governor Ray’s leadership in the 70s paved the way for a stronger, more diverse, and resilient community here in Iowa.

Iowa’s job this AAPI Heritage Month is the same as it was back in the 70s: To lead our nation with compassion, and serve as the helping hand our neighbors need when times are tough.

During a time where folks seek to divide us and pit neighbor against neighbor, let’s not forget that just a few decades ago, our state stepped up and simply did the right thing .

This Heritage Month, let’s recommit ourselves and our state to compassionate, people-first leadership so we can continue improving the lives of Iowans.

Thank you for your unwavering support and for standing alongside Lanon in this journey.

— Team Baccam
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-May2024-fr-May?refcode=E8281-20240501-AAPIHeritageMonth-footer-Holiday&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-May2024-fr-May?refcode=E8281-20240501-AAPIHeritageMonth-footer-Holiday&amount=25]
Lanon Baccam is a veteran, a lifelong Iowan, and now, he's running to restore principled, effective leadership in Washington. The 2022 election in Iowa’s Third was decided by less than seven-tenths of a percent - that's why CNN's Anderson Cooper has called this race a toss-up. Right now, we have a real opportunity to flip this district from red to blue — but we need your help to finish this fight and take back the House in 2024.
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-May2024-fr-May?refcode=E8281-20240501-AAPIHeritageMonth-footer-Holiday&amount=25]
Lanon's campaign to flip Iowa's Third Congressional District and take back the House is fueled by grassroots supporters like you, Peter. We want to make sure you're getting our latest updates, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/s5InDMXi8EC0qnjjUXh5Pg2?unsubscribedata=o63%2BR6M0ORLe3foZYxp26JsLIjrfnmKXikbNXTqO2Z2w0gbl2IoU9bZ10XLC7YbrXd5%2BxZy6wfe5xUDFoQTJwO05Q%2Busm05yN5FT0mfq7LdvLloZLH%2BkfP4%2Bh1vc%2FpE7ItfqtmLwFc%2FJr%2FfzJCIYtW%2FL9VV02nMSqXmqZs3Ihn2O8qxRzjeD2m3jA8yLNUiFhojMKfWWcWMdQIFW9g6D8PjzsF8JShDHSGRiQv7WHHRefOb9SoJyvj8gH29az1LX%2Bn%2FBc9KDCo8Xhj9KLL7dUsH%2BOUpqtLop6IV0TZlouFLU%2B%2BFRN8YTq69yhxQcP%2BCg7xSgt3dHgaiDBbSouYPoGGE0kwA7d5zoldp6u%2F1qyrwQoJVArSsMS37dJKfY5P2vtrRMbl5dntq4yu37MouUjrTYQUfpoVt%2BKin%2BGhjCl17tQ3r2woSp0T6pxIvh7nka .

name: John Fetterman
subject: Sarah McBride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Small states can do big things by bringing people together.
#
Derek,
Sarah McBride is a model for the next generation of leaders that Congress desperately needs.
**Sarah is America’s first openly transgender state senator** , but she is no novice when it comes to being a strong advocate for the people.
Sarah’s resume – from serving in the Obama White House to becoming the national spokesperson for the Human Rights campaign – demonstrates the positive effect she has had on all types of people, especially the people of Delaware. **She has led the way in proving small states can do big things by bringing people together.**
👉That’s why **I am proud to endorse Sarah’s historic campaign to be the next member of Congress from the state of Delaware.**
**[Will you join me in the fight to send Sarah to Congress? Donate $5 now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240501?refcode=em20240501-8965&refcode2=8965_434096_ITqv03&akid=8965%2E434096%2EITqv03)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240501?refcode=em20240501-8965&refcode2=8965_434096_ITqv03&akid=8965%2E434096%2EITqv03)
Sarah has an extraordinary record as a Delaware State Senator:
* She passed legislation expanding access to health care for rural communities
* She helped guarantee paid family and medical leave for Delaware workers
* She is a strong friend to unions and working families
* She has led the way on keeping guns out of Delaware schools

I look forward to her continuing these fights and so many more in Washington. Congress urgently needs Sarah’s effective leadership — now more than ever.
**We can’t take this race for granted. Sarah still has to win the Democratic primary in September — and you better believe that she is going to face an onslaught of vicious attacks from the GOP in the general election.**
**[That’s why I’ve gotta ask, Derek: will you pitch in $5 to help Sarah win this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240501?refcode=em20240501-8965&refcode2=8965_434096_ITqv03&akid=8965%2E434096%2EITqv03)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240501?amount=5&refcode=em20240501-8965&refcode2=8965_434096_ITqv03&akid=8965%2E434096%2EITqv03)**
Let’s make history, Derek! And by the way, let’s get a Sheetz in Delaware so I can visit!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240501-8965-footer&t=1&refcode2=8965_434096_ITqv03&akid=8965%2E434096%2EITqv03)**

name: Mariannette Miller-Meeks
subject: MISSED DEADLINE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
We must keep Iowa red!

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=efb3ff79a38a4a44a957b056bf8ec14a&_e=_ziWUfgM9qUBq1_uvTdGkGrijDncGThiIMhkrzy2xDwNp9ng-a3c8hdwHdP7GhRmx_DY5AofdLJRuvsjsTvtNRtJn0CKtWMM8g3hB7aR_6R7S8VtgH_sggpaF-gMh_-lWILZSpzueazoLFRO_pIdrTOZ-7FoFUqw107GXYrd7PSf48DWe0unZDyUnWROafvAZM6iYP1cQM_4ObksIy-NKMfsfp3CQS0ZX7NCUI7UpeUD15hvQ4cv0VlcAtVTutgLVkDErstcqacaBamUn5wbPxQkUM3LuenfMuekXVUsQpZr_9mDh4BoLHVbpzSrFLU-Of9d4KeuGf3Sf_J8by-yCQ%3D%3D)

Friend,
This is alarming...

The November election is less than six months away, and **the Democrats believe they have a great chance at flipping our seats blue.** They are pulling out all the stops to kick us out of office, but we aren't going to let that happen!

I have given a voice to Iowans in Washington during my tenure in the House of Representatives. **I have stood for life, fiscal responsibility, fixing our economy, caring for our veterans, and prioritizing improving our education system.**

We still have a lot of work to do. Republicans are doing all they can do to work against the dangerous agenda being put forward by President Biden and Democrats in the House and Senate.

**That is why it is so important to expand our majority this November.

That majority can be won or lost right here in Iowa.

**We missed our**END-OF-MONTH DEADLINE.** Will you contribute to my campaign to keep your voice in Congress?**

**TIME IS RUNNING OUT!****

body:
I have seen how labor rights transform families and communities. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWagAKMZbD6yK5h_eZEQ_vIzgapjvNSeFhcA2psVGk8x4Jadddw4fLl4JKf47x-NsxOLp7Mh2UA0kT5fhQm6ORZ5xugUo7YS-QsAFO6NlgDr8KcYiia3sleaYVP0fC54OQszyPRHfYtP9MJLxJOcn1G2jeS-73hodxPV2jZddBRp8nqGZqB3xzwvoChfoURnq1wBwhjeCC4CdvrhakHywmxOk-qByyk3FDbQhW2e8xc_MxYof_3YnNv2JTVMn6kbiO/45z/DUk3CjEUR4WK9CaB-XZFWw/h0/h001.YgnxIWcd0_hmbyR7HjajmEyejLnnn1f1j115Kb4jaBU)
---
Friend, On May 1, 1886, workers across the U.S. began to strike, demanding an eight-hour workday. Since then, workers have won additional labor rights including the minimum wage, child labor laws, anti-discrimination protections, and more. **But that is just the beginning.** We are in the midst of a labor movement with growing worker power not seen in decades. When the United Auto Workers went on strike in Michigan last September, I was proud to stand in solidarity with autoworkers outside of the **Ford Truck Assembly plant in Wayne, MI** : [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-PISAd-xy06alYbkZwy9qW8UftTg0qxm3FSsBQTSWJ5QLIZ9xniUvYt_DNrrGk-5lcfYC4iDDWFPO3U-Fj1fC-Dal41tgNjIs6HR_H-FP44VQLs2Q1Et0quLOum2fwjzPg_LxDYr-lFj7TFtiegQy86JJAgTthZrIvU6n660uaQ1W5KWzNr7Egzp4GiLNlrChZBzTqdhDzCjllpOwgK9h9gm2ZceWoeOhv0rmnJknjgxd9Dm6Inw9_RBvIZ9BEcH9T02-nciMWKIU6xJP6tEAEi69_-CObXuAnIl_-85VvkZQySvrNTS-qEaW58qoazjg1N11ekzm0Z5_U5JutRNNIIvbVUOg9xxMCxmFinGae2OmpjgyQEXe_rVCPC4lPK89Phga5spA4k2Wfp_s3Q-2urFjlJ3BjiWKwdZN40eyJnyiSLF3-RFvovHYG7ron8nk/45z/DUk3CjEUR4WK9CaB-XZFWw/h1/h001.T5aKYttaDjOLVUye5sZrDQ3iWRGdbezpZPAGKlfsa-M) **My father was a UAW autoworker, so I have personally seen how labor rights transform families and communities.** His union job enabled our family to get healthcare for the first time. The UAW has had significant victories over the past year, including by using the power of strikes. But, even as workers continue to organize for better pay and safe working conditions—from autoworkers to warehouse workers to baristas—they are being met with unprecedented levels of union busting by large profitable corporations, which pay their CEOs astronomical sums while denying working people the ability to support themselves and their families. [**On this May Day 2024, join me in adding your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of the**** _PRO Act_****to strengthen workers’ rights. Click here to take action today and stand in solidarity with working people everywhere.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-PISAd-xy06alYbkZwy9qW8UftTg0qxm3FSsBQTSWJ5QLIZ9xniUvYt_DNrrGk-5lcfYC4iDDWFPO3U-Fj1fC-Dal41tgNjIs6HR_H-FP44eSjGCT0vPFqiqi5C4hv0sQCE8NeqhvVsY60XPLhRb4Tm7Pd5bpFTGJxvTOvjFB6UACa7KCiCScLZaRuApcuf0vcD5dtEAo70tdtw6Po--aQdKhKDD3o-pMdK6LLF8DGB8A_FR-_iQdMA2rSSF0JVbaa_8BtuGcjjS_lq72q1ECvDB9EyNgLEGU0c1W96VkM-MhWzGg2zX1nIRqmcTcqO5DNGftDNT8kPgzapsObRcI2PdT6X4MbkT-0fA8N9OQyF8f4EU8MDRepIyVkAjsQcuDjON0xOk2qnibXoVLh2UrC8ilV-m8wuMp_7_K6lD5ctnNs35dkFSp68UGTD__4P8c/45z/DUk3CjEUR4WK9CaB-XZFWw/h2/h001.G98QfK8vM29mNtME5YAEs1z-VSSqkR_9t3qY5OKNhJY) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-PISAd-xy06alYbkZwy9qW8UftTg0qxm3FSsBQTSWJ5QLIZ9xniUvYt_DNrrGk-5lcfYC4iDDWFPO3U-Fj1fC-Dal41tgNjIs6HR_H-FP44VkLMZMaTnJ2BahB03zDk6MlxnUKFAbBELAkXklLnrHHr6C5rUhA5x0WQzS8RsPkNXAX01r46SKPigLe97_aaLdqN0q-FW7fSBi25ezdhQS8J2ANfVCYAk16rP2QLZsPZN5AhG-qos1v59BA9sLgzeqmS_wktqY4lfJIcyKAagHSw2Fmq2xylSR-zhn2n2PTfgjBH6exhp_BGuEVWA6h5PD-gcmXMgvX4I7ZYcXOAwEEKkbnGFgtwbCuYrjvzp-ta2SKSVsBxgrLsHxJ4C8ylMT_yFdaR1hk0jphWiaJA4F0XPZ2_-Rdj8ijPUjmmwnj1ju2MhDBsg_M8DFsMcTlK04/45z/DUk3CjEUR4WK9CaB-XZFWw/h3/h001.d_5BNUJwbca7w88myg6vVqB2t2yw-Bi0AwuOkQiG3Ug)

The _Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act_ would:
* Penalize employers that interfere with their employees’ organizing efforts;
* Make explicitly clear that employers cannot interfere with employee unionization voting procedures;
* Enhance support for worker strikes and boycotts;
* Repeal so-called “right-to-work” laws, which were created during the Jim Crow era to divide Black and white workers and weaken unions’ strength.

For too long, our economy has been rigged to serve those at the top. We need to pass legislation like the _PRO Act_ to build an economy that works for everyone, not just the millionaires and billionaires.
[**Add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of the**** _PRO Act_****today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-PISAd-xy06alYbkZwy9qW8UftTg0qxm3FSsBQTSWJ5QLIZ9xniUvYt_DNrrGk-5lcfYC4iDDWFPO3U-Fj1fC-Dal41tgNjIs6HR_H-FP44Wr6rftkkdXhkdwtM3WWuk8L5pwr7VTER_A3W8tSjAPj6fTAlGHuAr2QMC7_Pf4EUe37uzJDCXY-rp9b4vae-EjQcwXrP_E5sXepQ50dPPubdV2CZIviHaOhX2r1vIipteVYFIiMEnW7WkAzpr5wFpp5xubRF2gyF7mO5yXWkzpPNsnaiCUYcrudHFy7qgO15kFMcwyVsf69Jlbg-5SKtQUbgTyA_aX98RIpSxlFH0NhritgUBhBR2TU5KkpdfuX69c2lJEwwe_AtoL3qdm3wXAVj9MK91f7ENv1R_X_3Af6PR6RgEjusVh9w9tCOt8G_vuo9qkEQJQiVyeZee4txZI/45z/DUk3CjEUR4WK9CaB-XZFWw/h4/h001.uqrls5usiELi0N_rlDdIzMdKwoSQTh1XHw1y_kI-qgg)
Thank you for fighting for the rights and wages of working people everywhere.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: I have seen how labor rights transform families and communities. | | | Friend, On May 1, 1886, workers across the U.S. began to strike, demanding an eight-hour workday. Since then, workers have won additional labor rights including the minimum wage, child labor laws, anti-discrimination protections, and more. But that is just the beginning. We are in the midst of a labor movement with growing worker power not seen in decades. When the United Auto Workers went on strike in Michigan last September, I was proud to stand in solidarity with autoworkers outside of the Ford Truck Assembly plant in Wayne, MI : My father was a UAW autoworker, so I have personally seen how labor rights transform families and communities. His union job enabled our family to get healthcare for the first time. The UAW has had significant victories over the past year, including by using the power of strikes. But, even as workers continue to organize for better pay and safe working conditions—from autoworkers to warehouse workers to baristas—they are being met with unprecedented levels of union busting by large profitable corporations, which pay their CEOs astronomical sums while denying working people the ability to support themselves and their families. | The Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act would: Penalize employers that interfere with their employees’ organizing efforts; Make explicitly clear that employers cannot interfere with employee unionization voting procedures; Enhance support for worker strikes and boycotts; Repeal so-called “right-to-work” laws, which were created during the Jim Crow era to divide Black and white workers and weaken unions’ strength. For too long, our economy has been rigged to serve those at the top. We need to pass legislation like the PRO Act to build an economy that works for everyone, not just the millionaires and billionaires. Thank you for fighting for the rights and wages of working people everywhere. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Peter,
Thank you.
In a race as competitive as this one, the only way we can win is together. This is a tossup — and Republicans will do whatever they can to defend this seat.
Because of your grassroots support, our campaign surpassed our fundraising goal for April.
We have six months until the election. That means this race is about to reach a new level of intensity, and we’re so grateful to have you on our team as it does.
Kirsten will fight for the issues that matter in Congress — like reproductive rights, water security, and affordable housing. Your support helps us reach undecided voters with this message and get them to the polls in November.
Thank you, again, for helping us build a winning campaign.
Onwards,
Team Engel

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support.

body:
It’s time to pass the National Domestic Workers Bill of Rights!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84142257/470587916/664783965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MyNDJkMy1mZDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69YB0_ItxfnpPpu1WUFXvezQzo_bArGD_j_HCa3QAOM=&emci=bd943b30-f207-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=53c242d3-fd07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
Happy International Workers Day, or May Day! Today, we celebrate the workers and labor movement that have powered our country, and all others around the world.
In honor of May Day, we need your help to pass the **National Domestic Workers Bill of Rights.** This bill would extend and expand workplace rights and protections for care workers nationwide.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84142262/470587933/1975087166?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MyNDJkMy1mZDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69YB0_ItxfnpPpu1WUFXvezQzo_bArGD_j_HCa3QAOM=&emci=bd943b30-f207-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=53c242d3-fd07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=864787)
[**_Can you take a moment to send an email to your members of Congress and ask them to support the National Domestic Workers Bill of Rights?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84142266/470587937/1975087166?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MyNDJkMy1mZDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69YB0_ItxfnpPpu1WUFXvezQzo_bArGD_j_HCa3QAOM=&emci=bd943b30-f207-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=53c242d3-fd07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=864787)
[TAKE ACTION NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84142269/470587941/1975087166?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MyNDJkMy1mZDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69YB0_ItxfnpPpu1WUFXvezQzo_bArGD_j_HCa3QAOM=&emci=bd943b30-f207-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=53c242d3-fd07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=864787)
There are three main parts to the National Domestic Workers Bill of Rights.
**1\. Ending the exclusion of domestic workers from core workplace protections:** This includes overtime pay, protection from workplace harassment and discrimination, paid sick days, protections for live‐in workers, and privacy protections.
**2\. Addressing the unique challenges of domestic work:** This includes written agreements, standards boards, fair scheduling, meal and rest breaks, and a National Domestic Worker Hotline.
**3\. Ensuring that rights are enforced:** This includes preventing retaliation, educational resources about rights, and an implementation task force.
**It's time to win justice, dignity, and respect for care workers — that means we need Congress to step up.**
[**_Please contact your members of Congress now and demand they declare their support for the National Domestic Workers Bill of Rights:_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84142272/470587952/1975087166?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MyNDJkMy1mZDA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69YB0_ItxfnpPpu1WUFXvezQzo_bArGD_j_HCa3QAOM=&emci=bd943b30-f207-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=53c242d3-fd07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=864787)
