clean_body: It’s time to pass the National Domestic Workers Bill of Rights! Hi Peter, Happy International Workers Day, or May Day! Today, we celebrate the workers and labor movement that have powered our country, and all others around the world. In honor of May Day, we need your help to pass the National Domestic Workers Bill of Rights. This bill would extend and expand workplace rights and protections for care workers nationwide. There are three main parts to the National Domestic Workers Bill of Rights. 1\. Ending the exclusion of domestic workers from core workplace protections: This includes overtime pay, protection from workplace harassment and discrimination, paid sick days, protections for live‐in workers, and privacy protections. 2\. Addressing the unique challenges of domestic work: This includes written agreements, standards boards, fair scheduling, meal and rest breaks, and a National Domestic Worker Hotline. 3\. Ensuring that rights are enforced: This includes preventing retaliation, educational resources about rights, and an implementation task force. It's time to win justice, dignity, and respect for care workers — that means we need Congress to step up. In solidarity, Care in Action

name: Debbie
subject: with a heavy heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
this is only the beginning.
| | |
---
Friend, it's with a heavy heart I’m reaching out to tell you that as of today — May 1, 2024 — reproductive rights are effectively gone in Florida.
**When the Florida Supreme Court upheld Ron DeSantis' already-unconstitutional 15-week ban last month, they gave the green light for his even worse six-week trigger ban to take effect today.**
Even when 1 in 3 people only find out they're pregnant after six weeks have already passed.
Even when there are almost no exceptions for rape and incest.
Even when 75% of Florida voters oppose such extreme measures.
We haven't even gone a full day under this law, but one day is too many. And I know I'm not the only one who thinks so: Abortion is a winning issue, and we've seen it in every election, red state or blue, since Roe v. Wade was overturned.
So today is not the end of our fight for abortion rights.** It's just the beginning.**
**We can save our pro-choice Senate majority and codify reproductive freedom nationwide, but it starts with kicking out extremists standing in the way, like Sen. Rick Scott. [I'm fighting every day to defeat him, but I need your help to reach my emergency $100,000 goal and win. Will you rush $5 before midnight tonight to help me flip Florida blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84142416/470588294/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1177-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjYzZjMwY2QtZmQwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s79YHlI_1xvP6gB10zlth2tH4i4z4SqQDYKMK1h4kBI=)**

Look, friend: This ban has ripped away my rights, the rights of my two daughters, and the rights of millions of women who will be put in danger across our state.
And just so we're clear: **It's all because of the Supreme Court that Donald Trump built, and the Senators who allowed him to appoint the anti-abortion extremists who went on to reverse the protections of Roe.**
Senators like Rick Scott, who proudly says that, were he still governor of Florida, he would've signed that extreme six-week ban.
He's been living in a bubble of far-right extremists. He refuses to accept that the tides are turning in Florida, or that everyday families simply do not support his toxic, anti-choice agenda. _That's_ why I'm running to retire him.
**If I make it to the Senate, I'll do everything I can to pass legislation that reinstates abortion rights nationwide. But my opponent is a mega-millionaire who can and will spend practically anything to bankroll his attack ads and drown us out.**
**[I need your grassroots support today because without it, I simply won't make it to the Senate. So please, if you're with me in the fight _for_ our freedoms and _against_ extremist, out-of-touch politicians desperate to control us, will you chip in $5 or more before midnight to help me make reproductive rights the law of the land once more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84142424/470588322/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1177-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjYzZjMwY2QtZmQwNy1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=s79YHlI_1xvP6gB10zlth2tH4i4z4SqQDYKMK1h4kBI=)**

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: “Strap on a Glock”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
This kind of talk has no place — not in politics, and certainly not in the U.S. Senate.

| Peter, Kari Lake can’t stop.

For all the talk about moderation, she is one of the most dangerous, most extreme politicians in the entire country.

She called for political violence after Trump’s first indictment.

And this week, she told her supporters to “strap on a Glock” as part of their efforts to take back Arizona’s Senate seat.

“Strap on a Glock” are her exact words, Peter.

This kind of talk has no place — not in politics and certainly not in the U.S. Senate.

We only have one way to stop Kari Lake, and that’s at the ballot box.

And that’s why we’re humbly asking you to chip in to Ruben Gallego’s campaign.

[_**Split a donation of $25 between Ruben’s campaign and Fight for Progress to help us stop Kari Lake before she gains any more power or influence. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Labor built this country and labor will build our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I’m running to be the warrior every worker deserves to have standing up for them in the U.S. Senate.
#
We’ve seen some major wins for working people over the last year, Peter.
Volkswagen in Tennessee. Toyota in Missouri. Amazon, Starbucks, and fast food workers across the country.
**After decades of union-busting and “Right-to-Work” scams, workers in the public and private sectors are taking their power back — but we’ve still got work to do.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49440?refcode=em20240501-5415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5415%2E614464%2E2S7SiA)
**Unlike Josh Hawley, I’m running to be the warrior every worker deserves to have standing up for them in the U.S. Senate.** I’ll fight like hell to pass the PRO Act and the Public Service Freedom to Negotiate Act. And I’ll actually work to invest in our state — empowering workers and building the next generation of industry right here at home.
**[So if you’re with me, will you please add a donation of any amount toward my grassroots campaign to flip this U.S. Senate seat, take back power for working people, and fundamentally change who calls the shots in this country?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49440?refcode=em20240501-5415&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5415%2E614464%2E2S7SiA)**

**Labor built this country and labor will build our future.**
I’m proud to have earned the endorsement of dozens of local and statewide unions across Missouri — an election-winning coalition of workers who are ready to take this U.S. Senate seat back for real, everyday people.
With their help — and with yours — that’s exactly what we’ll do this November.
Thanks for being part of it, Peter.

We need more America First Outsiders in Congress. This is the only way we are going to drain the swamp of corrupt politicians who are only interested in lining their own pockets.

[**Look, Tony is the reinforcement that President Trump needs in Congress once he takes the White House. subject: this was a hard decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
After the 2022 election, I had a hard decision to make.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84144352/470592428/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzA2NjVlNy1mZjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-WQsvwaiua4_bYQ1b0v9KvPb72P-ct6UuXorfUjhBbQ=&emci=3be37b9c-f507-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=430665e7-ff07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84144353/470592429/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzA2NjVlNy1mZjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-WQsvwaiua4_bYQ1b0v9KvPb72P-ct6UuXorfUjhBbQ=&emci=3be37b9c-f507-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=430665e7-ff07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
After the 2022 election, I had a hard decision to make.
When I ran against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I knew we could win. No one believed me – not the Democratic party, not the Republican party, and certainly none of the political pundits.
Ultimately, though, after the recount, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
We were outspent heavily by Boebert and her allies. And the attacks and the vicious lies they told about me were really hard on my family – especially my two teenage children.
After we came so close to winning against Boebert, everyone expected me to run again in 2024. It seemed like a no-brainer. But it wasn’t an easy decision to put my family through what I knew was going to be an even nastier race than the last.
I spent a lot of time reaching out to supporters and donors like you, listening and getting their advice. And everyone promised me: They’d have my back. So I took a leap of faith.
Now, with Lauren Boebert having run off scared, the Super PACs are attacking me and the smear campaign is beginning. I need your help if I’m going to have the resources it takes to finish the job and win this critical House seat.
I made the decision to run again because I knew I could count on people like you to help me win, so it would mean so much to me if you could chip in to my campaign today:
[**Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me hit our critical fundraising goal, win this House seat, and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84144359/470592430/1610638071?refcode=em20240501pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=430665e7-ff07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzA2NjVlNy1mZjA3LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-WQsvwaiua4_bYQ1b0v9KvPb72P-ct6UuXorfUjhBbQ=)

clean_body: After the 2022 election, I had a hard decision to make. Hello, After the 2022 election, I had a hard decision to make. When I ran against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I knew we could win. No one believed me – not the Democratic party, not the Republican party, and certainly none of the political pundits. Ultimately, though, after the recount, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. We were outspent heavily by Boebert and her allies. And the attacks and the vicious lies they told about me were really hard on my family – especially my two teenage children. After we came so close to winning against Boebert, everyone expected me to run again in 2024. It seemed like a no-brainer. But it wasn’t an easy decision to put my family through what I knew was going to be an even nastier race than the last. I spent a lot of time reaching out to supporters and donors like you, listening and getting their advice. And everyone promised me: They’d have my back. So I took a leap of faith. Now, with Lauren Boebert having run off scared, the Super PACs are attacking me and the smear campaign is beginning. I need your help if I’m going to have the resources it takes to finish the job and win this critical House seat. I made the decision to run again because I knew I could count on people like you to help me win, so it would mean so much to me if you could chip in to my campaign today: = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. I don’t have the national party throwing millions of dollars behind my race. What I have is something far stronger: You. I am so thankful for your support. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

| Peter,

Today, Florida’s abortion ban kicks in. And tomorrow is the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s _Dobbs_ decision leak, which overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and stripped abortion rights away from millions of Americans.

**That’s why tomorrow, May 2, Emerge is launching National Women Talk Politics Day, and we need you to be a part of it!**

body:
We're not sitting this one out!| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84144809/470593114/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODVkMTU3Mi0wMTA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kx3YuhGKbXNECxOW0tFDyz-9DJnK3x-Mi-YHU7N1uZI=&emci=5678d9df-f807-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=985d1572-0108-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=1486204)
---
| | Peter, your dedication is the backbone of this campaign, and I am so thankful to have you on our team. This November is a time where every voice not only can, but **must** make a difference. The stakes couldn't be higher, with the outcome determining whether we continue to move forward, championing the values we hold dear—equality, justice, and freedom—or face the risk of slipping back into the gut-wrenching chaos we suffered under Donald Trump. More than anything, your involvement matters! The decisions we make and the actions we take today will echo throughout history, and I believe in our strength to lead with conviction and resolve. By choosing to not "sit this one out” - you're not just voting; you're affirming your commitment to the principles that define who we are as a party and a just society. Thank you again for everything you do and all your support. Your passion, courage, and participation fuel this campaign, and I could not be more proud to stand together with you in this fight.
---

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: We're not sitting this one out!| | | | | Peter, your dedication is the backbone of this campaign, and I am so thankful to have you on our team. This November is a time where every voice not only can, but must make a difference. The stakes couldn't be higher, with the outcome determining whether we continue to move forward, championing the values we hold dear—equality, justice, and freedom—or face the risk of slipping back into the gut-wrenching chaos we suffered under Donald Trump. More than anything, your involvement matters! The decisions we make and the actions we take today will echo throughout history, and I believe in our strength to lead with conviction and resolve. By choosing to not "sit this one out” - you're not just voting; you're affirming your commitment to the principles that define who we are as a party and a just society. Thank you again for everything you do and all your support. Your passion, courage, and participation fuel this campaign, and I could not be more proud to stand together with you in this fight. = Together, #WeRepresent! | | Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | =| =| = ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: Reaching out to you personally about reproductive freedom in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
_Aloha Peter, please read this urgent message from my friend Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s campaign:_
* * *
This is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, and I’m the Democrat running to defeat Rick Scott, serve Floridians as our next U.S. Senator, and defend our Democratic majority. **I’m reaching out to update you on the fight for abortion rights here in Florida — because, perhaps more than anywhere else in the country, the stakes here for reproductive freedom couldn’t be higher.** As I write to you, Ron DeSantis’ six-week abortion ban is going into effect. This ban will create life or death situations for millions of Floridians. Because politicians like DeSantis and my opponent, Rick Scott, are so intent on stripping Floridians of their freedoms, families right now could be subject to untold pain. **But there is hope, Peter.** The Florida Supreme Court has ruled _in favor_ of a ballot initiative to let the people — and not extremist politicians like DeSantis and Scott — decide the future of reproductive rights in Florida this November. If this ballot initiative succeeds, abortion rights will be enshrined into our state constitution, making DeSantis’ abortion ban null and void. Here's the truth, Peter. Despite what the political pundits would have you believe, Florida is NOT a red state. Polling currently shows me NECK AND NECK with Rick Scott and analysts at _The New York Times_ have called him one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country. But Scott spent $64 million of his own fortune to buy Florida’s Senate seat last time around, only winning by 0.12%. **[I know we can defeat him, but it will take your grassroots support, which is why I’m asking: Will you split a donation between me and Mazie Hirono to help me protect abortion rights, defeat Rick Scott, and save our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84145150/470594096/2045323570?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20240501_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTVkNGZmZi0wMTA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=heaycmHXE65nuiwGSuS1qYmInw9y2aK2ubF_bajZrXk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mazie Hirono and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84145151/470594097/2045323570?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_RES_AC_20240501_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTVkNGZmZi0wMTA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=heaycmHXE65nuiwGSuS1qYmInw9y2aK2ubF_bajZrXk=)

clean_body: | Aloha Peter, please read this urgent message from my friend Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s campaign: This is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, and I’m the Democrat running to defeat Rick Scott, serve Floridians as our next U.S. Senator, and defend our Democratic majority. I’m reaching out to update you on the fight for abortion rights here in Florida — because, perhaps more than anywhere else in the country, the stakes here for reproductive freedom couldn’t be higher. As I write to you, Ron DeSantis’ six-week abortion ban is going into effect. This ban will create life or death situations for millions of Floridians. Because politicians like DeSantis and my opponent, Rick Scott, are so intent on stripping Floridians of their freedoms, families right now could be subject to untold pain. But there is hope, Peter. The Florida Supreme Court has ruled in favor of a ballot initiative to let the people — and not extremist politicians like DeSantis and Scott — decide the future of reproductive rights in Florida this November. If this ballot initiative succeeds, abortion rights will be enshrined into our state constitution, making DeSantis’ abortion ban null and void. Here's the truth, Peter. Despite what the political pundits would have you believe, Florida is NOT a red state. Polling currently shows me NECK AND NECK with Rick Scott and analysts at The New York Times have called him one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country. But Scott spent $64 million of his own fortune to buy Florida’s Senate seat last time around, only winning by 0.12%. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mazie Hirono and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Debbie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

It's with a heavy heart I’m reaching out to tell you that as of today — May 1, 2024 — reproductive rights are effectively gone in Florida. **When the Florida Supreme Court upheld Ron DeSantis' already-unconstitutional 15-week ban last month, they gave the green light for his even worse six-week trigger ban to take effect.** Even when 1 in 3 people only find out they're pregnant after six weeks have already passed. Even when there are almost no exceptions for rape and incest. Even when 75% of Florida voters oppose such extreme measures. We haven't even gone a full day under this law, but one day is too many. And I know I'm not the only one who thinks so: abortion is a winning issue, and we've seen it in every election, red state or blue, since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned. Rick Scott.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tina Smith and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Look, friend: This ban has ripped away my rights, the rights of my two daughters, and the rights of millions of women who will be put in danger across our state. And just so we're clear: It's all because of the Supreme Court that Donald Trump built, and the Senators who allowed him to appoint the anti-abortion extremists who went on to reverse the protections of Roe. Senators like Rick Scott, who proudly says that, were he still governor of Florida, he would've signed that extreme six-week ban. He's been living in a bubble of far-right extremists. He refuses to accept that the tides are turning in Florida, or that everyday families simply do not support his toxic, anti-choice agenda. That's why I'm running to retire him. If I make it to the Senate, I'll do everything I can to pass legislation that reinstates abortion rights nationwide. But my opponent is a mega-millionaire who can and will spend practically anything to bankroll his attack ads and drown us out. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tina Smith and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Together, we will win. Thank you, Debbie Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Joe Biden
subject: Peter, I know you’re one of my top supporters, so I hope you’ll give me a chance to share a personal story and explain exactly why I'm running for reelection.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Over the past few years alone, we’ve created millions of jobs, lowered health care costs, and invested in the infrastructure so many Americans use to commute to work every day. But there is still so much more work to be done. | | |
---
Peter, nobody literally in history has ridden the Amtrak as much as I have. I have made over 8,000 round trips between Washington and Wilmington. _I’m not kidding._ I know that a lot of people know that I love taking the train. But I am emailing you today -- on Amtrak’s 53rd anniversary -- because I think it’s important you know _why_ I did it. **Back when I first got elected to the U.S. Senate, I promised my boys that I would be home every night to kiss them goodnight and I would be there every morning to make them breakfast.** So, I made the 250-mile commute between Washington, D.C. and Delaware. And, while my boys were the reason I initially started taking the train to and from work, the people I met along the way kept me taking the train for 30 years. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tF02SEYb775JbaVddBglvb5bATKUlRslVui8wRTD29VxWpH837-_TNIn3M2Ukb5EMNKanP6f_a6tQS1vk479Lzfp_BZ88Tkir92DlFrhuXTX5gmjb_g9R2Rwv2w2795T927csA7bBoBTumyNuj-Im5oHaN0VTxMPsCUWcH3tE4WsTvNMbBE3LooMpwrf7Gauro_H3YKat-DtqGzIvoKUUwG8xieD3F1tsJ2TtzZ2j7d-O3Bf2-D6ZQmjXSH8yQwhX2TcZetcPfFBrQ9vtxdmQrpXepVpAKNpI00hezCEKQBW8fEzXZQS6b2FPwRUGWUNglOTHR78SaSKw3mB3YscuKYJXr5s3jhigrfM9PLaUxT8HuO7In6-zISL_vFFw_AJpYkXFmALYL7P9MVCzDU7xI8PSdOOCl94fUzie202yfvLA88a22NrP5HbOGtxKcVkJKpp3urQvPaWuruEY-1LpxulX_Tqy5LSLgILE1oujj3V8d9U4txa2po8AQjxXzXKcLxh06EFmE3ST5wQ6-3Sj8EJOE8oWmTK_0gkPQ8R14aqjKW-fqG3ToQhj4ruNMVP4jPMC1N1Eltu5cab08PgY8pTP0_ET9GZBR9SucEDw-AC68dxoqX5-zlDMnb3Ucppx4exVkX992rCTLLTTu3tSzIFZqTRYG1v6lpgqyvkX7-RtD2dqraYogHTssG_RqkJvgdcX3FS7JYWZMmRbOFvI1FD0YT7dhAADocSzTZ18XZFDeTUqECTq3OnP7RGj4xX6TEJnjIlKAIQru8ly9S4K3EOsitCHsXMOSKtacOjozQPtUbXnfKT5rYRwbkkUUnpQlY_e7gl9gVcNwXN1gFaEBTwXhJ06VbYx4GWrL-HXanegGPXQzynOUBtVgd4mrx-CgSWqNjFi3Q09gRAQpEMsaXO6FNGiRplZJiaVO0xOOn_tAOw8lZPy_dCh8MOEDsCWwpYROktt5GSoR7veoOZkDYaLkSI72vTe1CuWIRW5JdgOzA233mbLUrTQqAlJ-4IZNw5NXw4iroaCnC23bJfXI_Up5Iw595Vf5N0Di2O_M61H-z2CLi4SVWTBi15fkPWPY-mFtXu2Vp3zx5i9hVwq5sLKJOkp0e0bfYDD5tC22szC3PEDkwcGwxYS0EiDZLRAo9wkTRofpBvFHrPb9VEq-TuspBRbCyN8Gonp6_NyalU/45z/xX9QJKmmQ3mcCRkeN7qksQ/h0/h001.4-1ubot94ELuaXln1aFwgXo3oueB4W1vZ1rZ3Lx9kqA) Along the way, I got to buy rounds of coffee for the people riding the train and the crew. Let me tell you, the crew members were breaking their necks. They were keeping their balance -- rocking back and forth -- collecting tickets and helping people put their bags away that were heavy as hell. **I got to learn about the folks on the train. Their children. Their grandchildren. It meant a lot to me.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tF02SEYb775JbaVddBglvb5bATKUlRslVui8wRTD29VxWpH837-_TNIn3M2Ukb5EMNKanP6f_a6tQS1vk479Lza_Pc4jwQ_6ZN89Z4euIpkhuGgcssmKlXrrdG9kSfQ8yLVlO-rb8bXT0lUKl6mg6Zlk7DK7Qv3eb0dxU7xsK3S1qaRHstVIVkwo5QvRyiQT6W9htz3z2K4Qx4ufwfa8S1S_loI4eDaSKBDUBrzpcoYDnzmbPMoKrv0CbtDCgfrBm5c2t5IcPaBuAMrGap22WgIcMvkKAsQcObEAEf4ybzikVp9zynt_62W4MrcHahWvFcd1eLnUsDra2m6uWiukMXdYpjDU4aE0va5vhnLlAfNV4B3CZDhbrVNs53CGFUJKIYAPGzvuvVD4sFzGjO9oym-F3DTlGbvyAYsG2UJVf2ir3TCSMCPO__OfKTcL2LtRv69EHi-UYKwXk3-chaVEjSkRDyGmGXxz9gBBi074jVCP7RUULu3TbHOGcGVGGioztP25tETaa8MVZeAXHFjiqhZzUpaP2zwXKu6NVdnbF2Qk_zsh2nemScW0EXd2iEsy8KZgrpa3YEktmbEVe1DawoCFOlguCsklhC-Ym0c6Xe0fFBy0atiIxUqwiZsdaHeG47wLTbzNQbe3xDGzGZ_qdUDbqQFlWAgbcWifvqPi95JICBb3emhwx2Ab97OuigZDt425KIkZddohOawK6qrBV6W3kEhlpKtM6p_mmCnoI73NqipPtepZ0qlAlh4hTjNUL7PPeyS-9i769Omj0-GHu1sP9-bswdmycXltVvh2pfJbHwiZUujxbnv70561GQwZ93kRPH8QmCdrjhQp9ZtxKzYZ0zNHAgGP7bPfal5lsYSanzv_C1FioYCBN0R7j6lfGKqLHYGQu49TG7lW1KfwKe0Ledlziv7jCx9AiUAGEvgqLIb_kgnr4ynxnJ_geX2hINB3q-XecRv5JVtZoT3UZwww8FP1EhoNJmirUnDiyEJhhxiWp9CpT8hOaOQy-OMOJdsPUIOTmWj2yf9Sr_anTSutQUiNIx3dT_Nl0RT9rh8c0bGl5HafkTt2fWtPOduliiJ1Bdx-9jzo2Cj84f7C2IKZ6f0VZFy5HJm9CXIVr4mrpjzF43HjtORRdc52DSjzyPcthECes17SO5b5i2623t0FxXEuY7b5Z_Pn1Qfmpm40/45z/xX9QJKmmQ3mcCRkeN7qksQ/h1/h001.BlHnErRP_fjTPqAlAFn5PvzF0tmVbTrEcugvnEFA9NE) It wasn’t just the conversations I had and the people I met. Like many of you, I liked to look out that window as I passed through big cities like Baltimore and smaller towns, like Newark, Delaware. When it was 9:30 p.m. on my way home, all you could see was light coming from the houses along the route. I often wondered what they were talking about at their kitchen tables. **My guess is they were -- and still are -- talking about the same things that Americans all across the country are. They’re asking,_“Are we going to be okay?”_** What they’re looking for is not a policy prescription. They just want to know their leaders are looking out for them -- making sure they get a fair shot to get ahead. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tF02SEYb775JbaVddBglvb5bATKUlRslVui8wRTD29VxWpH837-_TNIn3M2Ukb5EMNKanP6f_a6tQS1vk479LzUxsrpE2atzqgccCJpJMEeRFTGoh_fD5IVYC6eKRwMWB5pjD_J0fUBWnnLg_fzwzbGJlQte8iql_ERZfoxmEWgGTUXWDmeYbNwWAztGOxn2RI3niF5E5bNcSlYhcnEkJc9SYLeIYTG70DYUTk-BTSWfAN5L8daZB1CN_aBbYHrriS7SOjLrOsLjEfikHbQKFBnGNPDtoRk4ji88WFn07ZxXfLpxjKiaJea7G3lyixE-Rhxz-aSdLDe4I7HoDZvcntf80t5fi11rbE2Pq5tBHdGJmeNiqKmLKbcGzN48FB_R4MWfrsgdEu46GU6P-g0dO8r1c4TNB5Oigq8exvDq4K6_qOm8_XskOa8ih1P0DzH6ooJF1cBarlS3aP4Yxm3kaKrjcE_fxnK_CnVUg0xJNI5SDX2v-g7yA94B1BXjXQemPY-bthn47QLMrPSAK9AlMBPV6mLVCXGWPRnVKuDKzeNnf4QZ79MrVfYFdpH6fV7iwIp6uN8kzW_xEYELW44qAh9w1AIXY-NZQAdiG0YOLsBaeOeOorpPEntzHHhvwwJCcDNG-iXAdFL0dKUG42FtvVSNqQkHevGaS4ztQq5BQfG-BZE7S2qGN1hmJBbq5alR5o_UHDZ8oW17fAotBJtq0l44FxoS5-q6rGeDqrfFA4_RMT3TvDKn5jHD7gdQqLrFhZhQP4NfRjBaxFDJ0mKfV95kaMMRGmYrKxzRa9VZr9tb5fp8m2Y-yXjL1pYzuAzpHy1nvhDcTrfGjgPlhOjywuTVvFmBsmmEF3EVmllt-nhnW2IwBVk8POqfv0KBLtaOjY1O-rhagu_Ncr28iKkAlgcgp8fMgmRL7SJl55PyM4zeIuAUZc0Paz3ihiE8gcItktHe07_mH641h8HrBhZ-au62fIoop-OyhwJG3BndTFgD9-ELvWVbXPyl_G-SVxB4yCYzHZFND3bGe22CZrT-Gtnvq4RTdBx_q936XBHS9bHJkd9ochQRe3LdHS18k2LAo4FJzw5AOQqE4xKTxuOZxra7vtu4HC0c4q5450xg0smKdeS9gqMmpmTmHW7Unw7EeoJZPDcjSMHOq2Ty0oCLi02rufFUlrWfgyZ1PV5uIPtk/45z/xX9QJKmmQ3mcCRkeN7qksQ/h2/h001.MOtiJkk3AYwCnc0pJlWmDm5Jx_D8mRPpBvj9fFQdjrU) Since I first started taking the Amtrak all of those years ago, we’ve made some incredible progress together. And we’ve worked tirelessly to get it done. **Over the past few years alone, we’ve created millions of jobs, lowered health care costs, and invested in the infrastructure so many Americans use to commute to work every day. But there is still so much more work to be done.** Whether you started this with me all those years ago or are reading an email from me for the first time, each of us is bound by a common cause: Seeking a better future for our country. [Winning this campaign won’t be easy. clean_body: Over the past few years alone, we’ve created millions of jobs, lowered health care costs, and invested in the infrastructure so many Americans use to commute to work every day. But there is still so much more work to be done. | | | Peter, nobody literally in history has ridden the Amtrak as much as I have. I have made over 8,000 round trips between Washington and Wilmington. I’m not kidding. I know that a lot of people know that I love taking the train. But I am emailing you today -- on Amtrak’s 53rd anniversary -- because I think it’s important you know why I did it. Back when I first got elected to the U.S. Senate, I promised my boys that I would be home every night to kiss them goodnight and I would be there every morning to make them breakfast. So, I made the 250-mile commute between Washington, D.C. and Delaware. And, while my boys were the reason I initially started taking the train to and from work, the people I met along the way kept me taking the train for 30 years. Along the way, I got to buy rounds of coffee for the people riding the train and the crew. Let me tell you, the crew members were breaking their necks. They were keeping their balance -- rocking back and forth -- collecting tickets and helping people put their bags away that were heavy as hell. I got to learn about the folks on the train. Their children. Their grandchildren. It meant a lot to me. It wasn’t just the conversations I had and the people I met. Like many of you, I liked to look out that window as I passed through big cities like Baltimore and smaller towns, like Newark, Delaware. When it was 9:30 p.m. on my way home, all you could see was light coming from the houses along the route. I often wondered what they were talking about at their kitchen tables. My guess is they were -- and still are -- talking about the same things that Americans all across the country are. They’re asking,“Are we going to be okay?” What they’re looking for is not a policy prescription. They just want to know their leaders are looking out for them -- making sure they get a fair shot to get ahead. Since I first started taking the Amtrak all of those years ago, we’ve made some incredible progress together. And we’ve worked tirelessly to get it done. Over the past few years alone, we’ve created millions of jobs, lowered health care costs, and invested in the infrastructure so many Americans use to commute to work every day. But there is still so much more work to be done. Whether you started this with me all those years ago or are reading an email from me for the first time, each of us is bound by a common cause: Seeking a better future for our country. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

| Come Celebrate My Birthday this Saturday!
Join us at our new office grand opening and a door-knocking launch!
We will be opening up our new office location, celebrating my birthday and our momentum on the campaign, training volunteers, and getting out in the community to gather nomination signatures to get on the ballot!
Counting down the last six months til election day, we have alot of work ahead of us!
Let's Get Started! Join us at 9:30

clean_body: Come see our new office and make history! | | | | | Join The Movement! (and a party) | Come Celebrate My Birthday this Saturday! Join us at our new office grand opening and a door-knocking launch! We will be opening up our new office location, celebrating my birthday and our momentum on the campaign, training volunteers, and getting out in the community to gather nomination signatures to get on the ballot! Counting down the last six months til election day, we have alot of work ahead of us! Let's Get Started! Join us at 9:30 | | | | | Charity's Birthday Celebration LOCATION Our New Office! 437 S Yellowstone Dr., Ste 209, Madison DATE AND TIME 05/04/24 9:30am - 05/04/24 11:00am America/Chicago Come celebrate with us this Saturday! Check out the new office and get signed up and started volunteering! | == | == | == | | | Thank you to all those who joined us for the Unveiling of Mark Pocan's Retirement Plan! | The events were a big success, and we were humbled by the support of so many of you across the district! | | | | | | | | | Can You Give A Gift of $28? | | == | ---|--- Your Continued Support Makes This All Possible! In celebration of my birthday and the momentum we are building as a campaign, would you consider a gift of $28 to grow our efforts across the district? Your investment keeps us moving! Thank you so much! | | | | == | | | Sincerely, Charity Barry Your Candidate for the 2nd Congressional District of WI | | | | == | | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Friends of Charity Barry | PO Box 267, Mineral Point, WI 53565 | | Sent by mailto:charity@charitybarryforcongress.ccsend.com powered by

body:

Hey - I will keep this brief.

It's Congressman Jim Banks. I hate to do this, but I am sounding the alarms. We missed our April deadline.

The Radical Left is outraising Republicans across the country. If we want to have any chance of defeating the Left and putting America First, we cannot afford to miss another deadline by coming up short of our goal. We are EXTENDING the deadline until MIDNIGHT.

We have already MISSED the first three deadlines of the year. We cannot make it a fourth.

[**I am asking 20 Patriots to step up before midnight to get us back on track. **Peter, starting today, abortion access will be virtually eliminated in Florida. The consequences of this dangerous ban will be devastating.**

But we’re not powerless in this fight. Instead, we’re taking action right now to restore abortion access in the Sunshine State. Your support has allowed us to:

1️⃣ Gather the signatures required to put Amendment 4 on the ballot this November and remove government interference from our health care decisions.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Petition: Stand on the right side of history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We are witnessing horrific attacks on freedom of speech on college
campuses across the country right now, all in defense of genocide.

In response to the nationwide movement of student and faculty protests
demanding their colleges and universities divest from weapons
manufacturers and other companies that contribute to the far-right Israeli
military’s siege on Gaza, militarized police forces are being sent in to
arrest and brutalize peaceful protestors.

At Columbia, an army of heavily armed NYPD forces violently arrested
activists, exerting more force against college students and professors
than we’ve seen from law enforcement during mass shootings like Uvalde or
the violent Capitol insurrection on January 6th.

At UCLA, a mob of anti-Palestinian counter-protestors violently beat
student activists and fired explosives into an encampment of people, while
police were nowhere to be found to protect students.

President Biden and other Democratic leaders like mayors and governors
have done nothing to stop this, while the GOP is rabidly calling for the
National Guard to be deployed to further escalate and terrorize peaceful
protests.

We must stand on the right side of history in this crucial moment and
fight for our democratic freedom to protest a genocide being funded by our
tax dollars.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140418?t=1001&akid=34587%2E1203867%2E7lXqJX ]Add your name to our petition now to tell President Biden: No National
Guard on college campuses, and reaffirm the right to protest now!

Add Your Name

We cannot sit idly by and allow history to repeat itself. Further military
action against peaceful activists will only lead to more harm and
potential tragedy like the 1970 Kent State massacre.

As courageous young people rise up in solidarity with the people of Gaza
while Israel’s military threatens to invade Rafah, we must stand with
them.

Thank you for keeping up our collective movement for peace and justice for
ALL, from the United States to Gaza.

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240501-34587-footer&t=1002&refcode2=34587_1203867_7lXqJX&akid=34587%2E1203867%2E7lXqJX

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=34587%2E1203867%2E7lXqJX

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

We must stand on the right side of history in this crucial moment and fight for our democratic freedom to protest a genocide being funded by our tax dollars. [ ]Add your name to our petition now to tell President Biden: No National Guard on college campuses, and reaffirm the right to protest now! Add Your Name We cannot sit idly by and allow history to repeat itself. Further military action against peaceful activists will only lead to more harm and potential tragedy like the 1970 Kent State massacre. As courageous young people rise up in solidarity with the people of Gaza while Israel’s military threatens to invade Rafah, we must stand with them. Thank you for keeping up our collective movement for peace and justice for ALL, from the United States to Gaza. — Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: NRSC
subject: Outraised 3:1 in Wisconsin, Montana, and Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We are getting CRUSHED in the fundraising race. It is not competitive at this point – we will LOSE OUR CHANCE TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE IF THIS DOES NOT CHANGE TODAY. |
**We are in a fundraising crisis, Peter.**

In Wisconsin, Montana, and Ohio, Republican candidates are being outraised by more than a factor of $3 to $1. All three of these conservative patriots will lose if we don't turn around these fundraising numbers.

The Democrats can't compete with us on the issues. Their only way to win is to run false advertising campaigns that point the finger at Republicans for their insane policies that are tearing America apart at the seams.

Those campaigns are costly in election years when TV and radio stations know that time on the airwaves is in high demand.

We can undercut their entire strategy to hold the Senate if we can get our small-dollar fundraising to compete with the ASTRONOMICAL numbers they have been posting so far in the campaign. For example:

**In OHIO, Democrat Sherrod Brown outraised Republican Bernie Moreno by $12.1 million to $2.1 million.**
**In MONTANA, Democrat Jon Tester outraised Republican Tim Sheehy by $8 million to $2.6 million.**
**In WISCONSIN, Democrat Tammy Baldwin outraised Republican Eric Hovde by $5.4 million to $1.1 million.**
[It does not take a math major to see that these numbers are critically troubling for Republicans.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9884fec9b4514a38b6e98a3712092be0&_e=6dUtjLja0nis_8BBkyRZAXr__s9lnIQWi6n5aS6prxboKsPTRVP-NMMjY82AGOcx7ILDwKpV2xDIMQB_lsSRu2QRMZoYDKuiXa9jNIDzacui6raBfNr-HsDsAV-CMOx_2PmFlKh_Uz_UZrRwvEq9lTBr7AS8ZsvMIs4hjuOFoZac5v3d18gB4MDfTtsSoiCo3-rHOUdIKxIztzJjTrjAOGKJcMGgEjjtIQumQERjPskbXS8feOCaXaUASYyTFiYBGn1l6avVn4UPkSF4hD24NLlNHvL5PLlcBZiALs1va0MoTxH_83_RzYA1hiUa-J2_chpoVwzSnUal63fKJa8HdXBwWtaQ41J0Lu-aapC1lPQjUIWBOpGKY4LySyMnumSCN4EkUcdz5YuntNM5m0JpeJizxJRnT7RSCASyjvVwSrDog389eH-sHfw8V7K6zSwh)

_We will fail to take back the Senate if things don't turn around TODAY and continue on a positive trajectory for the campaign's duration._

The NRSC supports these candidates in competitive races, ensuring we take advantage of every chance we have to FLIP seats and take back the Senate. We will spread the truth about the Democrats' agenda that is destroying the country we love.

[ **Please consider donating to the NRSC today, knowing that your gift will support Republicans campaigning in close races to take back the Senate.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9884fec9b4514a38b6e98a3712092be0&_e=6dUtjLja0nis_8BBkyRZAXr__s9lnIQWi6n5aS6prxboKsPTRVP-NMMjY82AGOcx7ILDwKpV2xDIMQB_lsSRu2QRMZoYDKuiXa9jNIDzacui6raBfNr-HsDsAV-CMOx_2PmFlKh_Uz_UZrRwvEq9lTBr7AS8ZsvMIs4hjuOFoZac5v3d18gB4MDfTtsSoiCo3-rHOUdIKxIztzJjTrjAOGKJcMGgEjjtIQumQERjPskbXS8feOCaXaUASYyTFiYBGn1l6avVn4UPkSF4hD24NGUvTGxOM7DDo5cLnIzqu9_2kN52jQ33-QtAVaMSW4EgSHw0cRy6fY7CPh3qdMccDheHw4wJWU57PRYKwg3nZKng-up_7_yrNy8J8W-5Zr12g_yton-u-wCvzboqQRMnDSzF18CnSF3zemKsLJt0Bzzbz9ResVmQk9HhcY3i0GOa)

[**SAVE THE SENATE**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9884fec9b4514a38b6e98a3712092be0&_e=6dUtjLja0nis_8BBkyRZAXr__s9lnIQWi6n5aS6prxboKsPTRVP-NMMjY82AGOcx7ILDwKpV2xDIMQB_lsSRu2QRMZoYDKuiXa9jNIDzacui6raBfNr-HsDsAV-CMOx_2PmFlKh_Uz_UZrRwvEq9lTBr7AS8ZsvMIs4hjuOFoZac5v3d18gB4MDfTtsSoiCo3-rHOUdIKxIztzJjTrjAOGKJcMGgEjjtIQumQERjPskbXS8feOCaXaUASYyTFiYBGn1l6avVn4UPkSF4hD24NPTdeGZn6pIrFka_8FSxJhRMxDj9AQRJTssgpgGjXIB9VvQ-TlM6c-16Rv2lCwA_8g3KIzK-ZDpXOzIqqPyrm16rcm19bThHJu75XRkqIp0Ak4qzlyLlzQINArIBPJs7kMosH6DGXNwhyT7WbHk23aQ8AzjAaKkZaKU_ZR9JTMax)
[**TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9884fec9b4514a38b6e98a3712092be0&_e=6dUtjLja0nis_8BBkyRZAXr__s9lnIQWi6n5aS6prxboKsPTRVP-NMMjY82AGOcx7ILDwKpV2xDIMQB_lsSRu2QRMZoYDKuiXa9jNIDzacui6raBfNr-HsDsAV-CMOx_2PmFlKh_Uz_UZrRwvEq9lTBr7AS8ZsvMIs4hjuOFoZac5v3d18gB4MDfTtsSoiCo3-rHOUdIKxIztzJjTrjAOGKJcMGgEjjtIQumQERjPskbXS8feOCaXaUASYyTFiYBGn1l6avVn4UPkSF4hD24NBBxWO6Q5kAdV2qwJhjwaNE_K3OdKSKXAqZZ8DRARrZXmdpZ6aJ3oxVM3awOQFTf7bQ9ggt7szABPrWKfN5FnoAgphhtFeT_sp8ApI2jfXfS8rq6Lp4AUaZEUH1WC-S7K4VO2bpL-OfwZkV9vdGq6j6tXHt0-FknVxJMZVjz_3O6)
These fundraising numbers are even more concerning because the massive contributions from George Soros, Mark Zuckerberg, and Bill Gates to Democrats have not even come in yet. When they do - Democrats will only **SHARPEN THEIR FUNDRAISING EDGE.**

clean_body: We are getting CRUSHED in the fundraising race. It is not competitive at this point – we will LOSE OUR CHANCE TO TAKE BACK THE SENATE IF THIS DOES NOT CHANGE TODAY. | We are in a fundraising crisis, Peter. In Wisconsin, Montana, and Ohio, Republican candidates are being outraised by more than a factor of $3 to $1. All three of these conservative patriots will lose if we don't turn around these fundraising numbers. The Democrats can't compete with us on the issues. Their only way to win is to run false advertising campaigns that point the finger at Republicans for their insane policies that are tearing America apart at the seams. Those campaigns are costly in election years when TV and radio stations know that time on the airwaves is in high demand. We can undercut their entire strategy to hold the Senate if we can get our small-dollar fundraising to compete with the ASTRONOMICAL numbers they have been posting so far in the campaign. For example: In OHIO, Democrat Sherrod Brown outraised Republican Bernie Moreno by $12.1 million to $2.1 million. In MONTANA, Democrat Jon Tester outraised Republican Tim Sheehy by $8 million to $2.6 million. In WISCONSIN, Democrat Tammy Baldwin outraised Republican Eric Hovde by $5.4 million to $1.1 million. We will fail to take back the Senate if things don't turn around TODAY and continue on a positive trajectory for the campaign's duration. The NRSC supports these candidates in competitive races, ensuring we take advantage of every chance we have to FLIP seats and take back the Senate. We will spread the truth about the Democrats' agenda that is destroying the country we love. These fundraising numbers are even more concerning because the massive contributions from George Soros, Mark Zuckerberg, and Bill Gates to Democrats have not even come in yet. name: John Pierce
subject: The FBI’s Most Wanted . . .
body:
When you visit the FBI's 10 Most Wanted list, you'll find what you would expect: killers, child traffickers, and international drug dealers.
When you visit the FBI's 10 Most Wanted list, you'll find what you would expect: killers, child traffickers, and international drug dealers.
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtu6jAQhp9msiPyjMc4Gy_OAQWpFypVVVWWTuyAadwEJxDx9hUp7XYu3__pt7FvQ3M1oP8D0SG4AYhA_gOi026K6XyMj5vFc6F5cVpuo7ptaQVE47X3f6d3Su6jDe1tqteZM7JxgjNvUCMvhdBYZAcj2FVsVeHQMXvZsNUSXYVOeOuZVRYMCWKhBBKqQqpcNui4QmKlEJsKgcWck9voU6gtDuNkU-q6mNddzFpzGMd-mMVKoHJKXf51rlt_Hn7e6i4ClXdloPICVL4_fGw-t_udWoEs5xbk-vh6EW_-hZ-yZFw_hbYNw1IDi_0v5jsAAP__91RfcA)
| [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxMj7uOnTAQhp9m6ED2GGO2oEiCSBElfarI2GaPI8ZmfRE6bx-BjqIt5_u_uWk6dr89J1BfAfHhbQZEEF8A8eP3San-pR_f25-j6tuP4RfJK8VvgFieh_uvvqZ0jrTfL6rmxk5is6xv3MQV7wfGFB-bx6SGt0Fq4d4Qt1Hx1azbihuzqx2l4gIbPyHDnknGkctRyE5s3PYrx15KzreVQ8_uPZ0ml7zRPJdTpxQjdSZSs0-PUo58H7YALtmZmlx3-pCcvQzAJejiY9B7a2LIxZf6Knd9tjX4GAAXirm0pw7F2ZbW9u4DsdRCf3KsyTgQ8ycHcLgictZXAjFf_k2MpkP793Dp64sVly7nTBxw0BRrKCBmlE2a7HH6ffd5UNCz9_tPE-lfAAAA__-BSoYo)

[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxMj7uOnTAQhp9m6ED2GGO2oEiCSBElfarI2GaPI8ZmfRE6bx-BjqIt5_u_uWk6dr89J1BfAfHhbQZEEF8A8eP3San-pR_f25-j6tuP4RfJK8VvgFieh_uvvqZ0jrTfL6rmxk5is6xv3MQV7wfGFB-bx6SGt0Fq4d4Qt1Hx1azbihuzqx2l4gIbPyHDnknGkctRyE5s3PYrx15KzreVQ8_uPZ0ml7zRPJdTpxQjdSZSs0-PUo58H7YALtmZmlx3-pCcvQzAJejiY9B7a2LIxZf6Knd9tjX4GAAXirm0pw7F2ZbW9u4DsdRCf3KsyTgQ8ycHcLgictZXAjFf_k2MpkP793Dp64sVly7nTBxw0BRrKCBmlE2a7HH6ffd5UNCz9_tPE-lfAAAA__-BSoYo) Dear Patriot,

When you visit the FBI's 10 Most Wanted list, you'll find what you would expect: killers, child traffickers, and international drug dealers.

For information leading to their arrest, **the Feds are offering BIG rewards**.

For instance, Arnoldo Jiminez is wanted for murdering his 26-year-old bride less than 24 hours after marrying her. The FBI offers up to $250,000 for information leading to his arrest.

Alexis “Carlos” Flores, an immigrant from Honduras, is wanted for the sexual assault and brutal murder of five-year-old Iriana DeJesus. The FBI’s payout for information leading to Carlos’ arrest is also $250,000.

Even the “CryptoQueen” Ruja Ignatova, who defrauded investors of $4 billion, is wanted with a $250,000 reward for her arrest.

Of the ten men and women on the FBI’s Most Wanted list, only two drug dealers have a reward for their arrest of more than a quarter million dollars.

But wait a minute, the FBI's ten "most wanted" aren't the criminals the feds are most eager to arrest . . . **a reward of half a million dollars is being offered for information leading to the arrest of people involved in the January 6 the protests.**

If that doesn’t speak volumes about the priorities of America’s premier law enforcement agency, I don’t know what will.

I would argue that Joe Biden's FBI is not a law enforcement agency but a government protection agency.

**That’s why I am working night and day to represent over 50 January 6 th defendants as they are tried in federal court. [I need your help to keep going. Will you donate to help defend these Americans?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxMj7uOnTAQhp9m6ED2GGO2oEiCSBElfarI2GaPI8ZmfRE6bx-BjqIt5_u_uWk6dr89J1BfAfHhbQZEEF8A8eP3San-pR_f25-j6tuP4RfJK8VvgFieh_uvvqZ0jrTfL6rmxk5is6xv3MQV7wfGFB-bx6SGt0Fq4d4Qt1Hx1azbihuzqx2l4gIbPyHDnknGkctRyE5s3PYrx15KzreVQ8_uPZ0ml7zRPJdTpxQjdSZSs0-PUo58H7YALtmZmlx3-pCcvQzAJejiY9B7a2LIxZf6Knd9tjX4GAAXirm0pw7F2ZbW9u4DsdRCf3KsyTgQ8ycHcLgictZXAjFf_k2MpkP793Dp64sVly7nTBxw0BRrKCBmlE2a7HH6ffd5UNCz9_tPE-lfAAAA__-BSoYo)**

With the knowledge gained from Harvard Law School, I'm defending those Americans who exercised their rights on January 6, 2021 and are now paying the price. They are veterans, moms, grandmothers, sons, and daughters. **[They need your help](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxMj7uOnTAQhp9m6ED2GGO2oEiCSBElfarI2GaPI8ZmfRE6bx-BjqIt5_u_uWk6dr89J1BfAfHhbQZEEF8A8eP3San-pR_f25-j6tuP4RfJK8VvgFieh_uvvqZ0jrTfL6rmxk5is6xv3MQV7wfGFB-bx6SGt0Fq4d4Qt1Hx1azbihuzqx2l4gIbPyHDnknGkctRyE5s3PYrx15KzreVQ8_uPZ0ml7zRPJdTpxQjdSZSs0-PUo58H7YALtmZmlx3-pCcvQzAJejiY9B7a2LIxZf6Knd9tjX4GAAXirm0pw7F2ZbW9u4DsdRCf3KsyTgQ8ycHcLgictZXAjFf_k2MpkP793Dp64sVly7nTBxw0BRrKCBmlE2a7HH6ffd5UNCz9_tPE-lfAAAA__-BSoYo).**

Despite reports from the leftist media, they caused no harm, and many spent mere minutes or even seconds in the Capitol building and left if asked to do so by law enforcement.

Some of my clients had the Capitol Hill Police hold the doors open for them and were escorted through the building!

They were peacefully protesting yet have had their lives destroyed by Biden’s Department of Justice. **Many have lost their homes and jobs and have had their families broken apart.**

And most of them face years in federal prison and fines of hundreds of thousands of dollars!

I am doing my best to defend them in Federal Court, **but it comes at a great expense** , and **[I need your continued support](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxMj7uOnTAQhp9m6ED2GGO2oEiCSBElfarI2GaPI8ZmfRE6bx-BjqIt5_u_uWk6dr89J1BfAfHhbQZEEF8A8eP3San-pR_f25-j6tuP4RfJK8VvgFieh_uvvqZ0jrTfL6rmxk5is6xv3MQV7wfGFB-bx6SGt0Fq4d4Qt1Hx1azbihuzqx2l4gIbPyHDnknGkctRyE5s3PYrx15KzreVQ8_uPZ0ml7zRPJdTpxQjdSZSs0-PUo58H7YALtmZmlx3-pCcvQzAJejiY9B7a2LIxZf6Knd9tjX4GAAXirm0pw7F2ZbW9u4DsdRCf3KsyTgQ8ycHcLgictZXAjFf_k2MpkP793Dp64sVly7nTBxw0BRrKCBmlE2a7HH6ffd5UNCz9_tPE-lfAAAA__-BSoYo).**

I've been all but camped out in hotels and temporary apartments in Washington, D.C., bunking with staff and supporting the defendants and their families. The cost of just meager accommodations and flights has stretched the budget of my organization, NCLU.

If you’re able, **[please support my work today and help defend these Americans from the continued political attacks from the Biden Administration that are costing them everything!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxMj7uOnTAQhp9m6ED2GGO2oEiCSBElfarI2GaPI8ZmfRE6bx-BjqIt5_u_uWk6dr89J1BfAfHhbQZEEF8A8eP3San-pR_f25-j6tuP4RfJK8VvgFieh_uvvqZ0jrTfL6rmxk5is6xv3MQV7wfGFB-bx6SGt0Fq4d4Qt1Hx1azbihuzqx2l4gIbPyHDnknGkctRyE5s3PYrx15KzreVQ8_uPZ0ml7zRPJdTpxQjdSZSs0-PUo58H7YALtmZmlx3-pCcvQzAJejiY9B7a2LIxZf6Knd9tjX4GAAXirm0pw7F2ZbW9u4DsdRCf3KsyTgQ8ycHcLgictZXAjFf_k2MpkP793Dp64sVly7nTBxw0BRrKCBmlE2a7HH6ffd5UNCz9_tPE-lfAAAA__-BSoYo)**

Any donation you can make is greatly appreciated and will not be forgotten.

Thank you for your support and attention.

In Vigilance,
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxMj7uOnTAQhp9m6ED2GGO2oEiCSBElfarI2GaPI8ZmfRE6bx-BjqIt5_u_uWk6dr89J1BfAfHhbQZEEF8A8eP3San-pR_f25-j6tuP4RfJK8VvgFieh_uvvqZ0jrTfL6rmxk5is6xv3MQV7wfGFB-bx6SGt0Fq4d4Qt1Hx1azbihuzqx2l4gIbPyHDnknGkctRyE5s3PYrx15KzreVQ8_uPZ0ml7zRPJdTpxQjdSZSs0-PUo58H7YALtmZmlx3-pCcvQzAJejiY9B7a2LIxZf6Knd9tjX4GAAXirm0pw7F2ZbW9u4DsdRCf3KsyTgQ8ycHcLgictZXAjFf_k2MpkP793Dp64sVly7nTBxw0BRrKCBmlE2a7HH6ffd5UNCz9_tPE-lfAAAA__-BSoYo)
John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

name: Steve Daines
subject: Senator Fischer needs us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
I took on the huge challenge of leading the National Republican Senatorial Committee’s (NRSC) fight to win back a Republican U.S. Senate Majority because I know just how important that is to our country’s future. |
---
[](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=a0fddd1e05db459e857c3f76c7b2eff2&_e=kvH-ryOLBxKC5WcTe7VBDxLPr6016S3pUEXhJ2Vw3Eodumx-WPP210h4jgG6uoSD4P_sxj1htZgKglBwih-T4od0UXvzylT-5vQBhhW8xvhLCngu-luJKDFnW4c5GmDLn0rJj5AGh-Abplx5tJBu6-JyD7NP66_IOdys5tNsRR2g6WFeZvguSDDQokUS0D61ZYZER4ru5v_NRA0AFD4mibuyAcuxANGiwOy_jVkbl2CZH8APWq-5hvcEJp_v7J4vdZEnI8c7diKLzEXbMVvLrmozRX7YEvGoxzD-_D57gZ_lLpT4p-ihZSlkcKS4GXclt0MAJparaWLRH2hI5A95shap9ktaldNoc8-dlv1ny9D_MDZUULa_0QxKXPcICFof) Fellow American,

I took on the huge challenge of leading the National Republican Senatorial Committee’s (NRSC) fight to win back a Republican U.S. Senate Majority because I know just how important that is to our country’s future.

So do you, Fellow American -- and you also know that winning that majority means defeating incumbent Democrats to reverse their slim advantage -- and just as importantly, holding our own in races where the Democrats are already working to defeat rock-solid Republicans running for re-election, like my friend and colleague **Senator Deb Fischer in Nebraska.**

Fellow American, I won an extremely tough 2020 re-election battle of my own against a nationally supported Democrat in the most expensive race on a per-vote basis in U.S. history -- and I know it was **[the indispensable commitment of grassroots conservatives like you that made the difference.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=a0fddd1e05db459e857c3f76c7b2eff2&_e=kvH-ryOLBxKC5WcTe7VBDxLPr6016S3pUEXhJ2Vw3Eodumx-WPP210h4jgG6uoSD4P_sxj1htZgKglBwih-T4od0UXvzylT-5vQBhhW8xvhLCngu-luJKDFnW4c5GmDLn0rJj5AGh-Abplx5tJBu6-JyD7NP66_IOdys5tNsRR2g6WFeZvguSDDQokUS0D61ZYZER4ru5v_NRA0AFD4mibuyAcuxANGiwOy_jVkbl2DmbJ26TwBMUY3FRi7mz7LxvE6PaCZM2DxZKYK_OI2km85d5uHGjuRGFLZY3ngboIK5jLjFu9NUuWT6kZ6eqbQ861PbJ2-kwAe7Y6FkIHbE6CgBhpoMYaZnuUtaezAS-WloJVlvg-2J3IffGGbEwPmB)**

So now, at this crucial point in the 2024 campaign, when the elite liberal donor funded Democrats are already on the offensive to seize Republican seats and increase their majority, I need you to show **[that commitment to win in November _now!_](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=a0fddd1e05db459e857c3f76c7b2eff2&_e=kvH-ryOLBxKC5WcTe7VBDxLPr6016S3pUEXhJ2Vw3Eodumx-WPP210h4jgG6uoSD4P_sxj1htZgKglBwih-T4od0UXvzylT-5vQBhhW8xvhLCngu-luJKDFnW4c5GmDLn0rJj5AGh-Abplx5tJBu6-JyD7NP66_IOdys5tNsRR2g6WFeZvguSDDQokUS0D61ZYZER4ru5v_NRA0AFD4mibuyAcuxANGiwOy_jVkbl2CTwNG8F2n0gWOwypGyjkQpRJxDhNVngV4Qzpt--KE6qlswIYWYeGyfThPfvpigDj6M3LSUgrc0pjKJDlxrQ3WLC_jDh_VDCP7h3GJ5ICk7LtP7rgDQk2g6fEu5E0RT7sOxxcJ6xxw_wJ8n15VX9IF9)**

That’s why I hope you’ll step forward now Fellow American, and **[take advantage of this opportunity to make a generous contribution](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=a0fddd1e05db459e857c3f76c7b2eff2&_e=kvH-ryOLBxKC5WcTe7VBDxLPr6016S3pUEXhJ2Vw3Eodumx-WPP210h4jgG6uoSD4P_sxj1htZgKglBwih-T4od0UXvzylT-5vQBhhW8xvhLCngu-luJKDFnW4c5GmDLn0rJj5AGh-Abplx5tJBu6-JyD7NP66_IOdys5tNsRR2g6WFeZvguSDDQokUS0D61ZYZER4ru5v_NRA0AFD4mibuyAcuxANGiwOy_jVkbl2CQ8zW7AtD2d0D3Ba64ngfxq-8nH936vyq7TsUrA-7zzT63Uc7jOxYiWIloAy6HLu0OA1MXo87ieueNjSFQGbmgcpU1BQzlQzFpfyffRr6IHp5R4IyQYoQw1xxYNHYkv1torZ8QjC2dHVaZvhzIg48m)** to help _**Deb Fischer**_ win her pivotal Nebraska re-election battle and a new GOP Senate Majority on Capitol Hill.

| [** DONATE -> **](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=a0fddd1e05db459e857c3f76c7b2eff2&_e=kvH-ryOLBxKC5WcTe7VBDxLPr6016S3pUEXhJ2Vw3Eodumx-WPP210h4jgG6uoSD4P_sxj1htZgKglBwih-T4od0UXvzylT-5vQBhhW8xvhLCngu-luJKDFnW4c5GmDLn0rJj5AGh-Abplx5tJBu6-JyD7NP66_IOdys5tNsRR2g6WFeZvguSDDQokUS0D61ZYZER4ru5v_NRA0AFD4mibuyAcuxANGiwOy_jVkbl2DnUTKTd51zAkpA-4E3xKl_NOw6qX0B9XqYOZqrtfzY_62eJtk8Yfie6vJFW72fn3XuAe4rHXLJqwAJOnmToyIWNM_tEyqCYfpo2MqvXC3x4BYbYxH2ho4a2EsOd5VFtTEXwCUxFCDTGsy1_KTc3rjX)

_Thank you!_

I feel so grateful to have such a great team around me and I am honored to have so many amazing supporters on my side just like you. Because the truth is, no matter how hard I work or how great my team is, none of this becomes possible without you. Over the next eight weeks, there will be a ton of work. Let me tell you a little bit about my radical opponent Ruben Gallego...

He marches with radicals to defund the police.

He received the endorsement of the Clintons AND Soros family in ONE WEEK.

He ran off with a D.C. lobbyist, abandoning his pregnant wife.

He's fought for President Biden 100% OF THE TIME.

Gallego's even fighting to put men into women's sports. This might be surprising to some, but I've seen him. I don't think he can compete in men's sports. This is why he's so desperate to destroy it.

**This is who we 're fighting--he's walked out on so much. He will let the people of Arizona down. ****I WON 'T.**

Sometimes, your voice is with your wallet. We've seen it work before with woke companies who bend the knee at the altar of radicalism. We CAN beat Ruben Gallego. We CAN SAVE AMERICA.

body:
Before we dive into the state of this race, I’d like to thank everyone for working so hard to get us to where we are today. I am deeply grateful for your commitment and the energy and passion you’ve poured into this pivotal campaign.

| \---------- Forwarded message ---------

FROM: Floyd, Campaign Chairman, Kari Lake for Senate
TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com
CC: Campaign Staff
RE: 2024 Polling Report (Internal)
---
| [ ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=111e81d7988240b9a4b04a0004cd73f4&_e=qWaVtix4odQbnWEGi-pGQtxCr-IJUPhnjL0dzqqRew9PneLKNv-8lYU7yYH4HUMMLkTcLV4lDy2LU2MvlXONhuL-gxolkg2df_uFH1ibvq5kwuxC-RCREmkTKpAKElgahvojQnc5v47-gsId4T2J7hCNaHveRbxZ_dvwaQqIvnyrrbHsSeluJZW7Xh0Go1JhOiYEH5nqxYsNfm8kvdLj6zZ2H077gh1x1HhTGXcqreZkVOAe9tHQ2IKknSic-uHBimkrEvMstAoLXOBkUZcwcVuJVDSniTSBHHPZYka9pzkqLMWD8_cso7NYHGKy4OXGQWBv-Jd6LWJoVSE96etRr-63OkGxRelyukAQlZF75IxZ1Dkxqxuc7fLX9_Aoz_kcrTLqvN-WqR1PbC1Ljc21RRA8EPNsMrScSV5HoUbU_Vc%3D)
---
**CONFIDENTIAL** Team,

Before we dive into the state of this race, I’d like to thank everyone for working so hard to get us to where we are today. I am deeply grateful for your commitment and the energy and passion you’ve poured into this pivotal campaign.

Now, down to business. This race is heating up and all eyes will be on us to determine who controls the Senate. So we’re all on the same page: we cannot afford a single misstep or shortfall.

As you are about to see in the polling toplines below, Kari has maintained the slight early lead – this is a big deal because we knew things would get tighter when Sinema dropped out of the race.

[](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=111e81d7988240b9a4b04a0004cd73f4&_e=qWaVtix4odQbnWEGi-pGQtxCr-IJUPhnjL0dzqqRew9PneLKNv-8lYU7yYH4HUMMLkTcLV4lDy2LU2MvlXONhuL-gxolkg2df_uFH1ibvq5kwuxC-RCREmkTKpAKElgahvojQnc5v47-gsId4T2J7hCNaHveRbxZ_dvwaQqIvnyrrbHsSeluJZW7Xh0Go1JhOiYEH5nqxYsNfm8kvdLj6zZ2H077gh1x1HhTGXcqreZkVOAe9tHQ2IKknSic-uHBGQvmWFFnFLe_tj-64-5SQCQ22NxCg4fp4-jI32QcihXb3GZjy0SnkaGn6Yh1ULEeHmvY2ybTLuJ8HMguPDMi_FV1vLEugtPmjenobjcBnZQLmBMaojQWVjHJOmGBF66peqMO6AsTLqXvBKnSukJB_rAMkj017glrDL4mvuQ_p88%3D)
This race is still well within the margin of error — you might look at this and think we’re in a good spot — but we still have less than seven months to go until Election Day.

Voter sentiment reflects just how FAR LEFT to the FAR LEFT Ruben Gallego truly is...

_These are the things we need to hammer home about Gallego:_

> Votes with **Joe Biden 100% of the time.**
> Votes with **The Squad 95% of the time.**
> Wants to **gut the filibuster** and allow Democrats to push their radical agenda down our throats.
> supports letting **illegal aliens vote.**
> stood with Joe Biden, **giving Iran billions** of taxpayer dollars so they could wage war in the Middle East

We’ve got two jobs in November, and they're both of equal importance.

#1 Making sure President Trump is re-elected as the next President of the United States of America.

#2 Getting Kari Lake into the U.S. Senate.

Kari is the perfect candidate to represent us in Washington, D.C. She’s the only mom in the race, and she’s consistently held strong to her convictions. She is willing to die for this state, and it’s up to us to make sure we fight equally as hard to secure VICTORY in November.

I’ve got one thing to ask you today — we’re falling behind our upcoming fundraising deadline. You might have seen this in one of my other emails, but this was the quarter-one fundraising breakdown >

[](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=111e81d7988240b9a4b04a0004cd73f4&_e=qWaVtix4odQbnWEGi-pGQtxCr-IJUPhnjL0dzqqRew9PneLKNv-8lYU7yYH4HUMMLkTcLV4lDy2LU2MvlXONhuL-gxolkg2df_uFH1ibvq5kwuxC-RCREmkTKpAKElgahvojQnc5v47-gsId4T2J7hCNaHveRbxZ_dvwaQqIvnyrrbHsSeluJZW7Xh0Go1JhOiYEH5nqxYsNfm8kvdLj6zZ2H077gh1x1HhTGXcqreZkVOAe9tHQ2IKknSic-uHBaRsOltUKtUf79skQXweEtaLKSLXaPg-eQ9zBQRPh4r0YLKjD9k78pFP00BeYbgaEPpuKdyP4T8gmQVWFa9ozsIY-0fh8M-jKfhubEjjYmNXlfh3kKnzWBsV4LIee5Wnvdjp7rdxSkhQ0flyuCkzZHB9bUaOfeGOGEmnDcjLHMGU%3D)
I’m setting an important deadline for this campaign. By 11.59 PM tonight, I’m asking you to donate $5, $10, $25, or anything you can spare and donate to [**THIS LINK**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=111e81d7988240b9a4b04a0004cd73f4&_e=qWaVtix4odQbnWEGi-pGQtxCr-IJUPhnjL0dzqqRew9PneLKNv-8lYU7yYH4HUMMLkTcLV4lDy2LU2MvlXONhuL-gxolkg2df_uFH1ibvq5kwuxC-RCREmkTKpAKElgahvojQnc5v47-gsId4T2J7hCNaHveRbxZ_dvwaQqIvnyrrbHsSeluJZW7Xh0Go1JhOiYEH5nqxYsNfm8kvdLj6zZ2H077gh1x1HhTGXcqreZkVOAe9tHQ2IKknSic-uHB4j2hoKvvUYGwlXYZH-jYrds9_DioMk-TBe1Ti6yX1-2SnamHbRkoOIFPFpDZpqXs4CcyF3EtyQt9OqK3p9UzGaEgW_tiWRshrn9e72wHpQMG1WOvPlCe7X_lhRftNWgsB4TadAvdZssIfnRNGMudBt6SeoGkgbZrdoGPfnKxxfo%3D) or by clicking one of the buttons below.

| [**DONATE NOW, BEFORE 11:59 PM** ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=111e81d7988240b9a4b04a0004cd73f4&_e=qWaVtix4odQbnWEGi-pGQtxCr-IJUPhnjL0dzqqRew9PneLKNv-8lYU7yYH4HUMMLkTcLV4lDy2LU2MvlXONhuL-gxolkg2df_uFH1ibvq5kwuxC-RCREmkTKpAKElgahvojQnc5v47-gsId4T2J7hCNaHveRbxZ_dvwaQqIvnyrrbHsSeluJZW7Xh0Go1JhOiYEH5nqxYsNfm8kvdLj6zZ2H077gh1x1HhTGXcqreZkVOAe9tHQ2IKknSic-uHB-hK76pbxeJqrJRdNrdTWFXGbZcKvMLm2dttgqG4_LK1RltSesMVAX-nXLLcHGY_v8tlkV0aYOksp0jQCWNGkBwm8dKPwpfQ4aYUNmV2fbW3UrappwHu7EMEzLbbJyQ9D7dibqrLK6RyBy4vxlEthhkbG7n1y55_CTNOk3jbENww%3D)
---

Arizona is the biggest MUST-WIN Senate race in 2024. Not only that, it’s also very doable. If we buckle up and give this fight everything we have, we will start the America First revival right here in Arizona.

I’m counting on all of you to do what needs to be done and help this campaign. Kari’s counting on ALL OF US to do EVERYTHING we can do to help her WIN in November.

[**If you can donate ANYTHING, CLICK HERE.**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=111e81d7988240b9a4b04a0004cd73f4&_e=qWaVtix4odQbnWEGi-pGQtxCr-IJUPhnjL0dzqqRew9PneLKNv-8lYU7yYH4HUMMLkTcLV4lDy2LU2MvlXONhuL-gxolkg2df_uFH1ibvq5kwuxC-RCREmkTKpAKElgahvojQnc5v47-gsId4T2J7hCNaHveRbxZ_dvwaQqIvnyrrbHsSeluJZW7Xh0Go1JhOiYEH5nqxYsNfm8kvdLj6zZ2H077gh1x1HhTGXcqreZkVOAe9tHQ2IKknSic-uHBqJZyuxwnU_MVeK_e_4jx9864_7GFeP_l6qQexYNLFfNNm--wOGQnMao0Rv9cr64cyiw393C2aMlfoJaKYJcPCKlSqzLiDbLvtPZp-pECZrGws8OsHxvd1b8WJ-eSrrn6A31EW5GzB9vdRwGeazi43ueon1oAYpRYJjNgT0lDCBQ%3D)

Best,

Floyd

I am deeply grateful for your commitment and the energy and passion you’ve poured into this pivotal campaign. | \---------- Forwarded message --------- FROM: Floyd, Campaign Chairman, Kari Lake for Senate TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com CC: Campaign Staff RE: 2024 Polling Report (Internal) | CONFIDENTIAL Team, Before we dive into the state of this race, I’d like to thank everyone for working so hard to get us to where we are today. I am deeply grateful for your commitment and the energy and passion you’ve poured into this pivotal campaign. Now, down to business. This race is heating up and all eyes will be on us to determine who controls the Senate. So we’re all on the same page: we cannot afford a single misstep or shortfall. As you are about to see in the polling toplines below, Kari has maintained the slight early lead – this is a big deal because we knew things would get tighter when Sinema dropped out of the race. This race is still well within the margin of error — you might look at this and think we’re in a good spot — but we still have less than seven months to go until Election Day. Voter sentiment reflects just how FAR LEFT to the FAR LEFT Ruben Gallego truly is... These are the things we need to hammer home about Gallego: Votes with Joe Biden 100% of the time. Votes with The Squad 95% of the time. Wants to gut the filibuster and allow Democrats to push their radical agenda down our throats. supports letting illegal aliens vote. stood with Joe Biden, giving Iran billions of taxpayer dollars so they could wage war in the Middle East We’ve got two jobs in November, and they're both of equal importance. #1 Making sure President Trump is re-elected as the next President of the United States of America. #2 Getting Kari Lake into the U.S. Senate. Kari is the perfect candidate to represent us in Washington, D.C. She’s the only mom in the race, and she’s consistently held strong to her convictions. She is willing to die for this state, and it’s up to us to make sure we fight equally as hard to secure VICTORY in November. I’ve got one thing to ask you today — we’re falling behind our upcoming fundraising deadline. You might have seen this in one of my other emails, but this was the quarter-one fundraising breakdown > I’m setting an important deadline for this campaign. By 11.59 PM tonight, I’m asking you to donate $5, $10, $25, or anything you can spare and donate to or by clicking one of the buttons below. | Arizona is the biggest MUST-WIN Senate race in 2024. Not only that, it’s also very doable. If we buckle up and give this fight everything we have, we will start the America First revival right here in Arizona. I’m counting on all of you to do what needs to be done and help this campaign. Kari’s counting on ALL OF US to do EVERYTHING we can do to help her WIN in November. Best, Floyd Campaign Chairman for Kari Lake Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, .

name: Team Kennedy
subject: The “No Spoiler Pledge” is Making Waves
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
President Joe Biden cannot secure a victory against Donald Trump in any scenario.

|
---
| | | [President Joe Biden cannot secure a victory against Donald Trump in any scenario.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_1_24_fra1&n=1)

---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_1_24_fra1&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
A massive new poll of the 2024 election cycle surveyed three head-to-head scenarios. The results are shaking up the political establishment:
1. Biden vs. Trump. Result: Donald Trump wins by a comfortable margin.
2. Trump vs. Kennedy. Result: Kennedy wins in close race.
3. Kennedy vs. Biden: Result Kenndy wins in a landslide.

This fifty-state poll from Zogby, distinguished by its unprecedented scale and precision, surveyed over 26,000 likely voters nationwide, _achieving a remarkably low margin of error of just 0.6%_. Unlike typical polls, this survey meticulously calculates the winner in each state to predict the electoral vote outcome—the only measure that truly determines our next president.
The results are unequivocal: [President Joe Biden cannot secure a victory against Donald Trump in any scenario](https://www.kennedy24.com/spoiler?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_1_24_fra1&n=3)—be it a direct matchup or a three-way race including Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
The only scenario in which President Trump participates in the election and does not win is a direct head-to-head with Kennedy, in which Kennedy emerges victorious.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/spoiler?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_1_24_fra1&n=4)
In other words, if anyone is a spoiler in this race, it is President Biden! Why? RFK Jr. explained it in today’s press conference: "To be a spoiler, a candidate must not only lack the ability to win themselves but also obstruct another potentially winning candidate." Under these criteria, it's evident that President Biden's continued candidacy might inadvertently deliver the White House to Donald Trump.”
In response to these findings, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has proposed a bold initiative called the [No Spoiler Pledge](https://www.kennedy24.com/spoiler?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_1_24_fra1&n=5): a pledge for the weakest candidate in a head-to-head match to step aside based on a 50-state poll in mid-October 2024, surveying over 30,000 likely voters.
This proposed poll would assess head-to-head races between Biden and Trump, and Kennedy against Trump. Whichever candidate does worse head to head will step aside.
_We call on the Biden campaign to sign the pledge, so that if Trump wins it won’t be by accident, but only by beating the strongest challenger._
Right now, that challenger is Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. [With this pledge on the table, now is the time to keep him strong.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_1_24_fra1&n=6)
[Your support is crucial in this pivotal moment. Every donation helps RFK Jr. close in on his opponents and beat them in a two-way OR a three-way race.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=zogby_poll_5_1_24_fra1&n=7)

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Condemning Violence, Condemning Genocide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
This is a time for all of us to stand up for the side of peace, to end the cycle of destruction...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
|
# Condemning Genocide
---
| [ ](https://humanappealusa.org/appeals/gaza-emergency-for-us-supporters)
---
| **American military support for Israel’s war against Gaza is unacceptable, and we call upon the Biden administration to stop perpetuating violence.** This violence has led to the death of at least 1.5% of the Gazan population, the purpose of which is genocide, as repeatedly reiterated by Netanyahu’s ministers: **“The Gaza Strip should be flattened, and for all of them there is but one sentence, and that is death.** ” This quote comes from Yitzhak Kroizer (MP), but has been repeated by many figures in the far-right Israeli government and in our own right wing. Currently, **we have sent over 100 shipments of weapons to Israel** which has allowed them to advance that goal, by giving them the tools to wage mass death. The horrific martyrdom of our service members – both Aaron Bushnell’s act of protest and the unnecessary sacrifice of three soldiers in Jordan – and the pain of our younger generation, witnessing their forefathers commit the heinous crimes which led to the creation of Israel, has perpetuated this cycle of violence. **The brutality with which our law enforcement has responded to students advocating for peace — many of them Jewish themselves — is shameful and undemocratic.** We have seen the hypocritical approach to this conflict play out across all levels of American governance. From the censure of Rashida Talib for upholding a Palestinian freedom slogan, while Congressman Brian Mast has said there are no innocent Palestinian civilians with no repercussions, to the authoritarian response of our universities against peacefully protesting students. **This must end.** We are at a turning point, as a country, and must decide what kind of nation we want to be. **In the past decades, we have seen immense progress in America for marginalised groups, and our progressive attitudes led us to a natural friendship with Israel** , as itself an aspirationally progressive state. However, the dark tide of Netanyahu’s government has co-opted the dream of a two-state solution, and proved itself willing to go to any lengths – even genocide – to secure a Jewish state. Netanyahu has continuously broken international law, and more recently US sanctions, with**new Israeli residences being created in the West Bank, and over half a million Israelis currently living on Palestinian land** in that territory. **Netanyahu has ignored the ceasefire intended to return Israeli hostages** , and has stated he will invade Rafah regardless. He has bombed an embassy and has too many corruption charges to list succinctly. Yet our government stands with him, despite Chuck Schumer’s attempt to chart a path to the right side of history. **The ICC stands poised to issue an arrest warrant for Netanyahu** , rightly classing him with fellow dictators such as Vladimir Putin, while Netanyahu has dismissed these charges and positioned himself against the international community. This is not the path we, as a nation, want to follow. **We call upon President Biden to stand up and address the country, to take responsibility for the violence against our students,** and to finally address this issue in an even-handed way. The current response stands to ruin both Biden’s chances of reelection and hurt the entire Democratic party down-ballot, not to mention the divisive effect upon our nation. The Biden administration has repeatedly pretended that only the Muslim community in America cares about the war. **This is not true, over half of Jewish Democrats support a lasting ceasefire and de-escalation.** Over a thousand students of many faiths and ethnicities have been arrested for daring to protest the murder of 34,000 Palestinians, from California to Texas to New York. The violence unleashed on the UCLA campus by pro-genocide counter-protestors is representative of the wider pro-war movement. **We cannot continue to cater to the worst impulses in our society, those which begin nobly by echoing the pain and trauma of the Israelis, yet end with the call for Gaza’s erasure.** We wholeheartedly condemn the October 7th attacks and the immense damage they caused to Israeli society – in the tragic loss of life, the suffering of the hostages, and mass psychological trauma – but we, America, must be wise enough to respond rationally. **We cannot allow a genocide to be waged with our weapons.** It is against our law, as attested to by over 20 lawyers in the Biden administration, it is against international law, and it goes against every moral sentiment that we hold dear. [Our message to our government is this: end the cycle of violence now. Donate below to contribute to Gaza aid. ](https://humanappealusa.org/appeals/gaza-emergency-for-us-supporters)
---
| | | | | [ Donate Now](https://humanappealusa.org/appeals/gaza-emergency-for-us-supporters)
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
## Gaza Emergency Appeal
No Dem Left Behind PAC
---
| 80M St. SE Suite 100
Washington D.C. 20003
---

| | |
---|---|---

Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate's committee. |

body:
I'm embarrassed

Friend,

Let me tell you - I can barely contain my excitement.

_I just received some EXCELLENT news from one of my friends that brought me to tears._

****_I haven 't cried like this since 2019 when LSU beat Alabama. It's time to grab a box of tissues and cry some tears of joy because I'm about to give you some news that just might save our Red Wave._

Moses might have well parted the red sea a second time because this is a MIRACLE.

A Patriotic GODSEND has called and said the 6 words that every campaign wants to hear.

****"I'm offering you a 1300% match."**
_I 'll tell you - I had to call my Lawyer and ask if this was legal._
