body:
| | | Hey team -- It’s Diana, the DSCC Research Director. I’m writing to explain why our entire strategy relies on Democrats like you, and what happens when we fall behind our goals.

If not enough Democrats show up and participate in the surveys I send to you, **we won't have statistical significance to make crucial strategy decisions.**

_That means we won’t know which battleground states our resources should go to or where we need all-hands-on-deck momentum._ We can only get that kind of vital information from supporters like YOU. And if we don’t, the whole operation could come to a _halt._

But right now, **we’re falling behind on daily strategy survey responses.** We still need 37 Democrats to confirm their responses in Pennsylvania before midnight to catch up to our goal, so **now that you know how important this is:**

**[Will you take our daily strategy survey so we can make our next critical investment to defend the Senate? We can’t afford to delay when Republicans are sharpening their strategy _every minute of the day_ >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/17692?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240501-Diana-FallingBehindStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240501-Diana-FallingBehindStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&akid=14543%2E9716520%2EAgRbdy)**

When I got the news I am about to share with you, I thought that was the perfect word to describe this occasion. We are VERY lucky. Usually, when you get a call in the wee hours of the morning, it's nothing good. This time though, I was pleasantly surprised. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: From the inside out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Just because we didn’t see the big picture at first doesn’t mean we weren’t part of one.
#
Sometimes people will ask me, “There is so much happening in the world and in the country, and it all feels so big and overwhelming - what can I even do as one person?” What I try to convey every time is that no action is too small, and if you feel so moved, you can and should start with whatever is within arm’s reach or in your backyard. You can even start with yourself.
We live in a culture of grand gestures and big ambitions, but that also means we should be wary of how much “get-rich-quick” thinking can perpetuate beyond money schemes and into the idea that any/all major, impactful shifts happen suddenly and in dramatic fashion with a handful of major figures. The fact is, that couldn’t be further from the truth. Revolutionary and transformative changes, from the inside out, happen more like mosaics.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240501.-858WS&refcode=em20240501-6310-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6310%2E2526796%2E3_tnYA)
Think of it like this: no matter who we are, how visible or invisible or big or small, each one of us is just one tile. Whether you see that as liberating or disempowering is a matter of perspective. When you have your eye pressed all the way up to the single tile of a mosaic, it can look quite meaningless. A single piece of shattered glass could look worthless. Or perhaps a piece of small painted porcelain could seem beautiful, but too small to “be” anything. Or maybe a stunning rare slab of stone may think itself as the biggest piece when it is really a corner tile. The secret is, it’s all significant.
**The two secrets of mosaics are:**
1. Each piece (us + our small actions) is far more powerful and meaningful than we know, and
2. Each piece (we) need each other far more than we realize.

When we are able to step back from thinking our own broken, unfinished pieces are not enough, and start to see how all the other little pieces glistening alongside us start to form eyes and ears and abstract beauty and landscapes and symbols and more, we realize that just because we didn’t see the big picture at first doesn’t mean we weren’t part of one. So just do the small thing - for yourself and others. Choose your actions with humility, love, and enthusiasm. It means more than you know, and the world thanks you for it.
Take heart,
Alexandria
Alexandria is fighting for a powerful set of policies that will reshape our economy, shrink inequality, and address the climate crisis.
Our campaign is 100% people-powered. In fact, we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. [If you can, please consider making a donation today to keep Alexandria fighting for our agenda in Congress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240501.-858WS&refcode=em20240501-6310-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=6310%2E2526796%2E3_tnYA)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240501.-858WS&refcode=em20240501-6310-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=6310%2E2526796%2E3_tnYA)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240501?refcode=em20240501-6310-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&refcode2=6310_2526796_3_tnYA&akid=6310%2E2526796%2E3_tnYA)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240501-6310-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=23&akid=6310%2E2526796%2E3_tnYA)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=6310%2E2526796%2E3_tnYA) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=6310%2E2526796%2E3_tnYA) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=6310%2E2526796%2E3_tnYA)
---|---|---

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Systemic corruption isn't just in D.C., it's in all 50 state capitols, including Boise. Here's the deal:
During COVID, there was a massive influx of cash into government coffers, swelling budgets. Corporations, including hospitals, got rich, while people were paid to stay home.
Thanks for reading Brian Lenney (Nampa's Senator)! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..wVvB5JY3Sj9jmWYY0zU805edlrGXAlRjlXnhSxggAg8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=144222120)
But now, as the gravy train slows, these groups, used to fat government checks, are scrambling. They're pushing hard to install legislators who will keep the money flowing. And when the funds dry up?
_They turn to more of your taxpayer dollars._
They're trying to pass bills that replace the family with government, embedding this idea in dozens of bills. Relying on the government means taxpayers foot the bill. The only barrier? True conservative fighters.
**There are two types of elected officials:**
1. **The yes men:** These folks serve lobbyists, bureaucrats, and the executive branch. They find their identity in their position, which is why they engage in questionable financial activities and follow orders without question. They're just cogs in the establishment machine.
2. **The watchmen:** Like me. We don't find our
identity in our titles. I don't care what the lobbyist class thinks of me, I don't bow down to the Governor, and I always prioritize individual rights and freedoms over corporate interests. As a proud member of the IFC, I'm your watchman in the Senate.

Let's set the stage here: Idaho is NOT a conservative utopia.
In fact, according to [a recent study by the ILA](https://substack.com/redirect/7a880202-278d-45d1-a524-54cdec7779a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), _**Idaho has some of the country's most liberal Republicans.**_
**Consider this:**
* Government and budget growth is insane. Pre-pandemic it was $8.3 billion, now it's $13.9 billion, a growth of 67.47%, nearly twice what we'd expect with inflation and population growth.
* Our massive welfare state is largely funded by federal dollars, hovering around $5 billion.
* Education is crucial, but despite throwing more money at it, the results aren't improving.

## _**We can 't keep growing the government and expanding at this pace without something breaking. **_
If you keep going down the same road, you eventually get somewhere. For example, our national debt balloon is now $34 trillion, growing by $1 trillion every 90-100 days--it used to take 6 years!
This is fueled by states like Idaho that are addicted to federal dollars. This leads to inflation, which we've all felt at the pump, in the grocery store, and with housing costs.
Did you know the guy running against me voted yes on every single spending bill that came to the Senate floor last time he was in office? _**This is not conservative.**_
This recklessness will see our national debt hit $37 trillion by year's end. That debt balloon will eventually pop, and if we keep spending like this at the state level, we're literally helping it happen. When it bursts, 40% of our state budgets--those federal dollars--will vanish, and we'll be in a dire situation.
**What we need are watchmen, not yes men:**
* We need people who will sound the alarm and push back.
* We need people who refuse to conform and who will expose corruption.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/69343fa5-5e7a-467c-b0d5-7710457c504d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As a member of the Idaho Freedom Caucus, I'm one of those people. That's why the establishment is spending over $100,000 on TV ads and hiring out-of-state canvassers to spread lies about me--they want me gone.
_**Remember, politics is ultimately about the adjudication of power.**_
When citizen legislators take power from the system and return it to the people, they face fierce opposition.
Thanks for reading Brian Lenney (Nampa's Senator)! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.

body:
I’m PRO-TRUMP and AMERICA-FIRST - NOT a RINO| | | Peter, when I challenged Mitch McConnell for Senate Republican Leader, I learned how the establishment operates.

They were shocked that I challenged the status quo in the Senate, and they even told the media I was **[“The Least Popular Man in Washington.”](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=d3c1e46a0f7a41dd9c601810d60e8b0f&_e=IvF8kyw8lBUvEIhKs7NKVr2OyvxyoH-X1yCWD-1MOTUt9VX66g3t8944v_7s8c0tvEbVcHedQ47dYWk8Z8u_Pl_kGXKLDZ_je7oGK3uVbzUv4txnj1UT_Rdav7ht3V3u5FXcHi1V7KO5NWf5QGdnIVu0gSW0I_AeltgKXmWR770_A0ynGrVBKTfWAVaCJzcgxOn3D3IEGXFheGvjDJf-vEFUcArZfGzMrTJ-SDCYXjRTR-bq0cU8HvXwlOGm93v7qh2ygtu5BsOu-6Fm2q04qhEx5dWQZ6v487zJz9QZlZYBZzLh72tibS_QHvk4Olm68wKDoWzeTfcNyOTC8czOaBao6x2s3sjz48tnTD5P3hXyjvyGTWn7MXWs49AWiIsH) **

But one leader had my back as I fought the system in Washington: **President Donald J. Trump.**

Since I took office in 2018, I have fought and defended President Trump in the Senate, but now the establishment in DC is coming for us with their political vendettas.

---
[**DEFEND RICK SCOTT**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=d3c1e46a0f7a41dd9c601810d60e8b0f&_e=IvF8kyw8lBUvEIhKs7NKVr2OyvxyoH-X1yCWD-1MOTUt9VX66g3t8944v_7s8c0tvEbVcHedQ47dYWk8Z8u_Pl_kGXKLDZ_je7oGK3uVbzUv4txnj1UT_Rdav7ht3V3u5FXcHi1V7KO5NWf5QGdnIVu0gSW0I_AeltgKXmWR770_A0ynGrVBKTfWAVaCJzcgxOn3D3IEGXFheGvjDJf-vEFUcArZfGzMrTJ-SDCYXjSY285jTqQ93y3qfsb3AF9gz_sU4zht3kdIHOjFhc7MNjqi_yHNNFj4tTAiP_JjkXIzPWbgKdnD1BSx43r_WZXw5Hb5P3QEofeuBXvoMxXe59ikIm2DxILBzBK2OokvX9_3mvk5wPSJbFs88H_Eu1eC)

No amount of money or insider connections could ever entice me away from serving the people of Florida.

_**But because I’ve stuck to my guns and stood by President Trump 100%, DC insiders want nothing more than to see me GONE.** _

Democrats winning Florida would be a major setback to the MAGA movement, and I’m not about to let it happen - but I can’t save the Sunshine State alone.

name: Amanda Chase
subject: UPDATE: Are You a Delegate to the 1st Congressional District?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
PLEASE READ
| | |
---
|
# ARE YOU A DELEGATE TO THE 1ST CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT CONVENTION?
---
|
# THIS SATURDAY MAY 4 REGISTRATION 8AM-10AM
---
|
# FAKE ENDORSEMENT ALERT
---
|
# UPDATE
---
|
---
|
# URGENT MESSAGE FROM
# AMANDA CHASE
---
| Dear Friends & Supporters, On Tuesday morning I sent out an email that stepped on some people's toes. I knew it would. And it did. While I do not apologize for speaking the truth, there are a couple of items that I do need to clarify.
My statement: The mailers claim that these candidates are endorsed by President Trump when in fact they are not endorsed by President Trump. These mailers are illegal. They have no disclaimer as to who paid for the mailer. Nor is there an authorization disclaimer stating that President Trump's campaign has endorsed these candidates.
Clarification: The candidates listed and running have advised that this is a mailer declaring they are supporting President Trump and that it is not a mailer declaring that President Trump has endorsed them. That was not the impression of most who received the mailer, I'll let you be the judge.
Secondly, I've been informed that disclaimers showing who paid for and authorized the mailer are not required for inter-party contests, only for every other race, like general assembly and congressional races. If that's the case, the Republican Party of Virginia should change this policy. Voters should know the source of the information and who paid for it. So it's not illegal, but in my opinion, it should be. We need to get this changed. The address on the mailer actually belongs to one of the candidates on the mailer.
My statement: Elections are going on around the state in every Congressional District and candidates are running to secure a seat on the powerful State Central Committee, the governing party of the GOP. Many running have never supported President Trump, and now with the help of a Richmond area consultant, are now sending out expensive mailers claiming that they are now MAGA.
Truth: While I appreciate they may now verbally support our nominee, President Donald J Trump, they do not have a history of supporting President Trump in the past. They are not true grassroots conservatives who have supported President Trump until recently.
Clarification: David Botkins, is the Senior Corporate Affairs & Communications/Media Strategist for Dominion Energy. He is not a lobbyist for Dominion Energy. Also, he once supported Governor Youngkin for President, but is now supporting President Trump and was at the Trump Rally in Richmond.
---
---
---
Truth: We need true grassroots conservatives serving on our State Central Committee who serve and represent the people.
What is the source of the confusion? A mailer went out to delegates that looks like this. It is not an endorsement of President Trump of this ticket. The ticket is endorsing President Trump. Notice there is no disclaimer saying who paid for or authorized the mailer. The ticket claims they don't need a disclaimer. You be the judge. Either way, don't be deceived. This is not an endorsement by President Trump.
---
|
# WARNING!! NOT A TRUMP ENDORSEMENT OF THIS TICKET
---
|
---
|
# WARNING!!
# THIS IS REALLY THE
# ESTABLISHMENT TICKET

---
| I've endorsed the true conservative slate and hope you will join me in voting for the REAL MAGA GRASSROOTS CONSERVATIVE TICKET this coming Saturday:
---
|
# VOTE FOR THE TRUE MAGA CONSERVATIVE TICKET
---
|
---
|
# ENDORSED BY AMANDA CHASE
---
|
---
| Don't be fooled. If we're truly going to make Virginia and American great again, we need solid true conservatives who have a history of supporting President Donald J. Trump and true election integrity.
In service,
---
|
---
| | [PLEASE DONATE HERE TO SUPPORT AMANDA AND KEEP THE TRUTH COMING](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e9xv4WGbLo4FA8AZoCxf4Gy_MVXeKge705_tmmPR8Opqk8qzE2b8NOpfl_L-wyV2o2iGOVD9SRBew9t8WnaBA7_79oDwbj5Jz40yfpvLnM_dp8bK_jjdpfBN2JTaA-eL7tPklOEyHi-PQWExDm7RU7jLhqPD-B9funJk3FcZiJyidR83wFcR7-G25SlNEwJjoU7_izDg45YAwtHh3aL4lOTUhHj6xwKq&c=JQPq4rBxkp8rXBiF8fut2XTRDchQ3CjP05keyT5GqlQW78U3huN23g==&ch=w1G46dk7iT57XfmppFzaZNPRzNoPUl79Jy1VV0hCesHXLsdquVkk4Q==)

name: Steve Garvey #6
subject: Three strikes
body:
Dear Fellow American,

**_[Will you help me save California (and America) from crime, squalor, and Adam Schiff?](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fd1ef19e04764975a475b9862e7c2f07&_e=BrsBmj8q9Y3kE2ByraAo3V6kpZsjMao0mtUzRqSR0oQz4H4WWUAchMMnLC7RfKxFfNQrFRcVUVve2BpwrzlqRSNVN5OrUDuWgays-1d7kbOU-V6sh9t-xorN6gGYh_x1sp8UiEKOzngvRbcbFKys0bhktBA2razRRgPAfm29Eqt40Xk0NaxG1qnAT3F-cBt1JWblxtAM2nd5qlOWPho4uFpGqdufXJx6fpT_Big8tbbCR7Rlz8ynokVyOojSQVQ9fhAzOykQi1zxzzHptlM-eQUJydeMDZZPqOeQPs9bMbmwjCvr5T1RcLhad9iSTD1ASIUU_1mLh_fT5Ly9phis_gBkt5CFnRNPs1cW7bp5VMcDC86eJeI_Jk9MgKLIupfWXc8roauLR3ITffml7CAf7A%3D%3D) _**

Schiff already has three strikes against him:

He is a career-politician (since 1996). **Strike One.**

He lied to 300 million Americans and was censured by Congress for "falsehoods, misrepresentations and abuses of sensitive information" in his capacity as chair of the House Intelligence Committee. **Strike Two.**

He is the handpicked candidate of Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. **Strike Three.**

**_[So, I'll ask again, will you help me defeat Adam Schiff on November 5th?](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fd1ef19e04764975a475b9862e7c2f07&_e=BrsBmj8q9Y3kE2ByraAo3V6kpZsjMao0mtUzRqSR0oQz4H4WWUAchMMnLC7RfKxFfNQrFRcVUVve2BpwrzlqRSNVN5OrUDuWgays-1d7kbOU-V6sh9t-xorN6gGYh_x1sp8UiEKOzngvRbcbFKys0bhktBA2razRRgPAfm29Eqt40Xk0NaxG1qnAT3F-cBt1JWblxtAM2nd5qlOWPho4uFpGqdufXJx6fpT_Big8tbZNAUXWJCwyXt0wdTinUZbCDt6n4dwjwBDs6DRUJxVHAy6-R6L2F-QGd7B_8-NINValL2Y708-1IjbM2YLTBg1czuXPh0OXSf9p4zrxNdDjhOAQm8rOiFoKRXsvEy-uNYs43W554ePT48eioTkOT5vIkjHGiwCHWX8XW0rxsdeUVQ%3D%3D)_**

I can think of only one thing worse than being forced to endure six more years of crime, inflation, illegal immigration, and failing schools...

...and that's being forced to endure six more years of Adam Schiff lying to our faces, pulverizing our Constitution, and abusing his power and office to attack his political enemies.

**_[That's why I'm asking you to use them to rush me your Team Garvey - "Stepping to the Plate" donation today.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fd1ef19e04764975a475b9862e7c2f07&_e=BrsBmj8q9Y3kE2ByraAo3V6kpZsjMao0mtUzRqSR0oQz4H4WWUAchMMnLC7RfKxFfNQrFRcVUVve2BpwrzlqRSNVN5OrUDuWgays-1d7kbOU-V6sh9t-xorN6gGYh_x1sp8UiEKOzngvRbcbFKys0bhktBA2razRRgPAfm29Eqt40Xk0NaxG1qnAT3F-cBt1JWblxtAM2nd5qlOWPho4uFpGqdufXJx6fpT_Big8tbb5dD4qG9U0zSb-c-l_pst6qbza7ltW7mu9G1o83dqcgiJrM2ejIDm2ecCRnwjRt80lxKw8w46J4G-C9oXS_EsKfEMyrvXFKhnfwKdpUKi630AHDlzcONhFGDwhurfWtdmw5IMwKVWgXmnvd5w8bkSGvdPQJQdho2XNCOH_u7TneQ%3D%3D)_**

Because, when it comes to the 2024 election, you and I need to strike out Adam Schiff so we can step to the plate and get to work saving our country.

Make no mistake, Adam Schiff has spent his time in Congress these past twenty-three years acting as a rubberstamp for the leftist agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation.

Think about it.

Think about the crumbling quality of life in this once-great state.

Think about the daily reality of:

■ Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction.
■ The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time is causing more people to leave California.
■ Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.

If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than Adam Schiff, [**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $35 to join my team today.**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fd1ef19e04764975a475b9862e7c2f07&_e=BrsBmj8q9Y3kE2ByraAo3V6kpZsjMao0mtUzRqSR0oQz4H4WWUAchMMnLC7RfKxFfNQrFRcVUVve2BpwrzlqRSNVN5OrUDuWgays-1d7kbOU-V6sh9t-xorN6gGYh_x1sp8UiEKOzngvRbcbFKys0bhktBA2razRRgPAfm29Eqt40Xk0NaxG1qnAT3F-cBt1JWblxtAM2nd5qlOWPho4uFpGqdufXJx6fpT_Big8tbY_TtGrNEDotiFf88-eqNjSgXhGKHa_w7rAgXhgkMPZWPXb0CVy2Hd3i_DTdnFnA_OKQte19nJyPiQpEeZ4wgOiwnAw7cUrH270mptfElqj0A0EJ55HMtgAvhwDEll4WSvVQwOrP8nNqvmEQcl9HUKbOycWfLXpbm8r7iAMxCeKbA%3D%3D)

I've been called many things in my life.

Dodger. Padre. "#6" MVP. All-Star. Mr. Clean. Today, I write to you as the Republican candidate for U.S. Senate for my home state of California.

And I need your help.

I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.

I won't sugarcoat it.

This is the single most difficult race in America. It's California.

It's a state where 49% of the electorate are registered Democrats, 24% are registered Republicans, and 22.5% are no-party.

But - here's the thing - right now 100% of the people here are waking up to the reality that "one-party rule" has been a colossal mistake: crime, homelessness, drug addiction, inflation, open borders, and failing schools.

Call it "buyer's remorse."

You see it in the recall and ouster of pro-crime DAs and prosecutors.

You see it in the House seats we picked up in 2022.

And - if you were able to join me out on the campaign trail - you'd hear it in the outrage and exasperation in the voices of voters from every corner of this state.

The truth is Adam Schiff represents a doubling-down on the status quo.

And that is simply unacceptable.

**[Friend, if you'll rush me your Team Garvey - "Stepping to the Plate" donation,](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fd1ef19e04764975a475b9862e7c2f07&_e=BrsBmj8q9Y3kE2ByraAo3V6kpZsjMao0mtUzRqSR0oQz4H4WWUAchMMnLC7RfKxFfNQrFRcVUVve2BpwrzlqRSNVN5OrUDuWgays-1d7kbOU-V6sh9t-xorN6gGYh_x1sp8UiEKOzngvRbcbFKys0bhktBA2razRRgPAfm29Eqt40Xk0NaxG1qnAT3F-cBt1JWblxtAM2nd5qlOWPho4uFpGqdufXJx6fpT_Big8tba3x3KdMXjJcNBBPeUuujluv1aa_Vr-5XLIlK2TTyW_58lBe2qlsh_SeSUx60zh59QEANtO74umwCenQ4eWRpGm2q8CDx65ZMsLRS3LrGEFJ9iP5pLkVJ-vYyoRKIhm_ytluMIWdPGcs21mesHOkxGa9OVXA_QIcQMmQMwMK_hxrA%3D%3D)** I'm confident we can remind voters how great California was and, more importantly, how great it can be again.

You see, I didn't just play ball here. I started a business here. I watched my kids grow up here. I worked with many charities here. And when I went through a difficult personal time, I learned from it, and I emerged from it stronger because of the good people here.

If you take one thing away from my letter today, it's this...

I get up every day and ask God to give me the strength to make a difference in people's lives.

This is the path that led me to take on Adam Schiff. Winning this election requires a one-two punch:

1. Finishing in the top two on March 5th (which I'm proud to say we did - sending the media and the establishment into hysterics along the way).

2. A seven-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Biden/Schumer/Schiff and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.

In my playing days, I would never be outworked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone calls, rallies, town halls, you name it.

[**So, will you use this link to rush me your Team Garvey - "Stepping to the Plate" donation of $35 today?**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fd1ef19e04764975a475b9862e7c2f07&_e=BrsBmj8q9Y3kE2ByraAo3V6kpZsjMao0mtUzRqSR0oQz4H4WWUAchMMnLC7RfKxFfNQrFRcVUVve2BpwrzlqRSNVN5OrUDuWgays-1d7kbOU-V6sh9t-xorN6gGYh_x1sp8UiEKOzngvRbcbFKys0bhktBA2razRRgPAfm29Eqt40Xk0NaxG1qnAT3F-cBt1JWblxtAM2nd5qlOWPho4uFpGqdufXJx6fpT_Big8tbbLHr0ENbn9pc79gQTRqXHSKbN6mYt3crfiPwFC4AFJKm2MvaFz0jYVlVE0gUikzgRgqwwxy75iPNVcBbNRTFPGFcu-2-b5c6XCp6C4Sh8MBReA-8D1ZRoGaBIXFM2OTKzM88NaUHidHSWgFrI2rUxd5GLlaQME1mQ6RhjESSvI_Q%3D%3D)

If you're able to give more - say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or even the maximum $3,300 - it would mean a great deal to me personally.

But remember, time is short.

As of last count, Schiff had $5 million in the bank. That is why I so urgently need to hear back from you today.

With deepest appreciation,

Steve Garvey #6

P.S. Adam Schiff is the definition of a "career politician" - holding political office for the last 28 years. You know as well as I do that on his watch California is in freefall. It's time to reverse course and restore California to its rightful role as the heartbeat of America. [**Join me.**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fd1ef19e04764975a475b9862e7c2f07&_e=BrsBmj8q9Y3kE2ByraAo3V6kpZsjMao0mtUzRqSR0oQz4H4WWUAchMMnLC7RfKxFfNQrFRcVUVve2BpwrzlqRSNVN5OrUDuWgays-1d7kbOU-V6sh9t-xorN6gGYh_x1sp8UiEKOzngvRbcbFKys0bhktBA2razRRgPAfm29Eqt40Xk0NaxG1qnAT3F-cBt1JWblxtAM2nd5qlOWPho4uFpGqdufXJx6fpT_Big8tbZTC1_XEK0WmyY3atZpAV6HkeXmhdh7cR4gYwh-rqroBX3kqKLkZ3y8zRQexwhMq4_din7a2jNEIQAvI7n-mdmTeTOwgk-cO0k_icacVTppm_WyDTfbl2n-gphIEyIgPuLNpq51hKSjCp5yfUi5TjyijzfdeuOwDgpBmTbYq1i6HA%3D%3D)

Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A few big labor wins for workers to celebrate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Together, we can make sure that hard work turns into fair pay and a fair opportunity for a decent life.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2160%2E4032634%2Ej3Oghf)
---
Today is May Day, also known as International Workers’ Day — a chance to recognize the long history of working people joining together to fight for real change. And this year, **we have some big recent wins to celebrate from the Biden-Harris administration, on top of huge advances in union organizing.** Victories that came after years and years of organizing, advocacy, and plain-old persistence. **Just last week, the Federal Trade Commission voted to ban the vast majority of “noncompete agreements,”** which bar employees from switching to different jobs that could offer better pay, or better benefits, or better working conditions. Or from starting new businesses that could compete with their employers. You don’t need to be an economic expert to see how noncompete clauses end up driving down wages. But experts back this up, of course. After this ban, Massachusetts workers stand to gain $2 billion in higher pay. It’ll also lead to lower health care costs, more startups, and more patents. And our economy as a whole will be more competitive, with more entrepreneurs being able to turn big ideas into new companies. **I’ve been pushing for this reform, and because of this change, working people will have more freedom, more power, and more money in their pockets.** **Also last week, the Department of Labor announced a big raise for over 4 million working people.** I’ve fought to make sure workers don’t get locked out of earning overtime pay, and a new policy will extend overtime pay protections to salaried Americans making up to $58,656 — up from just $35,568 under Donald Trump. For millions more people now, working over 40 hours a week will mean earning overtime pay, guaranteed. Once again, the Biden-Harris administration is putting more money in people’s pockets. **And workers continue to come together in a historic wave of union organizing, lifting each other up and winning higher wages and new protections. Just a couple weeks ago, Volkswagen workers in Tennessee with the UAW broke new ground for the South by winning their union.** The power of labor unions is growing, and the American labor movement is stronger than ever. Nurses, autoworkers, public school teachers, writers, actors, and more are all recognizing their strength when they come together. All staying united on picket lines. All making change, not just for themselves, but for working people across America. Workers have always had to fight for a level playing field, from a minimum wage to basic workplace safety to a 40-hour work week. And when workers fight, workers win. **I’ll keep pushing to make it easier to organize a union with policies like the PRO Act, put more money and power in the hands of working people, and build an economy that doesn’t just work for billionaire CEOs.** **Together, we can make sure that hard work turns into fair pay and a fair opportunity for a decent life.** Thanks for being a part of this, and happy International Workers’ Day, Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---

name: Bob Casey
subject: Pennsylvania is my home, and it always will be
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so)
Peter, in a moment, I’m going to share why I’m running for re-election, but first I am asking:
[**Can you chip in $5 or more to build a winning campaign capable of taking on my billionaire-backed opponent?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240501-2&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so)
**[Chip In ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?refcode=em20240501-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so)**
Pennsylvania is my home, and it always will be.
It’s where I was born, where I grew up, and where Terese and I raised our family.
It’s also where I started a career in public service that has always been about fighting for Pennsylvania families.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240501-2&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so)
I chose to make Scranton my home because of the people. I enjoy that in Scranton, saying “hello” or “how’s it going?” in the grocery store checkout line always leads to an engaging conversation. Neighbors don’t just say “hello” back and go on with their day. They’re going to tell you about what they’re buying and about their family — and they’ll ask you about what you’re buying and about your family, too.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240501-2&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so)
Serving the people of our Commonwealth has been my great honor, and I’m proud of the fights we’ve won together.
I’m running for re-election because there are fights we still must win together – like the fight for voting rights, women’s rights, and workers’ rights; the fight to lower costs for working families; and the fight for our children, seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240501-2&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so)
The reality is, this is going to be my toughest race yet. My opponent is worth hundreds of millions of dollars and will be another “yes” vote for big corporations and the ultra-wealthy like him in the Senate. **That’s why Wall Street billionaires are trying so hard to defeat me and flip this seat.**
This is going to be one of the most expensive Senate races in the Nation, and we have to be ready to fight back against millions upon millions in outside spending if we’re going to win.
**[With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, your support is more important than ever. So what do you say? Will you pitch in $2.50 or $5 today to keep PA and the Senate blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240501-2&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240501-2-el&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240501-2-el&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240501-2-el&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240501-2-el&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240501-2-el&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240501-2&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so)
---
With gratitude,
Bob Casey
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240501-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240501-2&refcode2=2863_552475_iUw2so&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so)

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2863%2E552475%2EiUw2so)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

1. **[UNC-Chapel Hill Students Praised For Saving American Flag From Anti-Israel Protesters:'This Is America'](https://substack.com/redirect/fcb8aa91-348c-48a8-a0b9-984fa8e96525?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6d424864-8a12-4e10-b5d6-1891d0f73851?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
###### Students at the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill were praised this week for rushing in to save an American flag from being destroyed by anti-Israel protesters on campus who were seeking to tear it down.
###### In what became an instantly iconic photo that was viewed across social media tens of millions of times, a group of young men could be seen holding the large flag, preventing it from touching the ground.
2. **[We are frogs in the kettle': Persecution watchdog sounds alarm on growing threat facing American Christians](https://substack.com/redirect/532f1e33-6f9a-4b09-be7b-dd4218b1d69e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

###### Open Doors, the watchdog group born of an effort to smuggle Bibles into communist-occupied Poland, indicated in its [latest annual report](https://substack.com/redirect/9f1031fa-b3c5-431e-83b9-f0b82100cccd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that one in seven Christians worldwide faces "high levels of persecution and discrimination for their faith." That amounts to over 365 million Christians with targets on their backs. Things appear to be getting progressively worse, granted five years ago, the statistic was one in nine.
3. **[Kansas Ban On Child Transgender Medicalization Fails To Beat Veto After Two GOP Lawmakers Flip Votes](https://substack.com/redirect/0ca64e0d-2022-4449-bd57-ad62e8ba4e91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

###### I've said it before, I'll repeat it": Democrats couldn't do half of the things they're doing without the help of Republicans.
###### The bill would have banned puberty blockers, cross-sex hormones, and gender surgeries for minors.
4. **[Massachusetts to use National Guard armory as shelter for illegal immigrants despite building's ongoing use](https://substack.com/redirect/7030097c-ac8d-45f3-be6b-31ad9f4df462?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

###### Biden's American never ceases to impress.
###### Massachusetts Democratic Gov. Maura Healey's office plans to convert a National Guard armory in Lexington into a temporary "safety-net" shelter for illegal immigrants, the [Boston Herald](https://substack.com/redirect/dc84871e-12f2-4141-93eb-3e4dd4e04c39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) reported Monday.
5. **[Americans Say That Immigration Is The Top Issue Facing The Country For Third Month In A Row](https://substack.com/redirect/ede96fd7-3e96-477d-91f2-7f08bae71ba0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

###### Americans have named immigration as the single biggest problem facing the United States for the third month in a row, a series of polls from Gallup has found.
###### **The open-ended[question](https://substack.com/redirect/011f4ce1-2ea1-42f4-96a5-ec9478efab61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) posed by Gallup found that 27 percent of respondents said that immigration was the biggest issue facing the country in April, with 28 percent saying the same in February and March, up from 21 percent in January.**

subject: Judicial Watch: Biden Justice Department Refuses to Release Audio of Biden Special Counsel Interviews—Cites Biden’s Privacy
body:
Judicial Watch announced that the Justice Department has told the
court that it will not disclose the audio recordings of special
counsel interviews with President Joe Biden in order to protect
Biden’s “privacy” interests.

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68160&L=32333&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tc3BlY2lhbC1jb3Vuc2VsLWludGVydmlld3MtMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3fc891d052aaaf9a55fd499073d31dfd6a8c8d81bf75482a3e5682262390009c]

Judicial Watch announced that the Justice Department has told the
court that it will not disclose the audio recordings of special
counsel interviews with President Joe Biden in order to protect
Biden’s “privacy” interests.

The Biden Justice Department informed Judicial Watch and the court
that it would assert Exemptions 6 and 7(C) under the Freedom of
Information Act (FOIA) to prevent the release of the two audio
recordings of Biden’s interviews with Special Counsel Robert Hur.
Exemption 6 applies to “personnel and medical files and similar
files” when disclosure of such information “would constitute a
clearly unwarranted invasion of personal privacy.” Exemption 7 (C)
applies to “records or information compiled for law enforcement
purposes,” the disclosure of which “could reasonably be expected
to constitute an unwarranted invasion of personal privacy.”

Exemption 6 applies to “personnel and medical files and similar files” when disclosure of such information “would constitute a clearly unwarranted invasion of personal privacy.” Exemption 7 (C) applies to “records or information compiled for law enforcement purposes,” the disclosure of which “could reasonably be expected to constitute an unwarranted invasion of personal privacy.” Read More [] [Fitton w/ Lou Dobbs: The ] [] Fitton w/ Lou Dobbs: The "Grand Conspiracy" against Trump—AND our Elections! name: Mike Pushkin
subject: Stand with Steve Williams Against Hate: Sign Our Petition Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP02/1/67825/images/logo-small-transparent.png]
Dear Friend,
I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out to you today because our state is facing a critical moment in the fight against bigotry and hatred.
Recently, the Patriot Front, a white supremacist group masquerading as American fascists, marched through Charleston, spreading messages of division and intolerance. Now more than ever, it's imperative that we come together to denounce hate in all its forms.
That's why we're asking for your support. Will you join us in our fight against bigotry and hatred by adding your name to a petition calling on the Republican candidates for governor to denounce this hate?
[https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/west-virginia-stands-against-hate?source=wvdp] Will you join us in our fight against bigotry and hatred and add your name to our petition? [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/west-virginia-stands-against-hate]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/west-virginia-stands-against-hate?source=wvdp]
This isn't a partisan issue—it's about standing united against hate, racism, and intimidation. We cannot afford to stay silent while these dangerous ideologies threaten our communities.
Steve Williams is committed to building a West Virginia where everyone feels safe and valued, regardless of their race, religion, or background. He understands that leadership means standing up against hate and division, and he's ready to fight for a brighter, more inclusive future for all West Virginians.
Unfortunately, Steve's Republican opponents for Governor have failed to condemn this demonstration of hate in the heart of our capitol. But West Virginia needs stronger leaders—leaders like Steve Williams, who aren't afraid to stand up and ensure equality for every citizen.
Steve is ready to do his part to stand up against hate, and we hope you'll join him. Together, we can send a powerful message that hate has no place in our state.
[https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/west-virginia-stands-against-hate?source=wvdp] Add your name today and help us stand up against racism and intimidation. [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/west-virginia-stands-against-hate]
Thank you for standing with us in this crucial fight.
Warm regards,
Delegate Mike Pushkin
West Virginia Democratic Party
https://www.facebook.com/wvdemocrats/ [https://www.facebook.com/wvdemocrats/] https://twitter.com/WVDemocrats [https://twitter.com/WVDemocrats] https://www.instagram.com/WVDemocrats/ [https://www.instagram.com/WVDemocrats/]
Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible.
West Virginia Democratic Party
PO Box 11926
Charleston , WV 25339
United States

name: Marco Rubio
subject: A roll of aluminum foil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you.

**With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end?** If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time.

While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals.

I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - __one single dollar__ - we'd be able to hit all of our goals.

Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community.

**I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! [Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. _Democrats hope I give up on you and stop sending these emails.

They also hope you stop reading these emails.

They'd love it if we both give up on our conservative values altogether._

_**I won 't give up on you, and I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values either.**_ I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake. But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can before midnight.

name: Team DMP
subject: In case you missed it...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
ICYMI, the statewide six-week ban on abortions with next-to-no exceptions is now in effect./The fight to save abortion rights has only just begun.
| | |
---
In case you missed it, team, the statewide six-week ban on abortions with next-to-no exceptions is now in effect.
**But even if reproductive rights are gone in Florida, the fight to win them back has only just begun.**
Until Floridians get the final say at the ballot box, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is fighting tooth and nail to ensure every pro-choice voter knows what's at stake in November and joins her in kicking out extremists at all levels of power who stand in our way, like Sen. Rick Scott.
**However, our team's ramp-up of voter outreach and publicity to get the word out won't come cheap.**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Does the next generation share your beliefs?
body:
Our individual freedoms, the nation’s respect for the Constitution, and the legacy of our Founders are all enduring relentless assaults. |
---
| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=680a038661a04ce59773d7edbf47e009&_t=i_wggFk6_1WvWa_Yk5HRqGfJ38dIG4SMBLD6gsa3KLeXqc9_-7xdw7bwaMeH2oV6WW7c3ZCTRizFFZIrmA08HtN7ZClkbCSSPCKLxwi-d8s%3D)_
---

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=680a038661a04ce59773d7edbf47e009&_e=M3YWS56jSt_NDWnWXUCXvrQCQVxAZIf4T2sv_dRBf_uZJZvg6h6EmNsvQCpBeOOmB_9yf4hR6dWUyy0pLhbClST_d4L-jk936z1pfTUnnbAbFukvvPzLEMVxQE0VOr12BcLykSFBLe_aIaJpyBTY-OpLvn4VKfcw7QVg3TJBYBb3__CqdmwE7QO94QsPGY5Bx9SVOTt0Tua1hFdS8_lzhYF6KSOD7k72bcLgqY4IHjx9aTg_HAf6PZp4d5MjGHxzdxro7orb1QPHXj6TIwHaLvJ9o-VvJW0wRwsO8SEkBu2nopP0z8p2hTAQmIj3B7PmkPBuixeockCW_EeSk9Rur4bhE6wsUkT8niBbjC5kN1G2eOg5vDvJdlETfN1Wy-pHjJvRqW66R1ymyPccfe_osA%3D%3D)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I believe that America stands at a crossroads. Our individual freedoms, the nation's respect for the Constitution, and the legacy of our Founders are all enduring relentless assaults. Shifts in our society threaten to dilute our nation's character while biased media and divisive politics amplify it greater than ever.

The people that this impacts the most are not you and I-_It is our future generation._ Our children and grandchildren are being taught that that is their skin that defines them, not the content of their character. They are being taught that our nation's history is something to be ashamed of. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=680a038661a04ce59773d7edbf47e009&_e=M3YWS56jSt_NDWnWXUCXvrQCQVxAZIf4T2sv_dRBf_uZJZvg6h6EmNsvQCpBeOOmB_9yf4hR6dWUyy0pLhbClST_d4L-jk936z1pfTUnnbAbFukvvPzLEMVxQE0VOr12BcLykSFBLe_aIaJpyBTY-OpLvn4VKfcw7QVg3TJBYBb3__CqdmwE7QO94QsPGY5Bx9SVOTt0Tua1hFdS8_lzhYF6KSOD7k72bcLgqY4IHjx9aTg_HAf6PZp4d5MjGHxzQkzPKMw4924XsTIIXsTx83VyjehXAUrBVyBRbcMgSWKoJaPJIUCsw8FIJVmnTcxRtvPreEUHJL2cqNrT-dDJSIXf1OU6yk6ExxklzEMANpL-cdXkITtgdhstFd67n2pyH8nwt2EsFZqa6X-oAcfjHA%3D%3D) Candidly, it just doesn't make any sense.

But, I believe we can change this. I believe we can build a future that upholds the values of faith, liberty, community, and life - a future where all Americans are free to pursue their ideas, goals, and faith.

This won't be possible without your involvement. I've created a simple pledge; a way to align us all around a set of shared beliefs. [I want to invite you to take the Common Sense Pledge.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=680a038661a04ce59773d7edbf47e009&_e=M3YWS56jSt_NDWnWXUCXvrQCQVxAZIf4T2sv_dRBf_uZJZvg6h6EmNsvQCpBeOOmB_9yf4hR6dWUyy0pLhbClST_d4L-jk936z1pfTUnnbAbFukvvPzLEMVxQE0VOr12BcLykSFBLe_aIaJpyBTY-OpLvn4VKfcw7QVg3TJBYBb3__CqdmwE7QO94QsPGY5Bx9SVOTt0Tua1hFdS8_lzhYF6KSOD7k72bcLgqY4IHjx9aTg_HAf6PZp4d5MjGHxzb9ewPnJyfDtubRcIQRLSAFZzew-276dU9MGx7LMeRqn837OettHmkU6FZAB6s2j_9r6I6njLguxPcJMHIyJSEDK_9ULMkJ_v8cy8slxZodHFrXSGGvA9XSUSC13AlG8O4DCCGX76WGrDUbQMTGyrXw%3D%3D)

We cannot bring about this necessary change without you. By signing this pledge, you are committing to uphold the principles our nation was founded on and teach them to the next generations. **Just one person can make a difference, and it can start with you.**

This is not a passive petition; it's an active pledge to uphold the common sense values that shaped our great nation.

Sign the Common Sense Pledge today using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/common-sense-pledge/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=680a038661a04ce59773d7edbf47e009&_e=M3YWS56jSt_NDWnWXUCXvrQCQVxAZIf4T2sv_dRBf_uZJZvg6h6EmNsvQCpBeOOmB_9yf4hR6dWUyy0pLhbClST_d4L-jk936z1pfTUnnbAbFukvvPzLEMVxQE0VOr12BcLykSFBLe_aIaJpyBTY-OpLvn4VKfcw7QVg3TJBYBb3__CqdmwE7QO94QsPGY5Bx9SVOTt0Tua1hFdS8_lzhYF6KSOD7k72bcLgqY4IHjx9aTg_HAf6PZp4d5MjGHxzIamTqzuXHgunkqHqLbC7Is2QwL4ooGfKHxABV7Bpbbs0MXqAo0nLCszJnvzZo6nYJ0UY7gMDBtSYS6Bbpi-cYBryaYGI3RHBoU1gxKFMJybOKkknuTbt0XOvBM8u1NqAbUmawelbMboVCURZEGkADg%3D%3D)

Together, we can shape a future that respects our shared history, protects our hard-earned freedoms, and prioritizes common sense. Your involvement is critical - are you ready to take action?

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=680a038661a04ce59773d7edbf47e009&_t=i_wggFk6_1WvWa_Yk5HRqGfJ38dIG4SMBLD6gsa3KLeXqc9_-7xdw7bwaMeH2oV6WW7c3ZCTRizFFZIrmA08HtN7ZClkbCSSPCKLxwi-d8s%3D).

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: I just stepped off the House floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, I’ve just stepped off the House floor after delivering a speech that asked my Republican House colleagues to prove to the American people that they’re not hypocrites.
Why? Let’s discuss.
184 of my GOP colleagues have cosponsored legislation that supports “fetal personhood” – aka giving embryos the same full legal rights as a person.
This is fringe ideology, and it’s incredibly dangerous. Not only could it be used to prosecute people for miscarriages or for having an abortion, it could potentially affect access to birth control – and it could definitely threaten access to IVF.
During IVF, doctors often create more fertilized embryos than they plan on using, because some may be genetically unviable or result in miscarriages.
I know this, because three years ago, during my first year in Congress, I froze my eggs – which means I went through the initial stages of IVF, except that after egg retrieval, my eggs were frozen and stored.
For weeks, I took hormone pills, gave myself injections, and went to the doctor for check-ups. Then, I had a procedure under twilight sedation to harvest my eggs.
I have 17 mature eggs frozen now. Patients like me pay for the storage of their eggs and embryos – and eventually, some embryos are usually donated for medical research or destroyed.
But fetal personhood legislation – and state court rulings like the one in Alabama – could force patients to pay for storage of their embryos forever or leave clinics liable to criminal charges if embryos are damaged. That’s why at least one IVF clinic in Alabama is ending the service – and this is just the beginning.
News flash for my Republican colleagues who claim they don’t want to do away with IVF: You can’t simultaneously support “fetal personhood” and support IVF access.
You can’t falsely claim to be “pro-life” and then rip away people’s dreams of having children.
And you can’t try to bury your true end goal – attacking reproductive care and controlling our bodies and lives.
So today I called on all 184 House Republicans – including Speaker Johnson – who have cosponsored legislation that would treat embryos as children and threaten access to IVF to come to the House Floor and publicly remove their names from these bills.
Republicans, how about it? Prove that you really do support IVF access. Prove that you support families. Prove that you’re not a hypocrite.
I’m guessing they won’t take me up on it.
So while we wait for the GOP to grow a spine (which could take...forever), we’ve got to focus our energy on another path: Flipping the House and regaining our Democratic majority!
I’m doing every single thing I can to get it done – starting with delivering a resounding defeat to my anti-abortion MAGA opponent. Will you join me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Thanks for reading.
-Sara

Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

body:
You can organize your community from wherever you are, whenever works for your schedule! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84150603/470609190/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240501_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmI0Mzc2Ny0xNjA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8NHgVIuGC1j1LeN5aaXMlVgUs1Tm8yowcNOE8QF80qU=&emci=48bc5f40-ba07-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=dfb43767-1608-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, we know we reach out pretty often for grassroots donations — but it’s thanks to the strong foundation of support this team has built that we’re launching our digital organizing program for volunteers! Digital organizing wouldn’t be possible without folks like you. You know exactly what’s at stake in this election — from the future of everything from our public lands to reproductive rights. By volunteering for our digital organizing program, you can help us get out Martin’s message online — one social media post or conversation at a time! Whether you share campaign news or fun memes, chat with friends and family about our shared vision for New Mexico, or connect with new people or followers, you can make digital organizing your own! **[Even an hour or two of your time here and there can make a huge difference in the outcome of this race! Are you ready to get started? clean_body: You can organize your community from wherever you are, whenever works for your schedule! Folks, we know we reach out pretty often for grassroots donations — but it’s thanks to the strong foundation of support this team has built that we’re launching our digital organizing program for volunteers! Digital organizing wouldn’t be possible without folks like you. You know exactly what’s at stake in this election — from the future of everything from our public lands to reproductive rights. By volunteering for our digital organizing program, you can help us get out Martin’s message online — one social media post or conversation at a time! Whether you share campaign news or fun memes, chat with friends and family about our shared vision for New Mexico, or connect with new people or followers, you can make digital organizing your own! | Together, we can get the word out about everything Martin and our movement have accomplished and keep New Mexico blue.
